name: Herschel Walker
subject: Get your eyes on this NOW
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
---
Peter,

Control of the U.S. Senate is likely on the line.

Our country's future is on the line.

**AND ALL EYES ARE ON GEORGIA AGAIN.**

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61854144:JyS1CLGPN:m:1:3373497171:7C52FCDB19A403CB2961216308444FA4:r)
_You and I both know our country is on the wrong track._ **But if Senator Warnock is re-elected and Democrats maintain control of the Senate, we will get more of the same: more inflation, more crime, more open borders, more woke policies, and more support for the disastrous Biden agenda.**

**[If you want to WIN in Georgia, TAKE CONTROL of the Senate, and SAVE this great nation of ours, then I need your help RIGHT NOW. Please chip in $5, $50, or even $500 if you can in the next 15 minutes.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61854144:JyS1CLGPN:m:1:3373497171:7C52FCDB19A403CB2961216308444FA4:r)**

I'm fired up for this runoff election and ready to get America back on track, but I can't do it alone. I need your help.

**[Please take a moment to watch this video I recorded for you. Then please donate to help us win.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61854144:JyS1CLGPN:m:1:3373497171:7C52FCDB19A403CB2961216308444FA4:r)**

Thank you,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61854144:JyS1CLGPN:m:1:3373497171:7C52FCDB19A403CB2961216308444FA4:r)

Herschel Walker

[** Donate Today -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61854144:JyS1CLGPN:m:1:3373497171:7C52FCDB19A403CB2961216308444FA4:r)

clean_body: If this team digs deep and shows up the way you did to flip Georgia blue last cycle, we can win this runoff. | | Election Day may be behind us, but our work is far from finished, Derek. The Senate race in Georgia is headed to a runoff -- and that means the result of this election depends on what we do between now and December 6. You haven’t donated this year to the DNC. Split a $10 donation between Raphael Warnock’s campaign and the DNC to help win this runoff, defeat Herschel Walker, and support Democrats nationwide. Derek, it all comes down to the Peach State. Raphael Warnock is running against Herschel Walker -- a MAGA Republican who supports a nationwide abortion ban, opposes Medicaid expansion, and has aligned himself with Rick Scott -- the architect of the GOP efforts to slash Social Security and Medicare. You better believe Republicans are going to do everything they can to take back power and block Democrats from continuing to make any progress for workers and families across the country. That includes pouring millions of dollars into this runoff to defeat Sen. Warnock. But their efforts are no match for the power of grassroots supporters like you, so please: We’re racing against the clock to reach every voter, run statewide ads, and fuel important on-the-ground efforts so we can re-elect Raphael Warnock and keep this seat blue. But if this team digs deep and shows up the way you did to flip Georgia blue last cycle, we can win in Georgia and across the country. Thanks for everything, The Democrats When you make a split donation to the DNC, your donation will not only benefit Democratic Senator Raphael Warnock -- it will also help create the lasting Democratic infrastructure Democrats need to win up and down the ballot in years to come. If you no longer wish to receive these emails, you can to stop receiving these emails. Manage how often you receive DNC emails, . If you no longer wish to receive emails from the DNC, . name: Action Needed
subject: We need to know if voters like you turned out in Pennsylvania -
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
Please update your record immediately:
| | |
---
**EXCLUSIVE INVITATION:** You have been selected to represent Pennsylvania in our official Post-Election 2022 Exit Poll.

Details below -- please read carefully. (If your email is not [DPWILLIS67@GMAIL.COM](http://go.dscc.org/go/10964?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20221112-ActionNeeded-DemExitPoll-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20221112-ActionNeeded-DemExitPoll-Pros-sl1&akid=8626%2E9716520%2EVjST5e), please exit this email immediately.)
Team -- Election Day was Tuesday, and votes are still being counted across the country.
But right now, we need to know where to send resources in this historically important post-election period -- and to do that, we MUST have a representative sample of what turnout looked like across the country.**
**You’re our best hope to gather this pivotal information -- so please, will you take our EMERGENCY Post-Election Exit Poll?**
USER ID: **9716520**
REASON FOR SELECTION:**Past Survey Responses**
ACTION REQUIRED: [**Accept Invitation to Exit Poll**](http://go.dscc.org/go/10964?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20221112-ActionNeeded-DemExitPoll-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20221112-ActionNeeded-DemExitPoll-Pros-sl1&akid=8626%2E9716520%2EVjST5e)
As a top supporter, it’s important that you and you alone use this customized link to the survey. We’ll be monitoring results very closely, but keep in mind that the Exit Poll closes at midnight.
**We have just a few more hours to gather this key information -- click here to help:**
**[www.dscc.org/2022-Exit-Poll#9716520](http://go.dscc.org/go/10964?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20221112-ActionNeeded-DemExitPoll-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20221112-ActionNeeded-DemExitPoll-Pros-sl1&akid=8626%2E9716520%2EVjST5e)**
We’re so grateful for your help.

Thank you,
Team DSCC

* If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! Online records may not be up to date, but don't worry -- your responses have been recorded.
| |
* * *
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please **[click here](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-senate-democrats-2022-q4?refcode=DPE-footer&t=1&refcode2=8626_9716520_VjST5e&akid=8626%2E9716520%2EVjST5e)**.

name: Natalie James
subject: Many thanks
body:
Thank you to everyone who supported our campaign and voted for me.
| | | [](https://he35og.fd52.fdske.com/ec/gAAAAABjcECKvg7TwRWKT36SLIxjxYRmD0MEa3mXOrCfMRPH78HLSG6VmFxwgkG2FxE1NMXOPtA8iSe4ltiNhAWUiz75LaGFQE5ZbrHYHHZaNZ2Lk9xzgDk6kvhyuy_WeE7RX__IrceYfirj-rzCRTzHhmXGSm2uBpe_5ydu6WsORK_wjt_X4fqd0J-dhqFL3HD27R5fpUBAZAHQIyAOGTeescP_8vl4d3Z0760kT9ZrRcJdriJbGcftcNDd5u91X5tZ_3F5S7wqnh6XXSowL64K-kPP6T-AnVi8_2EMoSpRqktqw3BuAd67Y3fZTptzi97Y6EaLWjryJ6YFq9Sd1XWXVGaeJNkHIeKVPN-jJNAIXGnOBhwOhadVk_ks7Q-0RCkACAJ4-TBq)
---
|
---
| _Natalie James is a Democrat running for the U.S. Senate in Arkansas.__Natalie has dedicated her life to standing up for people,__ands she 's running to bring that record of service and accountability to Washington. _ _We 're counting on grassroots support to flip this seat and protect our Senate majority._
---
|
---
| | |
---
| Friend\-- Although we didn't get the outcome we were hoping for, I am so proud of what we accomplished. I want to sincerely thank you for your support in my first-ever campaign for theUnited States Senate. Together, we moved the needle and gave Senator John Boozman one of the most competitive races of his political career. We fought for Democratic values in a state where people feel forgotten. We turned out first-time voters, we inspired women and girls across Arkansas, and we gave people hope in a difficult and unprecedented year. This is just the beginning. We will continue to stand up for what Arkansans believe in -- hard work, integrity, and always showing up for our neighbors. We will continue the fight for quality, affordable healthcare, a living wage, and for every child to get a quality public education. Thank you to everyone who supported our campaign and voted for me. Know that this is not the end. This is just the beginning -- We will continue to fight for change and a brighterfuture for all Arkansans. God bless you and may God bless the Land of Opportunity.
---
| | [CHIP IN ANY AMOUNT >>](https://he35og.fd52.fdske.com/ec/gAAAAABjcECKy2xMJrw7CkE6Z2V_CtXc-Xcm-1_517YAVRd93jheUTZ6yFM1xRRIVv-gnwWhHxFwwizTbqb_S_JbPkyyUDpuolz4Inx8jdpG3BBUFYtkz1dKgdNdvNvr9q-xAjBTGo3xJl4sTp-V0Ciz9KyM3f5OpzFV8JtCjXzNCf5BtRo69m8C_ogs4uj8397G1j3fVSBaH-gbNgi500qeMVi26bDsJ1PfdvwLieDLDjp-MTOrOy1aKrbvOUS2TA7BAP2-mmCQjLXfTWfiBZ6NA-5xjwRKMY8jEu4561pDGENt9YC2S66bqnJ9DEz5mSZ5TmT0Vd25oXxhG-t-rte0aC6pc0J5_SKw-ty1t4AUNaUR3Nlvq-0a9fXixkdiZPqvUO1MxPOZk71_WtA_z4yQdftjqpHDde8njzPNCT-gcIcdqY4Hcl4=)
---
| With gratitude, – Natalie

clean_body: Thank you to everyone who supported our campaign and voted for me. | | | | | Natalie James is a Democrat running for the U.S. Senate in Arkansas.Natalie has dedicated her life to standing up for people,ands she 's running to bring that record of service and accountability to Washington. We 're counting on grassroots support to flip this seat and protect our Senate majority. | | | | | Friend\-- Although we didn't get the outcome we were hoping for, I am so proud of what we accomplished. I want to sincerely thank you for your support in my first-ever campaign for theUnited States Senate. Together, we moved the needle and gave Senator John Boozman one of the most competitive races of his political career. We fought for Democratic values in a state where people feel forgotten. We turned out first-time voters, we inspired women and girls across Arkansas, and we gave people hope in a difficult and unprecedented year. This is just the beginning. We will continue to stand up for what Arkansans believe in -- hard work, integrity, and always showing up for our neighbors. We will continue the fight for quality, affordable healthcare, a living wage, and for every child to get a quality public education. Thank you to everyone who supported our campaign and voted for me. Know that this is not the end. This is just the beginning -- We will continue to fight for change and a brighterfuture for all Arkansans. God bless you and may God bless the Land of Opportunity. | | = | With gratitude, – Natalie | | | | == | == | | == | | 17200 Chenal PWKY, Suite 300-111 Little Rock, AR 72223, United States | | or

name: John Fetterman
subject: Reaching out about something urgent
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
This could be our last chance to save + expand our Democratic Senate majority.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20221112-8129-header&t=1&akid=8129%2E434096%2ETY57VJ)
Hi Derek, it’s John Fetterman.
I’ve been trying to give you a break from the emails this week, but I’m reaching out right now about something urgent.
**My friend + Georgia Senator Raphael Warnock is facing a runoff election against Herschel Walker on December 6 and he *really* needs our help.**
**[RUSH $5 NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20221112-1?amount=5&refcode=em20221112-8129&refcode2=8129_434096_TY57VJ&akid=8129%2E434096%2ETY57VJ)**
Just like here in PA, Donald Trump + Mitch McConnell spent million$ trying to defeat Senator Warnock during the General Election. And now, they’re lining up even more shady GOP mega-donors to dump _even more_ $$$ into Georgia.
This grassroots team (yes, I’m talking about YOU 🥰) already helped us make history once this year. **So now, I’m urgently asking for your help again:**
**[Will you rush an emergency donation of any amount toward my friend Sen. Warnock’s campaign right now? 100% of your donation goes toward helping him fight back, win this runoff + keep Georgia blue.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20221112-1?refcode=em20221112-8129&refcode2=8129_434096_TY57VJ&akid=8129%2E434096%2ETY57VJ)**
**[RUSH $5 NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20221112-1?amount=5&refcode=em20221112-8129&refcode2=8129_434096_TY57VJ&akid=8129%2E434096%2ETY57VJ)**
**We can’t afford to lose Senator Warnock in the U.S. Senate.**
Whether it’s a vote to protect our democracy or a vote against the GOP’s national abortion ban, we need his help to get things done for working people in Georgia, in PA + across the entire country.
**[Will you rush an emergency donation of any amount to Sen. Warnock’s campaign right now? This could be our last chance to save + expand our Democratic Senate majority.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20221112-1?refcode=em20221112-8129&refcode2=8129_434096_TY57VJ&akid=8129%2E434096%2ETY57VJ)**
Thanks for always standing with me, Derek.
– John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania
U.S. Senator-Elect from Pennsylvania

[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
---|---|---
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8129%2E434096%2ETY57VJ)

| | Dear , This message was posted on Facebook but for those of you who have not seen it we are sending it via email. Thank you! When I entered public service in 2000 as a local planning board member, I did so to give back to the community and to make a difference by sharing my background with the voters. Since then, I have been blessed to have the opportunity to serve on two levels of government as an elected official and be able to help so many people. Only in this great country, that a refugee toddler from a third-world country and Communist government, can grow up and run for the United States Congress. Serving and working for the people have been a passion of mine to give back to the country that has given me so much. The good people of this state have given me more than I could ever ask for and along the way, made history. This is the greatest country in the world and the land of opportunities and freedom. Anyone can make a difference. I have and will continue to work to help in any way I see possible. I have learned that politics has a dark side and can be very dirty and brutal. I am extremely grateful to my family, friends, supporters, and all the voters who encouraged and voted for me during this journey. I sincerely and personally thank you all very much. May God bless you, the Commonwealth of Massachusetts, and the greatest nation on earth. Onward and forward with pride, determination, and strength. THANK YOU!
---
| | |
---
| | | **Thank you!**
---
| | | |
---
---

clean_body: | | | | | | | | ~ | | Dear , This message was posted on Facebook but for those of you who have not seen it we are sending it via email. Thank you! When I entered public service in 2000 as a local planning board member, I did so to give back to the community and to make a difference by sharing my background with the voters. Since then, I have been blessed to have the opportunity to serve on two levels of government as an elected official and be able to help so many people. Only in this great country, that a refugee toddler from a third-world country and Communist government, can grow up and run for the United States Congress. Serving and working for the people have been a passion of mine to give back to the country that has given me so much. The good people of this state have given me more than I could ever ask for and along the way, made history. This is the greatest country in the world and the land of opportunities and freedom. Anyone can make a difference. I have and will continue to work to help in any way I see possible. I have learned that politics has a dark side and can be very dirty and brutal. I am extremely grateful to my family, friends, supporters, and all the voters who encouraged and voted for me during this journey. I sincerely and personally thank you all very much. May God bless you, the Commonwealth of Massachusetts, and the greatest nation on earth. Onward and forward with pride, determination, and strength. THANK YOU! | | | | | | Thank you! | | | | | | | | ~ | | Paid for by Dean Tran for Congress No longer want to receive these emails? . Dean Tran for Congress PO Box 824 Fitchburg, MA 01420

You might not know this about me, but I have 11 brothers and sisters and grew up in public housing. Our family was short on money, but we were long on love and faith.

My journey – from Kayton Homes to the U.S. Senate – is only possible in America. It's why I'm so determined to win this runoff election and keep fighting for every child to achieve their American dream.
**But I need your help to keep it up:** GOP donors have poured more than $37 million into Herschel Walker's campaign to defeat me. **Now, with just 24 days left to win this runoff, we are in an incredibly tight race.**
**We urgently need to fight back, but I'm falling short of our midnight fundraising deadline.[So please, friend, will you chip in $5 to help me reach Georgia voters and keep this seat blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54525902/378825326/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5061-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwN2QyM2I2Zi1mMzYyLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kFi-PhUlt8Y0ukQVjTiC9p3rQ2IANeWvjYsqm-dzYes=)**

| | | **_GEORGIA HAS OFFICIALLY GONE INTO A RUNOFF SENATE ELECTION!_**

name: Herschel Walker
subject: I can’t win without you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857134:JUhfCLGCN:m:1:3371220873:51337B3E9FE97AC94861C6D613719B2E:r)

---
Peter - _brace yourself._

**This Georgia Senate race is far from over.**

Raphael Warnock still has MILLIONS in the bank to reach voters in the runoff election, so he hit the ground running the morning after Election Day. **However, my campaign is running on empty.**

The only way we can WIN THIS RACE is by building up our advertising budget ASAP.

[** SEND IN REINFORCEMENTS ASAP -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857134:JUhfCLGCN:m:1:3371220873:51337B3E9FE97AC94861C6D613719B2E:r)
This race is critical not only to Georgia but the ENTIRE COUNTRY. Every liberal in the nation - from Hollywood to the Big Apple - will be closely watching this race, so we must be prepared to fight off tens of millions of dollars of false and misleading attack ads. **[Simply put, I can't win without your immediate help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857134:JUhfCLGCN:m:1:3371220873:51337B3E9FE97AC94861C6D613719B2E:r)**

I knew this was never going to be an easy fight, so I have always been IN IT to WIN IT. Please, rush in your support to help refill our ad budget so we can get back on the air ASAP. **[I can't win without your help, Peter.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857134:JUhfCLGCN:m:1:3371220873:51337B3E9FE97AC94861C6D613719B2E:r)**

Control of the U.S. Senate likely comes down to the Georgia runoff on December 6th, so every hour is critical. Please stand with me.

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857134:JUhfCLGCN:m:1:3371220873:51337B3E9FE97AC94861C6D613719B2E:r)

Herschel Walker

[** Donate Today -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857134:JUhfCLGCN:m:1:3371220873:51337B3E9FE97AC94861C6D613719B2E:r)

name: Rev. Warnock
subject: we shocked the pundits and the naysayers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
| | |
---
Hey friend – I can’t believe how far we’ve come together.
Just last year, we shocked all the pundits and naysayers when we flipped Georgia blue and took back the Senate for Democrats. **And I can honestly say, none of the progress we've made since would have been possible without you, friend.**
**Together,** we shocked the pundits and the naysayers by flipping Georgia and the Senate blue last year.

**Together** , we built a massive multiracial coalition of conscience – that is determined to create a better, brighter future for all.

**And together, we will prevail in our critical fights for justice to win this race and continue making progress for our nation.**
But here’s the thing: Experts at _Politico_ say that winning this race will all come down whether or not we raise enough resources. With GOP donors flooding Herschel Walker's campaign with over $37 million to defeat us, I need an immediate surge of grassroots support to fight back and win.
**That’s why, with only 24 days left in this runoff, I hope you'll stand together with me one more time to help us raise the funds we need to power this campaign to victory.[So please friend, can I count on your contribution of $5 today to help us defeat Herschel Walker, win this race, and keep Georgia blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54526134/378826391/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5060-fr-nd&recurring=0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDk5ZWEzMS0wNDYzLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BZG79HiwZNH1fIGSnABvrEh7kXwB2I8hyxYMPC661Kg=)**

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Running on empty
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857161:6Fe_uLGNm:m:1:3374012347:FD1B098D9DA17C4F2798DA8F4ED4A549:r)

---
Peter - _brace yourself._

**This Georgia Senate race is far from over.**

Raphael Warnock still has MILLIONS in the bank to reach voters in the runoff election, so he hit the ground running the morning after Election Day. **However, my campaign is running on empty.**

The only way we can WIN THIS RACE is by building up our advertising budget ASAP.

[** SEND IN REINFORCEMENTS ASAP -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857161:6Fe_uLGNm:m:1:3374012347:FD1B098D9DA17C4F2798DA8F4ED4A549:r)
This race is critical not only to Georgia but the ENTIRE COUNTRY. Every liberal in the nation - from Hollywood to the Big Apple - will be closely watching this race, so we must be prepared to fight off tens of millions of dollars of false and misleading attack ads. **[Simply put, I can't win without your immediate help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857161:6Fe_uLGNm:m:1:3374012347:FD1B098D9DA17C4F2798DA8F4ED4A549:r)**

I knew this was never going to be an easy fight, so I have always been IN IT to WIN IT. Please, rush in your support to help refill our ad budget so we can get back on the air ASAP. **[I can't win without your help, Peter.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857161:6Fe_uLGNm:m:1:3374012347:FD1B098D9DA17C4F2798DA8F4ED4A549:r)**

Control of the U.S. Senate likely comes down to the Georgia runoff on December 6th, so every hour is critical. Please stand with me.

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857161:6Fe_uLGNm:m:1:3374012347:FD1B098D9DA17C4F2798DA8F4ED4A549:r)

Herschel Walker

[** Donate Today -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857161:6Fe_uLGNm:m:1:3374012347:FD1B098D9DA17C4F2798DA8F4ED4A549:r)

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857162:6Fe_uLGNm:m:1:3374012347:FD1B098D9DA17C4F2798DA8F4ED4A549:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857163:6Fe_uLGNm:m:1:3374012347:FD1B098D9DA17C4F2798DA8F4ED4A549:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857164:6Fe_uLGNm:m:1:3374012347:FD1B098D9DA17C4F2798DA8F4ED4A549:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857165:6Fe_uLGNm:m:1:3374012347:FD1B098D9DA17C4F2798DA8F4ED4A549:r)

name: Herschel Walker
subject: CONFIRMED: We’re going to a runoff
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
If you want to flip the Senate, this is our last and best chance. |
---
Peter,

**I didn't get in this Senate race to lose.**

Even after being outspent $101 million to $32 million in the general election, we still almost beat an incumbent senator in a battleground state. But since no candidate received a majority of the vote on Tuesday, we now will have a runoff election in 24 days.

[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=1aa6a7123b7e4cf299f60351a8e86dbb&_e=Pz4Kx9ZUQqZS2IUg4jijXPL7rLHv6xO-7DQAv6_AVD0ndYIC1kqNyayq4tbKudf0UAucLgEPfR-Oz8g-zxZblD9ETjhgOSP1UMd4vNWQ3Fnvc0mC1ykIjRq1226b4jck1TxDUEFD7rhVFW3E_Cld4QIEIMs1dc61p2TcQqtjgWN1K0ygV6Yxbx2z9Y6K19pHjyxoX03-5CcVk7mII8Ps7ti1yQy6LYo_9oZH6RZdqbeQvYBzcqbcbRZeUwrl3oyl8EDX7YS6LpIL_yMqgk4XmldGz95BNNigfqiK7tpT4EYrRSb0soA84p1gwGp2osxzaGb2PvV5Z-8hD3J49IRIDQErfjUJXyPwCLchlErW8KYuhmXTyvDdUicdtW_V7xXmPZPVw7IesIso6ggsWS7ezFxS6t_JRB4OXsFSbI3aMZFbQgDhJatSgdCGfmHaGkAWuBSkhfgaAmye_LuKNUeXGg%3D%3D)
**If you want to flip the Senate, Georgia is our last and best chance.** Will you step up to help us get the job done? **[I humbly ask that you chip in $5 or more to help us refill our depleted campaign account.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=1aa6a7123b7e4cf299f60351a8e86dbb&_e=Pz4Kx9ZUQqZS2IUg4jijXPL7rLHv6xO-7DQAv6_AVD0ndYIC1kqNyayq4tbKudf0UAucLgEPfR-Oz8g-zxZblD9ETjhgOSP1UMd4vNWQ3Fnvc0mC1ykIjRq1226b4jck1TxDUEFD7rhVFW3E_Cld4QIEIMs1dc61p2TcQqtjgWN1K0ygV6Yxbx2z9Y6K19pHjyxoX03-5CcVk7mII8Ps7ti1yQy6LYo_9oZH6RZdqbeQvYBzcqbcbRZeUwrl3oyl8EDX7YS6LpIL_yMqgk4XmldGz95BNNigfqiK7tpT4EYrRSb0soA84p1gwGp2osxz9aGti2yYWfqdCRmhVwn1zxl6G48FTfu-d0F-h9HAZDo4kIStM6-6i-M_-6KIdZzr9azEWIJmr6d22Tja6VR8RiFjwMopjxs5cdg4vjIydD2xiN585zyghoNO14XxVWTOvGEkqzypqpCSuejUuujpqw%3D%3D)**

[** CHIP IN $5 ->**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=1aa6a7123b7e4cf299f60351a8e86dbb&_e=Pz4Kx9ZUQqZS2IUg4jijXPL7rLHv6xO-7DQAv6_AVD0ndYIC1kqNyayq4tbKudf0UAucLgEPfR-Oz8g-zxZblD9ETjhgOSP1UMd4vNWQ3Fnvc0mC1ykIjRq1226b4jck1TxDUEFD7rhVFW3E_Cld4QIEIMs1dc61p2TcQqtjgWN1K0ygV6Yxbx2z9Y6K19pHjyxoX03-5CcVk7mII8Ps7ti1yQy6LYo_9oZH6RZdqbeQvYBzcqbcbRZeUwrl3oyl8EDX7YS6LpIL_yMqgk4XmldGz95BNNigfqiK7tpT4EZ79mBCa6QgzOUoJxiFg_1hTkbkBT0VWJb5L5der-iE5XRYBnUR2BHnq5tpQoWT2dzD_Geq5s5qgfhuIQ8h9dmYvcKCRmdvgyMUetDYSSlFTGyks8e9SsOgpVESMU6QdSBPsBtRqSmKwMs4mhTShwj3es8o-iZLv81XIHgoIif5H33kjJ5mGpcbN3lvKjraG9U%3D)
The vote on Tuesday was CLOSE. Just 0.9% separated Raphael Warnock and me. We anticipate the runoff will be incredibly close too, **[so your donation could, quite literally, determine the outcome of this race.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=1aa6a7123b7e4cf299f60351a8e86dbb&_e=Pz4Kx9ZUQqZS2IUg4jijXPL7rLHv6xO-7DQAv6_AVD0ndYIC1kqNyayq4tbKudf0UAucLgEPfR-Oz8g-zxZblD9ETjhgOSP1UMd4vNWQ3Fnvc0mC1ykIjRq1226b4jck1TxDUEFD7rhVFW3E_Cld4QIEIMs1dc61p2TcQqtjgWN1K0ygV6Yxbx2z9Y6K19pHjyxoX03-5CcVk7mII8Ps7ti1yQy6LYo_9oZH6RZdqbeQvYBzcqbcbRZeUwrl3oyl8EDX7YS6LpIL_yMqgk4XmldGz95BNNigfqiK7tpT4EYrRSb0soA84p1gwGp2osxz_k_mdGmiZu__TkBOC3U9rUpVrbOXwBSqLTSlofzoFLA8MMcBUEMqOJju9MTdD4kskxRwoqG7iDAp40bYH83XOLwjnF2YhdUDmYlzzd1T01d6b-jdwWWCMPiBxTwwO_YLGWbIwj6lwuGv5s0_ZoR9tw%3D%3D)**

clean_body: If you want to flip the Senate, this is our last and best chance. | Peter, I didn't get in this Senate race to lose. Even after being outspent $101 million to $32 million in the general election, we still almost beat an incumbent senator in a battleground state. But since no candidate received a majority of the vote on Tuesday, we now will have a runoff election in 24 days. If you want to flip the Senate, Georgia is our last and best chance. Will you step up to help us get the job done? The vote on Tuesday was CLOSE. Just 0.9% separated Raphael Warnock and me. We anticipate the runoff will be incredibly close too, Thanks for standing with me and helping us win control of the U.S. Senate! Still in the fight, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: Herschel Walker
subject: I know you’re tired
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858421:JjUClLGNS:m:1:3331421248:5330F5AAD99B7550A8BAEA7EE518030C:r)

---
Peter - We always knew this Senate race would be a battle.

Being outspent by 300% had a significant impact on the Election Day outcome. Over the next 22 days of this runoff in Georgia, we cannot afford to be outraised and outspent like that again. We must redouble our efforts to win the final round of this race.

I need you to rush an emergency contribution to our campaign today so we can launch our ads immediately. **[Can I count on you to chip in $25, $30, or even $50 to help us?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858421:JjUClLGNS:m:1:3331421248:5330F5AAD99B7550A8BAEA7EE518030C:r)**

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[**CHIP IN $25 ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858422:JjUClLGNS:m:1:3331421248:5330F5AAD99B7550A8BAEA7EE518030C:r)
[**CHIP IN $30 ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858423:JjUClLGNS:m:1:3331421248:5330F5AAD99B7550A8BAEA7EE518030C:r)
[**CHIP IN $50 ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858424:JjUClLGNS:m:1:3331421248:5330F5AAD99B7550A8BAEA7EE518030C:r)
_**If you donated in the General Election, thank you Peter.**_

Now that we're in OVERTIME, I need your help again. **[I'm humbly asking you to make another donation to help us flip this seat.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858421:JjUClLGNS:m:1:3331421248:5330F5AAD99B7550A8BAEA7EE518030C:r)**

While the stakes are even higher now with control of the Senate possibly on the line, the fundamentals of this race have not changed.

1. I'm still running against the #1 fundraiser in the Senate, who is the most vulnerable Democrat incumbent.
2. We have millions of eligible voters who we need to get back to the polls in the middle of the holiday season next month.
3. The Democrats spent over $70 million in false and misleading attack ads in the general election, so the barrage is only going to get worse now that the stakes are higher.

I know you're tired of fundraising emails, but we've come too far to lose sight of the finish line. **[Please, can I count on your support?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858421:JjUClLGNS:m:1:3331421248:5330F5AAD99B7550A8BAEA7EE518030C:r)**

Together we'll get this done. I need to know you're still with me.

In the fight,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858421:JjUClLGNS:m:1:3331421248:5330F5AAD99B7550A8BAEA7EE518030C:r)

Herschel Walker

[** Donate Today -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858421:JjUClLGNS:m:1:3331421248:5330F5AAD99B7550A8BAEA7EE518030C:r)

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858425:JjUClLGNS:m:1:3331421248:5330F5AAD99B7550A8BAEA7EE518030C:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858426:JjUClLGNS:m:1:3331421248:5330F5AAD99B7550A8BAEA7EE518030C:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858427:JjUClLGNS:m:1:3331421248:5330F5AAD99B7550A8BAEA7EE518030C:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858428:JjUClLGNS:m:1:3331421248:5330F5AAD99B7550A8BAEA7EE518030C:r)

---
Peter - We always knew this Senate race would be a battle.

Being outspent by 300% had a significant impact on the Election Day outcome. Over the next 22 days of this runoff in Georgia, we cannot afford to be outraised and outspent like that again. We must redouble our efforts to win the final round of this race.

I need you to rush an emergency contribution to our campaign today so we can launch our ads immediately. **[Can I count on you to chip in $25, $30, or even $50 to help us?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858438:JmIwlLG3N:m:1:3317145305:839076F742E62B770CEA8405B5709AED:r)**

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[**CHIP IN $25 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858439:JmIwlLG3N:m:1:3317145305:839076F742E62B770CEA8405B5709AED:r)
[**CHIP IN $30 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858440:JmIwlLG3N:m:1:3317145305:839076F742E62B770CEA8405B5709AED:r)
[**CHIP IN $50 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858441:JmIwlLG3N:m:1:3317145305:839076F742E62B770CEA8405B5709AED:r)
_**If you donated in the General Election, thank you Peter.**_

Now that we're in OVERTIME, I need your help again. **[I'm humbly asking you to make another donation to help us flip this seat.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858438:JmIwlLG3N:m:1:3317145305:839076F742E62B770CEA8405B5709AED:r)**

While the stakes are even higher now with control of the Senate possibly on the line, the fundamentals of this race have not changed.

1. I'm still running against the #1 fundraiser in the Senate, who is the most vulnerable Democrat incumbent.
2. We have millions of eligible voters who we need to get back to the polls in the middle of the holiday season next month.
3. The Democrats spent over $70 million in false and misleading attack ads in the general election, so the barrage is only going to get worse now that the stakes are higher.

I know you're tired of fundraising emails, but we've come too far to lose sight of the finish line. **[Please, can I count on your support?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858438:JmIwlLG3N:m:1:3317145305:839076F742E62B770CEA8405B5709AED:r)**

Together we'll get this done. I need to know you're still with me.

In the fight,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858438:JmIwlLG3N:m:1:3317145305:839076F742E62B770CEA8405B5709AED:r)

Herschel Walker

name: Mike Pompeo
subject: Let’s Put God First
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
| |
---
| | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61859126:6mo3lLGN4:m:1:3253819041:CD1ABD63226EF0C67E7F14143C896D82:r)
---

Despite the huge victories during the recent elections, we cannot just stop working on the things that really matter.

_**Our nation must renew its commitment to faith.**_

This nation was founded on Judeo-Christian principles and by God-fearing leaders. They knew that when we put God first, America prospers.

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61859126:6mo3lLGN4:m:1:3253819041:CD1ABD63226EF0C67E7F14143C896D82:r)
---

Today, our nation is at a crossroads. We can continue down the path of amoral materialism and transactional politics, or we can restore the faith-based leadership our founders championed.

**I want to be clear: faith -_and faith alone_ \- can bring America to salvation. **

---
| | [RESTORE FAITH-DRIVEN LEADERSHIP](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61859126:6mo3lLGN4:m:1:3253819041:CD1ABD63226EF0C67E7F14143C896D82:r)
---

If you agree, _**[please consider making a donation today](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61859126:6mo3lLGN4:m:1:3253819041:CD1ABD63226EF0C67E7F14143C896D82:r "please consider
making a donation today")**_ to help restore faith-driven leadership to our nation.

I believe that if our leaders at the local, state, and federal levels were motivated by their devotion to God and their love of country, that America will rise to new heights.

The vision of the founders can still be restored.

God Bless,

---
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61859126:6mo3lLGN4:m:1:3253819041:CD1ABD63226EF0C67E7F14143C896D82:r)
---

Mike Pompeo

Peter - We always knew this Senate race would be a battle.

Being outspent by 300% had a significant impact on the Election Day outcome. Over the next 22 days of this runoff in Georgia, we cannot afford to be outraised and outspent like that again. We must redouble our efforts to win the final round of this race.

I need you to rush an emergency contribution to our campaign today so we can launch our ads immediately. **[Can I count on you to chip in $25, $30, or even $50 to help us?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857209:JfORlLGyN:m:1:3373497171:6D167FA0D24470539E4D8E43AAF8B95E:r)**

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[**CHIP IN $25 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857210:JfORlLGyN:m:1:3373497171:6D167FA0D24470539E4D8E43AAF8B95E:r)
[**CHIP IN $30 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857211:JfORlLGyN:m:1:3373497171:6D167FA0D24470539E4D8E43AAF8B95E:r)
[**CHIP IN $50 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857212:JfORlLGyN:m:1:3373497171:6D167FA0D24470539E4D8E43AAF8B95E:r)
_**If you donated in the General Election, thank you Peter.**_

Now that we're in OVERTIME, I need your help again. **[I'm humbly asking you to make another donation to help us flip this seat.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857209:JfORlLGyN:m:1:3373497171:6D167FA0D24470539E4D8E43AAF8B95E:r)**

While the stakes are even higher now with control of the Senate possibly on the line, the fundamentals of this race have not changed.

1. I'm still running against the #1 fundraiser in the Senate, who is the most vulnerable Democrat incumbent.
2. We have millions of eligible voters who we need to get back to the polls in the middle of the holiday season next month.
3. The Democrats spent over $70 million in false and misleading attack ads in the general election, so the barrage is only going to get worse now that the stakes are higher.

I know you're tired of fundraising emails, but we've come too far to lose sight of the finish line. **[Please, can I count on your support?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857209:JfORlLGyN:m:1:3373497171:6D167FA0D24470539E4D8E43AAF8B95E:r)**

Together we'll get this done. I need to know you're still with me.

In the fight,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857209:JfORlLGyN:m:1:3373497171:6D167FA0D24470539E4D8E43AAF8B95E:r)

Herschel Walker

name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: Why I created the BLEXIT Foundation
body:
This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zc3jbud9dfonj6a6av6c6ubk1ctl1pkgmp7di77o_rp22sh2s8i66or0spj61p32c1h2bs)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation 's mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zas08p9g9tth53vsr42rom3oj863n9imok0lhojg_rp22sh2s8i66or0spj61p32c1h2bs)

**_Now I 'll share my story_... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I've dealt with racism... _**I 've even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgrvd52apgov8qaq0tvel64ok2oqbp72e30lbjno_rp22sh2s8i66or0spj61p32c1h2bs)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I 'm not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT 's efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zncc5mdkfqgp1v9dpgjgbaudmji7po684ol0p9qg_rp22sh2s8i66or0spj61p32c1h2bs)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ze6qmvokh1unirc43of1enakmpt4mh4oq6s6mcrg_rp22sh2s8i66or0spj61p32c1h2bs)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ziqncfa4j3rvs12nlt4igmb41focreq17en5oo2g_rp22sh2s8i66or0spj61p32c1h2bs)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z26ml5pq82c75noqcjbvv1p4vp8mjpv8jqta5i6o_rp22sh2s8i66or0spj61p32c1h2bs)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT 's events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zq75d3dnb2782ehdaf3j68tprh3j4705an4eak38_rp22sh2s8i66or0spj61p32c1h2bs)

What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6ovaf0j1ln6oqgvau7u8hmjc6p9e1foe9fo8dto_rp22sh2s8i66or0spj61p32c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpp8cungg0uvs23lof95k14np9j599jtr4aa9g38_rp22sh2s8i66or0spj61p32c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmtaqobgjvhps8pbcqa8urt9lfe2p4f5kshpipuo_rp22sh2s8i66or0spj61p32c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjill51fldllb6qgrnsk74l3n8alf1spnb379k78_rp22sh2s8i66or0spj61p32c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkl42eccppdrnijnjn33khg3u2u4c2qutjoa2e4g_rp22sh2s8i66or0spj61p32c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z72nui2h8d5aandd5511ri6gkobean0pn4s27hlg_rp22sh2s8i66or0spj61p32c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdsbq42886qj31526pv6urnsn7k25h0ieddqod48_rp22sh2s8i66or0spj61p32c1h2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zcc8lc09lsbkftq4ngiahgijmq9nb9o666eq9svg_rp22sh2s8i66or0spj61p32c1h2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zupnm7rcb8g4k37sp90vh0fj0macvbgoas2147t8_rp22sh2s8i66or0spj61p32c1h2bs)

This is my last message to you before you close this email.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment.

My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause.

[_**Please consider making the most generous donation you can today by clicking here.**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zoa5bp06am3p8600vdd0p6pp0q9vn5btt15uql8o_rp22sh2s8i66or0spj61p32c1h2bs)

Thank you, Friend.

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztbaasb1ntih7f997n9ulr310kv0okl1drrhqivo_rp22sh2s8i66or0spj61p32c1h238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Georgia outcome
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857550:6fyJ2LGWN:m:1:3370555685:CF1657B1F85C94A08BC3D151E9FC6F98:r)

---
Peter - We always knew this Senate race would be a battle.

Being outspent by 300% had a significant impact on the Election Day outcome. Over the next 22 days of this runoff in Georgia, we cannot afford to be outraised and outspent like that again. We must redouble our efforts to win the final round of this race.

I need you to rush an emergency contribution to our campaign today so we can launch our ads immediately. **[Can I count on you to chip in $25, $30, or even $50 to help us?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857550:6fyJ2LGWN:m:1:3370555685:CF1657B1F85C94A08BC3D151E9FC6F98:r)**

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[**CHIP IN $25 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857551:6fyJ2LGWN:m:1:3370555685:CF1657B1F85C94A08BC3D151E9FC6F98:r)
[**CHIP IN $30 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857552:6fyJ2LGWN:m:1:3370555685:CF1657B1F85C94A08BC3D151E9FC6F98:r)
[**CHIP IN $50 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857553:6fyJ2LGWN:m:1:3370555685:CF1657B1F85C94A08BC3D151E9FC6F98:r)
_**If you donated in the General Election, thank you Peter.**_

Now that we're in OVERTIME, I need your help again. **[I'm humbly asking you to make another donation to help us flip this seat.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857550:6fyJ2LGWN:m:1:3370555685:CF1657B1F85C94A08BC3D151E9FC6F98:r)**

While the stakes are even higher now with control of the Senate possibly on the line, the fundamentals of this race have not changed.

1. I'm still running against the #1 fundraiser in the Senate, who is the most vulnerable Democrat incumbent.
2. We have millions of eligible voters who we need to get back to the polls in the middle of the holiday season next month.
3. The Democrats spent over $70 million in false and misleading attack ads in the general election, so the barrage is only going to get worse now that the stakes are higher.

I know you're tired of fundraising emails, but we've come too far to lose sight of the finish line. **[Please, can I count on your support?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857550:6fyJ2LGWN:m:1:3370555685:CF1657B1F85C94A08BC3D151E9FC6F98:r)**

Together we'll get this done. I need to know you're still with me.

In the fight,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857550:6fyJ2LGWN:m:1:3370555685:CF1657B1F85C94A08BC3D151E9FC6F98:r)

Herschel Walker

[** Donate Today -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857550:6fyJ2LGWN:m:1:3370555685:CF1657B1F85C94A08BC3D151E9FC6F98:r)

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857554:6fyJ2LGWN:m:1:3370555685:CF1657B1F85C94A08BC3D151E9FC6F98:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857555:6fyJ2LGWN:m:1:3370555685:CF1657B1F85C94A08BC3D151E9FC6F98:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857556:6fyJ2LGWN:m:1:3370555685:CF1657B1F85C94A08BC3D151E9FC6F98:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857557:6fyJ2LGWN:m:1:3370555685:CF1657B1F85C94A08BC3D151E9FC6F98:r)

Dear Patriot, Below is an important sponsored message for your consideration. Messages like these enable us to continue bringing you the latest news at no cost. Courtesy of Right Wing Report
* * *
|
# Outrage Over Survival Food
Food prices have skyrocketed, and according to leading industry sources, grocery stores across the United States are worried about food shortages. Experts say more grocery hoarding may come as disruptions push America's food supply "near its breaking point". **As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever.** If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like...
* Getting MREs with a 5-year shelf life - depending on where you purchase them from they could be near expired...
* Getting gross survival foods that are tough to stomach and so high in salt, MSG and preservatives you could clog your arteries and get yourself sick...
* Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished...

Well, no need to worry anymore. Obviously, waiting for the government to give me a handout in a disaster just wasn't an option for me. And I was completely turned off by the crazy high cost of survival food sold by some companies. That's why I ordered and got my very own stockpile of the best-selling [**4Patriots Survival Food Kits**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61098511:sHXa8sDNR:m:1:2570829362:56FD92AC461CF3D8DB6723F95E08ED0F:r). Currently 4Patriots Survival Food Kits are flying off the shelves because:
* **4Patriots Survival Food Kits are a tremendous value.** This is _not_ ordinary food. This is delicious, nutritious, good-for-25-years super survival food that helps keep you from going hungry in a crisis. This is high-quality survival food without gross fillers or weird "frankenfood" that the other guys use to pad their survival meals. They are handpacked right in a family-owned facility in the U.S.A. and you won't believe how inexpensive these kits are.
* There's no fancy packaging, it's sturdy, triple-layer stuff and can stand up to most of the crazy things that happen in a crisis. This food **is designed to last for 25 years** , so you have complete peace of mind for the long term. And they're using compact kits so you can store them anywhere in your house without any extra hassle. They're sturdy, water-resistant and stack easily. And extremely covert too.
* You can make these meals in less than 20 minutes. Just add boiling water, simmer, and serve.
* **Customers rave about the delicious flavor of this food - it doesn't taste like "survival food."** And you get a whole slew of choices for breakfast, lunch and dinner so you don't get stuck eating the same thing day-in and day-out.

# These Survival Food Kits Are
Famous for Selling Out...
Now They're Back in Stock!

That's extra meals (on the house), grab-and-go portability and a way to get through a short-term crisis without even breaking into your stash. **People love these kits.** It's one of the top-rated items on our website. And you get... **FREE Bonus #2:** You'll get a **Victory Garden Survival Seed Vault** with thousands of non-GMO heirloom seeds inside, designed to stay fresh for years. You can harvest and replant them over and over again. **FREE Bonus #3:** You also get their **Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater.** With your Sun Kettle Personal Water Heater, you can boil water without fuel, flames, smoke or noise. Use your Sun Kettle to purify water, cook food, wash up, clean up and much more. It's like having a mini-microwave the size of a thermos. **FREE Bonus #4:** You'll also get an **Exclusive Ultimate Survival Digital Library.** With these 4 digital books, you'll have the information and tips to help you prepare for an emergency. Together, these digital books are valued at $20, but they're yours free as a thank you for your order. But that's not all because you also get... **FREE Bonus #5:** You also get their **Digital Meal Planning & Recipe Guide**. Inside, you'll find easy ways to whip up delicious meals you'd be proud to serve your kids, and you'll get this brand NEW report for FREE. **FREE Bonus #6:** You also get **Freedom Joe's Survival Coffee.** Rich, aromatic coffee designed to last 25 years. Coffee is one of the most in-demand items when the "you-know-what" hits the fan. Stay alert when the going gets tough with a cup of premium survival coffee from 100% pure Arabica beans. You get 30 servings of delicious, aromatic survival coffee added to your Kit. **FREE Bonus #7:** You also get **Bugle Boy Survival Cocoa.** Warm up with each cup of chocolatey goodness that is sure to satisfy the young and the young at heart. With your Survival Cocoa Kits, you'll have the satisfying comfort of a steaming cup of cocoa when you and your loved ones need it most. You'll get 14 servings of this taste-tested hot cocoa FREE for arming yourself with survival food. But we're still not done, because you also get... **FREE Bonus #8:** You also get **$25 OFF your next purchase.** This is FREE money in the bank for you. You get $25 off any future purchase of $100 or more. Use it to get whatever you need to round out your preparedness plan... best-selling survival food, solar gadgets and so much more! It's completely up to you. That's what we call an incredible deal. But we want to sweeten the pot. So when you order your 3-Month Survival Food Kit today, you also get... **FREE Bonus #9:** **You get FREE Shipping and Handling on your entire order!** It's not cheap to ship 688 servings of food in two totes (plus all the FREE gifts you're getting). But you deserve it for becoming a loyal customer. And frankly, we want to do it for you. **[[Back In Stock!] Grab Your Food Kit& All Your FREE Gifts Now](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61098511:sHXa8sDNR:m:1:2570829362:56FD92AC461CF3D8DB6723F95E08ED0F:r)** Isn't that great? The best part is... You'll have the peace of mind and security that comes from having your very own survival food stockpile. [**You'll even get an easy, no nonsense monthly payment plan - with no interest!**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61098511:sHXa8sDNR:m:1:2570829362:56FD92AC461CF3D8DB6723F95E08ED0F:r) On great-tasting, survival food protection without the sticker shock. **Look, this food tastes homemade.** It's built to last the long haul. It's a snap to prepare. And everyone from former Navy SEALs to middle-American grandmas are singing its praises. [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61098511:sHXa8sDNR:m:1:2570829362:56FD92AC461CF3D8DB6723F95E08ED0F:r) First, you get their **no-questions-asked 365-Day Double Satisfaction Protection**. And if a crisis hits and your family asks, "What are we going to eat?" your mouth will go dry, and you'll feel powerless. But what if you decide to secure your food stockpile instead? Just [**imagine how much better you'll feel right away**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/61098511:sHXa8sDNR:m:1:2570829362:56FD92AC461CF3D8DB6723F95E08ED0F:r). When a crisis hits, you will be able to calmly reassure them that they're safe and they will have plenty to eat. Listen, I can't predict the future. I don't know exactly when or how a crisis will hit. **As it stands today, it's every man for himself.** In a crisis, the loss will be beyond what you can imagine. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to be hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Mistakes like... Or simply getting the wrong foods and leaving a critical hole in your meal plan, which means you risk becoming malnourished... Well, no need to worry anymore. |

_**THEN**_ : **Republicans were outraised and outspent & we only picked up a few House seats.**

The problem is... the Democrats have a headstart and have already raised millions to lock up this seat & cement themselves in power for generations to come.

Republicans are falling behind, and we know this race is going to come down to just a couple of votes. If we don't catch up now, _**it might be too late. **_

_**[That's why we are hoping you will chip in just a few extra bucks so that we can win this critical race and deliver Biden and Schumer a devastating loss.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zt3594io4au18n5o1594lc9f4f35pc8t9ipp4nt0_rp22sh2s8i66or0spgm4or4cph2bs "That’s why we are hoping you will chip in just a few extra bucks so that we can win this critical race and deliver Biden and Schumer a devastating loss.")**_

But we can _**ONLY**_ win if grassroots conservatives step up now:

---

---

Look, we can't lose this race. The Senate majority is on the line right NOW. If we fall behind, there won't be time to catch up. _**[Please consider contributing right now>>](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqvouqbovot6ina10sq43famdn05vfj14cucl8cg_rp22sh2s8i66or0spgm4or4cph2bs "Please consider contributing right now")**_

Thanks for your support.

name: Herschel Walker
subject: I know you’re tired
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
It’s likely Georgia may once again decide the Senate majority.
|
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z04evuhc2nbhltb5a80n6ompt2es75q0h78e4h2g_rp22sh2s8i66or0spgm4or4cph2bs)

---
Friend,

_**Here we go again.**_

The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority.

_November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted._ **However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance.**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $3 or more right now? We entered the runoff with our bank account depleted, the Democrats are pledging $7 million for voter turnout efforts alone, and the attack ads from the far-Left are going to be nasty- and non-stop.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zunlhl6p1rrmqqkdrjvb02sn06t3vjmpophkjh00_rp22sh2s8i66or0spgm4or4cph2bs) **

[** Donate $5 -> **](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2ztjdoi99pf6qur91csuobtv7qb3sg4utqq513rog_rp22sh2s8i66or0spgm4or4cph2bs)
[** Donate $15 -> **](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zc1893bt955n3t5429dftcc3da3onpo13etjvf0g_rp22sh2s8i66or0spgm4or4cph2bs)
[** Donate $34 -> **](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z536fu6cp8frcu9u8muh4vqs7qhjol89pdbpdauo_rp22sh2s8i66or0spgm4or4cph2bs)
The Libertarian candidate in our race will not proceed to the December 6th runoff, **so the 80,000+ votes he received on Tuesday are up for grabs.** This number is important because Senator Warnock and I are separated by just a little more than 40,000 votes.

The entire political world is about to descend on Georgia. Democrats are about to spend hundreds of millions to take me down, which could make this the most expensive Senate race in history. **[Can we count on your support to defeat them in 23 days?](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z9s7uc4aci221in3dviuh6dja31ke58qh97c0agg_rp22sh2s8i66or0spgm4or4cph2bs)**

**With control of the U.S. Senate likely on the line, we need your help RIGHT NOW to launch our advertising immediately.**

**[Will you stand with me?](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zb70bbb9vjjpponv8g8hfciupbu4k25qtjgk2lh8_rp22sh2s8i66or0spgm4or4cph2bs)**

Thank you,

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zmve8tav38upjeoa5o44du0iionh6j6cms7gq838_rp22sh2s8i66or0spgm4or4cph2bs)

Herschel Walker

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zo4usnf3gnphubp8e8g9bmas8pclda6eoolidokg_rp22sh2s8i66or0spgm4or4cph2bs) [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zp0viuaai80dehkbt9o0ecmbim8340gbmqko5jeg_rp22sh2s8i66or0spgm4or4cph2bs) [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zql0s6f4s8elja09c9pd5aes0g9rdahen8h16kvg_rp22sh2s8i66or0spgm4or4cph2bs) [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zv50320coc0anmsjhornthc4fmsg6409892vubso_rp22sh2s8i66or0spgm4or4cph2bs)

name: Herschel Walker
subject: I know you’re tired
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857996:6IVLVLGN5:m:1:3360412034:ECC267E9F9EE617568EC6CC1AF838F8A:r)

---
Peter - We always knew this Senate race would be a battle.

Being outspent by 300% had a significant impact on the Election Day outcome. Over the next 22 days of this runoff in Georgia, we cannot afford to be outraised and outspent like that again. We must redouble our efforts to win the final round of this race.

I need you to rush an emergency contribution to our campaign today so we can launch our ads immediately. **[Can I count on you to chip in $25, $30, or even $50 to help us?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857996:6IVLVLGN5:m:1:3360412034:ECC267E9F9EE617568EC6CC1AF838F8A:r)**

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[**CHIP IN $25 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857997:6IVLVLGN5:m:1:3360412034:ECC267E9F9EE617568EC6CC1AF838F8A:r)
[**CHIP IN $30 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857998:6IVLVLGN5:m:1:3360412034:ECC267E9F9EE617568EC6CC1AF838F8A:r)
[**CHIP IN $50 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857999:6IVLVLGN5:m:1:3360412034:ECC267E9F9EE617568EC6CC1AF838F8A:r)
_**If you donated in the General Election, thank you Peter.**_

Now that we're in OVERTIME, I need your help again. **[I'm humbly asking you to make another donation to help us flip this seat.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857996:6IVLVLGN5:m:1:3360412034:ECC267E9F9EE617568EC6CC1AF838F8A:r)**

While the stakes are even higher now with control of the Senate possibly on the line, the fundamentals of this race have not changed.

1. I'm still running against the #1 fundraiser in the Senate, who is the most vulnerable Democrat incumbent.
2. We have millions of eligible voters who we need to get back to the polls in the middle of the holiday season next month.
3. The Democrats spent over $70 million in false and misleading attack ads in the general election, so the barrage is only going to get worse now that the stakes are higher.

I know you're tired of fundraising emails, but we've come too far to lose sight of the finish line. **[Please, can I count on your support?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857996:6IVLVLGN5:m:1:3360412034:ECC267E9F9EE617568EC6CC1AF838F8A:r)**

Together we'll get this done. I need to know you're still with me.

In the fight,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857996:6IVLVLGN5:m:1:3360412034:ECC267E9F9EE617568EC6CC1AF838F8A:r)

Herschel Walker

[** Donate Today -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857996:6IVLVLGN5:m:1:3360412034:ECC267E9F9EE617568EC6CC1AF838F8A:r)

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858000:6IVLVLGN5:m:1:3360412034:ECC267E9F9EE617568EC6CC1AF838F8A:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858001:6IVLVLGN5:m:1:3360412034:ECC267E9F9EE617568EC6CC1AF838F8A:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858002:6IVLVLGN5:m:1:3360412034:ECC267E9F9EE617568EC6CC1AF838F8A:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858003:6IVLVLGN5:m:1:3360412034:ECC267E9F9EE617568EC6CC1AF838F8A:r)

name: Trump News HQ
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future.
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2za6fddboui6nlqbc3disavgo1qdbbpd7thspqv20_rp22sh2s8i66or0spgm2ob6clh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcfe06acepc1mhnvd72cf28r4trr57kgk7of7p8g_rp22sh2s8i66or0spgm2ob6clh2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z5mfp4a8anof1leu40hkvdq10orjihvs7928ohgo_rp22sh2s8i66or0spgm2ob6clh2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

Friend,

_**Here we go again.**_

The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority.

_November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted._ **However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance.**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $3 or more right now? We entered the runoff with our bank account depleted, the Democrats are pledging $7 million for voter turnout efforts alone, and the attack ads from the far-Left are going to be nasty- and non-stop.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjske8tmugdbqndg63847v6inhb62ctfkq91oubg_rp22sh2s8i66or0spgm2ob6chh2bs) **

name: Pro Life Update
subject: Victor Davis Hanson on DVD
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.
This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z19fv3pjfkdbgdt1136or6q11mnnbkpo9s3phc0o_rp22sh2s8i66or0spgm2ob2cdh2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zpqttsof6pbpvjmujvu3boq0s4v0f0sfas3ve4p8_rp22sh2s8i66or0spgm2ob2cdh2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z20es672e6992m7ftpccrldk605me2nr1j2cbhjo_rp22sh2s8i66or0spgm2ob2cdh2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College

---
| _**RUNOFF ELECTION TRIGGERED**_
**Election Day: Dec 6th**

**Herschel Walker needs your support to win the final race of 2022!**
---

I know I’ve asked a lot from you, %%First Name%%. But the 2022 election just went into overtime, and a repeat defeat simply isn’t an option.

We wanted to win this race outright. But we battled back from a double-digit deficit this summer and forced a runoff in Georgia. That’s all thanks to you.
---
| | | [CONTRIBUTE TO THE RUNOFF ACTION FUND](http://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c82868%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=V8HztmYI%2bZwqNehMyD1eZQ&sysid=1)
---
This has been a long and grueling campaign. I can’t thank you enough for sticking it out to the end. But I’m asking you to dig deep one last time and help Herschel Walker stay in this fight.

Herschel’s cash reserves are depleted, and liberal mega-donors are preparing to funnel **MILLIONS** into Raphael Warnock’s campaign fund.

**_[The only way to fight back and win this race is with your help. name: Herschel Walker
subject: I know you’re tired
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857454:6kQDGLGNT:m:1:3372944669:83D61FB603CD9470127D7A170714C66B:r)

---
Peter - We always knew this Senate race would be a battle.

Being outspent by 300% had a significant impact on the Election Day outcome. Over the next 22 days of this runoff in Georgia, we cannot afford to be outraised and outspent like that again. We must redouble our efforts to win the final round of this race.

I need you to rush an emergency contribution to our campaign today so we can launch our ads immediately. **[Can I count on you to chip in $25, $30, or even $50 to help us?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857454:6kQDGLGNT:m:1:3372944669:83D61FB603CD9470127D7A170714C66B:r)**

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[**CHIP IN $25 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857455:6kQDGLGNT:m:1:3372944669:83D61FB603CD9470127D7A170714C66B:r)
[**CHIP IN $30 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857456:6kQDGLGNT:m:1:3372944669:83D61FB603CD9470127D7A170714C66B:r)
[**CHIP IN $50 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857457:6kQDGLGNT:m:1:3372944669:83D61FB603CD9470127D7A170714C66B:r)
_**If you donated in the General Election, thank you Peter.**_

Now that we're in OVERTIME, I need your help again. **[I'm humbly asking you to make another donation to help us flip this seat.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857454:6kQDGLGNT:m:1:3372944669:83D61FB603CD9470127D7A170714C66B:r)**

While the stakes are even higher now with control of the Senate possibly on the line, the fundamentals of this race have not changed.

1. I'm still running against the #1 fundraiser in the Senate, who is the most vulnerable Democrat incumbent.
2. We have millions of eligible voters who we need to get back to the polls in the middle of the holiday season next month.
3. The Democrats spent over $70 million in false and misleading attack ads in the general election, so the barrage is only going to get worse now that the stakes are higher.

I know you're tired of fundraising emails, but we've come too far to lose sight of the finish line. **[Please, can I count on your support?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857454:6kQDGLGNT:m:1:3372944669:83D61FB603CD9470127D7A170714C66B:r)**

Together we'll get this done. I need to know you're still with me.

In the fight,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857454:6kQDGLGNT:m:1:3372944669:83D61FB603CD9470127D7A170714C66B:r)

Herschel Walker

[** Donate Today -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857454:6kQDGLGNT:m:1:3372944669:83D61FB603CD9470127D7A170714C66B:r)

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857458:6kQDGLGNT:m:1:3372944669:83D61FB603CD9470127D7A170714C66B:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857459:6kQDGLGNT:m:1:3372944669:83D61FB603CD9470127D7A170714C66B:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857460:6kQDGLGNT:m:1:3372944669:83D61FB603CD9470127D7A170714C66B:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857461:6kQDGLGNT:m:1:3372944669:83D61FB603CD9470127D7A170714C66B:r)

name: Herschel Walker
subject: OVERTIME
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks of this runoff campaign, so I need your help once again. |

---
Peter,

_**The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME.**_

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th.**

It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff.

**[I'm going to beat Senator Warnock in this runoff, but I can't do it without the help of my top supporters. Please donate $25, $50, $100, or any amount up to the limit of $2,900 to help us rebuild our campaign war chest so we can launch our advertising immediately!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857201:61TZGLG4N:m:1:3371220873:B4EB95616B8B9346B29FCE769DB3C082:r)**

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857201:61TZGLG4N:m:1:3371220873:B4EB95616B8B9346B29FCE769DB3C082:r)
[** RUSH $25 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857202:61TZGLG4N:m:1:3371220873:B4EB95616B8B9346B29FCE769DB3C082:r)
[** RUSH $50 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857203:61TZGLG4N:m:1:3371220873:B4EB95616B8B9346B29FCE769DB3C082:r)
[** RUSH $100 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857204:61TZGLG4N:m:1:3371220873:B4EB95616B8B9346B29FCE769DB3C082:r)
Despite my opponent spending over $101 MILLION in the general election, Raphael Warnock could not win the support of a majority of Georgians as an incumbent senator. It is time for a change!

Everything is at stake in this runoff election, and we don't have a moment to waste. **[Will you rush in $5 or more in the next 30 minutes?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857201:61TZGLG4N:m:1:3371220873:B4EB95616B8B9346B29FCE769DB3C082:r)**

Thanks,

clean_body: It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks of this runoff campaign, so I need your help once again. | Peter, The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME. Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th. It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again. We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff. Despite my opponent spending over $101 MILLION in the general election, Raphael Warnock could not win the support of a majority of Georgians as an incumbent senator. It is time for a change! Everything is at stake in this runoff election, and we don't have a moment to waste. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. subject: Here we go again
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
