[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857256:JbPFGLGmN:m:1:3373497171:EDB6A89A93A3B66C7A620DA71777532F:r)

---
Peter,

_**Here we go again.**_

The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority.

_November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted._ **However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance.**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $3 or more right now? We entered the runoff with our bank account depleted, the Democrats are pledging $7 million for voter turnout efforts alone, and the attack ads from the far-Left are going to be nasty- and non-stop.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857256:JbPFGLGmN:m:1:3373497171:EDB6A89A93A3B66C7A620DA71777532F:r) **

[** Donate $25 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857257:JbPFGLGmN:m:1:3373497171:EDB6A89A93A3B66C7A620DA71777532F:r)
[** Donate $35 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857258:JbPFGLGmN:m:1:3373497171:EDB6A89A93A3B66C7A620DA71777532F:r)
[** Donate $50 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857259:JbPFGLGmN:m:1:3373497171:EDB6A89A93A3B66C7A620DA71777532F:r)
The Libertarian candidate in our race will not proceed to the December 6th runoff, **so the 80,000+ votes he received on Tuesday are up for grabs.** This number is important because Senator Warnock and I are separated by just a little more than 40,000 votes.

The entire political world is about to descend on Georgia. Democrats are about to spend hundreds of millions to take me down, which could make this the most expensive Senate race in history. **[Can we count on your support to defeat them in 22 days?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857256:JbPFGLGmN:m:1:3373497171:EDB6A89A93A3B66C7A620DA71777532F:r)**

**With control of the U.S. Senate likely on the line, we need your help RIGHT NOW to launch our advertising immediately.**

**[Will you stand with me?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857256:JbPFGLGmN:m:1:3373497171:EDB6A89A93A3B66C7A620DA71777532F:r)**

Thank you,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857256:JbPFGLGmN:m:1:3373497171:EDB6A89A93A3B66C7A620DA71777532F:r)

Herschel Walker

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Georgia outcome
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858131:63_LILGqN:m:1:3350876382:E33A82FD83CD7360A462CBF669460D5C:r)

---
Peter - We always knew this Senate race would be a battle.

Being outspent by 300% had a significant impact on the Election Day outcome. Over the next 22 days of this runoff in Georgia, we cannot afford to be outraised and outspent like that again. We must redouble our efforts to win the final round of this race.

I need you to rush an emergency contribution to our campaign today so we can launch our ads immediately. **[Can I count on you to chip in $25, $30, or even $50 to help us?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858131:63_LILGqN:m:1:3350876382:E33A82FD83CD7360A462CBF669460D5C:r)**

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[**CHIP IN $25 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858132:63_LILGqN:m:1:3350876382:E33A82FD83CD7360A462CBF669460D5C:r)
[**CHIP IN $30 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858133:63_LILGqN:m:1:3350876382:E33A82FD83CD7360A462CBF669460D5C:r)
[**CHIP IN $50 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858134:63_LILGqN:m:1:3350876382:E33A82FD83CD7360A462CBF669460D5C:r)
_**If you donated in the General Election, thank you Peter.**_

Now that we're in OVERTIME, I need your help again. **[I'm humbly asking you to make another donation to help us flip this seat.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858131:63_LILGqN:m:1:3350876382:E33A82FD83CD7360A462CBF669460D5C:r)**

While the stakes are even higher now with control of the Senate possibly on the line, the fundamentals of this race have not changed.

1. I'm still running against the #1 fundraiser in the Senate, who is the most vulnerable Democrat incumbent.
2. We have millions of eligible voters who we need to get back to the polls in the middle of the holiday season next month.
3. The Democrats spent over $70 million in false and misleading attack ads in the general election, so the barrage is only going to get worse now that the stakes are higher.

I know you're tired of fundraising emails, but we've come too far to lose sight of the finish line. **[Please, can I count on your support?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858131:63_LILGqN:m:1:3350876382:E33A82FD83CD7360A462CBF669460D5C:r)**

Together we'll get this done. I need to know you're still with me.

In the fight,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858131:63_LILGqN:m:1:3350876382:E33A82FD83CD7360A462CBF669460D5C:r)

Herschel Walker

subject: Mark your calendar

body:

---
Peter - We always knew this Senate race would be a battle.

Being outspent by 300% had a significant impact on the Election Day outcome. Over the next 22 days of this runoff in Georgia, we cannot afford to be outraised and outspent like that again. We must redouble our efforts to win the final round of this race.

I need you to rush an emergency contribution to our campaign today so we can launch our ads immediately. **[Can I count on you to chip in $25, $30, or even $50 to help us?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858510:6CxMILG-N:m:1:3317145305:138E7B1F4AFD58C20019929A18CF601E:r)**

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[**CHIP IN $25 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858511:6CxMILG-N:m:1:3317145305:138E7B1F4AFD58C20019929A18CF601E:r)
[**CHIP IN $30 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858512:6CxMILG-N:m:1:3317145305:138E7B1F4AFD58C20019929A18CF601E:r)
[**CHIP IN $50 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858513:6CxMILG-N:m:1:3317145305:138E7B1F4AFD58C20019929A18CF601E:r)
_**If you donated in the General Election, thank you Peter.**_

Now that we're in OVERTIME, I need your help again. **[I'm humbly asking you to make another donation to help us flip this seat.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858510:6CxMILG-N:m:1:3317145305:138E7B1F4AFD58C20019929A18CF601E:r)**

While the stakes are even higher now with control of the Senate possibly on the line, the fundamentals of this race have not changed.

1. I'm still running against the #1 fundraiser in the Senate, who is the most vulnerable Democrat incumbent.
2. We have millions of eligible voters who we need to get back to the polls in the middle of the holiday season next month.
3. The Democrats spent over $70 million in false and misleading attack ads in the general election, so the barrage is only going to get worse now that the stakes are higher.

I know you're tired of fundraising emails, but we've come too far to lose sight of the finish line. **[Please, can I count on your support?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858510:6CxMILG-N:m:1:3317145305:138E7B1F4AFD58C20019929A18CF601E:r)**

Together we'll get this done. I need to know you're still with me.

In the fight,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858510:6CxMILG-N:m:1:3317145305:138E7B1F4AFD58C20019929A18CF601E:r)

Herschel Walker

[** Donate Today -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858510:6CxMILG-N:m:1:3317145305:138E7B1F4AFD58C20019929A18CF601E:r)

name: American Action News
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdoteatmarbouvgnp703dj549237uemjsndc59gg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2u8rmcorks3gbedj3cdrr6oj4sppr8cpkekpn2t34cmpm4cr56jieatr2cpir6ppnq9o74p1m62p6csjk65r61o5kckoe1d9hcjj6cphh6sqjcdti61j78p5jc5jr1db5e8gq48bi4bh28or3c3j62o70chh649fg)
This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z92rv230h42m1k4365b904hogsi32avueien90c0_rp22sh2s8i66or0spgm1o34c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhpf3nbgdq89arm57nfv7rbs9og6l2b2mieq0bt8_rp22sh2s8i66or0spgm1o34c9h2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z3ov81bqeuu13sk2voo9c8s71k1dbdppl84mmr0g_rp22sh2s8i66or0spgm1o34c9h2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: American Briefing
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our presi
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2ztija9k4hplqmkm7jvljllj1b46hq3rv82mg1pfo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37chieiqj6d5jmspqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65srgcpr61djjm5incshjelp39p356orr9pdgmtib2phhedp6aorjm6or4ddi6jjjfkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj32dpl6orr4c36ehib6phnm2qmash1k8gn48n24hhm6o76c5ge0p36c8iv0)
This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z77g57mlk1352flogua3l06mp0r0bmu3ducqb568_rp22sh2s8i66or0spgm1o34cph2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z5uugi5m33v32v69e9uldoiacpcpljhd4d6734og_rp22sh2s8i66or0spgm1o34cph2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zu4hmv780pgqhajgd55uh7s743ckojfjs9r34s30_rp22sh2s8i66or0spgm1o34cph2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

body:

---
Peter - _brace yourself._

**This Georgia Senate race is far from over.**

Raphael Warnock still has MILLIONS in the bank to reach voters in the runoff election, so he hit the ground running the morning after Election Day. **However, my campaign is running on empty.**

The only way we can WIN THIS RACE is by building up our advertising budget ASAP.

[** SEND IN REINFORCEMENTS ASAP -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857175:6esFILGQN:m:1:3374012347:E3F09C5B474A1A67A93C037E7DF4BF60:r)
This race is critical not only to Georgia but the ENTIRE COUNTRY. Every liberal in the nation - from Hollywood to the Big Apple - will be closely watching this race, so we must be prepared to fight off tens of millions of dollars of false and misleading attack ads. **[Simply put, I can't win without your immediate help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857175:6esFILGQN:m:1:3374012347:E3F09C5B474A1A67A93C037E7DF4BF60:r)**

I knew this was never going to be an easy fight, so I have always been IN IT to WIN IT. Please, rush in your support to help refill our ad budget so we can get back on the air ASAP. **[I can't win without your help, Peter.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857175:6esFILGQN:m:1:3374012347:E3F09C5B474A1A67A93C037E7DF4BF60:r)**

Control of the U.S. Senate likely comes down to the Georgia runoff on December 6th, so every hour is critical. Please stand with me.

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857175:6esFILGQN:m:1:3374012347:E3F09C5B474A1A67A93C037E7DF4BF60:r)

Herschel Walker

subject: Red Wave?

body:
It’s likely Georgia may once again decide the Senate majority.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zo1cog6b3hgh418fs20n81rt2l89su598l9ad8e0_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jk4qj4ttkumqn4s9nmorb79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onle3j3apjjmeoj1c5nc2o72sbh68qr0ohjc8p6ddb6c1rr6p74s5ojap9m6kor0puie1p64pjgm9j71p5jcdjr4s36e1rjbd37mpgmcd70m9j61o5lcdge1d9h66qj3dbi46h22sh2s8i66or0spgm1o34c9h2bs)

---
Friend,

_**Here we go again.**_

The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority.

_November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted._ **However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance.**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $3 or more right now? We entered the runoff with our bank account depleted, the Democrats are pledging $7 million for voter turnout efforts alone, and the attack ads from the far-Left are going to be nasty- and non-stop.](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zks0ai0tl763houaqhrumgiuenan5bl4bpqa3im8_rp22sh2s8i66or0spgm1o34c9h2bs) **

[** Donate $5 -> **](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zsotjv2lqa6vc1ob1ke0lnbb79be8rfb3sou2rd0_rp22sh2s8i66or0spgm1o34c9h2bs)
[** Donate $15 -> **](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zi0nvqjf0anvst1n6gjrbtcvtosv40tmnlaqhej0_rp22sh2s8i66or0spgm1o34c9h2bs)
[** Donate $34 -> **](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zo8cdb3n4os62qjhems6so9dru3u4b3q784qj4d8_rp22sh2s8i66or0spgm1o34c9h2bs)
The Libertarian candidate in our race will not proceed to the December 6th runoff, **so the 80,000+ votes he received on Tuesday are up for grabs.** This number is important because Senator Warnock and I are separated by just a little more than 40,000 votes.

The entire political world is about to descend on Georgia. Democrats are about to spend hundreds of millions to take me down, which could make this the most expensive Senate race in history. **[Can we count on your support to defeat them in 23 days?](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zddt16ah0pm7b8lhc2817uvr5o7egibgopio4lko_rp22sh2s8i66or0spgm1o34c9h2bs)**

**With control of the U.S. Senate likely on the line, we need your help RIGHT NOW to launch our advertising immediately.**

**[Will you stand with me?](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z1od4nn85nlqpiaub3hb48lv7r56jp80bp6426p8_rp22sh2s8i66or0spgm1o34c9h2bs)**

Thank you,

[](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zgp4gdgro9bccohtc9c1u52ctn2gbf7g8dhu9sv8_rp22sh2s8i66or0spgm1o34c9h2bs)

Herschel Walker

[** Donate Today -> **](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z9110gp9g6gnvbccrd2v1euk57ksrclnt3mhqvt8_rp22sh2s8i66or0spgm1o34c9h2bs)

subject: Mark your calendar

body:
|
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858741:6qaiwLGNX:m:1:3331421248:329A41408E0BCE95AF1E46B28005039E:r)

---
Peter - We always knew this Senate race would be a battle.

Being outspent by 300% had a significant impact on the Election Day outcome. Over the next 22 days of this runoff in Georgia, we cannot afford to be outraised and outspent like that again. We must redouble our efforts to win the final round of this race.

I need you to rush an emergency contribution to our campaign today so we can launch our ads immediately. **[Can I count on you to chip in $25, $30, or even $50 to help us?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858741:6qaiwLGNX:m:1:3331421248:329A41408E0BCE95AF1E46B28005039E:r)**

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[**CHIP IN $25 ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858742:6qaiwLGNX:m:1:3331421248:329A41408E0BCE95AF1E46B28005039E:r)
[**CHIP IN $30 ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858743:6qaiwLGNX:m:1:3331421248:329A41408E0BCE95AF1E46B28005039E:r)
[**CHIP IN $50 ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858744:6qaiwLGNX:m:1:3331421248:329A41408E0BCE95AF1E46B28005039E:r)
_**If you donated in the General Election, thank you Peter.**_

Now that we're in OVERTIME, I need your help again. **[I'm humbly asking you to make another donation to help us flip this seat.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858741:6qaiwLGNX:m:1:3331421248:329A41408E0BCE95AF1E46B28005039E:r)**

While the stakes are even higher now with control of the Senate possibly on the line, the fundamentals of this race have not changed.

1. I'm still running against the #1 fundraiser in the Senate, who is the most vulnerable Democrat incumbent.
2. We have millions of eligible voters who we need to get back to the polls in the middle of the holiday season next month.
3. The Democrats spent over $70 million in false and misleading attack ads in the general election, so the barrage is only going to get worse now that the stakes are higher.

I know you're tired of fundraising emails, but we've come too far to lose sight of the finish line. **[Please, can I count on your support?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858741:6qaiwLGNX:m:1:3331421248:329A41408E0BCE95AF1E46B28005039E:r)**

Together we'll get this done. I need to know you're still with me.

In the fight,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858741:6qaiwLGNX:m:1:3331421248:329A41408E0BCE95AF1E46B28005039E:r)

Herschel Walker

[** Donate Today -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858741:6qaiwLGNX:m:1:3331421248:329A41408E0BCE95AF1E46B28005039E:r)

I'm still running against the #1 fundraiser in the Senate, who is the most vulnerable Democrat incumbent. 2. We have millions of eligible voters who we need to get back to the polls in the middle of the holiday season next month. 3. The Democrats spent over $70 million in false and misleading attack ads in the general election, so the barrage is only going to get worse now that the stakes are higher. I know you're tired of fundraising emails, but we've come too far to lose sight of the finish line. Together we'll get this done. I need to know you're still with me. In the fight, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system July 9, 2022. subject: This race isn’t over

body:

Peter,

_**The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME.**_

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th.**

It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff.

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our presi
[View this message in your browser](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z6gff8gefrn6e5jcbjqv8o7bnlhd97mrhgqm2soo_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkhhm0o316gqb3d7jkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbqb2t5gehgmec3jc3jmaotjm9o6at9km1ijccpic6pnccr2mjjj3djmepiecdj7mv970sj46oob4pjiegonco70mhij1o5l65iecpj664rjadhge8omcc9gmdgmfc5lclp238h1e8he4933cdgecpb4cdh64oh5u)
This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zflj3rbjq4i4qr33g3736eum5i30h7pqjcid7ie8_rp22sh2s8i66or0spim8or2c9h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zejqu2l9n5ang2ah0ccp4q52oni18auarfirnpr8_rp22sh2s8i66or0spim8or2c9h2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z47kj1mn08u4i8eoefmvl9ui46ek1iopmof1qqeo_rp22sh2s8i66or0spim8or2c9h2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: American Action News
subject: What does an empowered citizen look like?
body:
I invite you to view an eight-lecture course that we prepared. It is called “American Citizenship and Its Decline,"

| | | This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zft6m6cg46ad5617ie536vptn8ajf4mlkgru032o_rp22sh2s8i66or0spim8or2c1h2bs)
---
| | Dear friend, I invite you to view an eight-lecture course that we prepared. It is called "**[American Citizenship and Its Decline](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zm6euvibmi4e7b88a8sahfpo44llur667kss6or0_rp22sh2s8i66or0spim8or2c1h2bs)** ," and the online course is based on Victor Davis Hanson's latest book, the recently released _The Dying Citizen_.

Like the book, the course describes the current crises in America as symptoms of a far larger problem: the steady decline of the autonomy and political influence of the citizen.
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z42kf2ja9rd61bs3asqhtmreqgdf8rf5lf53dal0_rp22sh2s8i66or0spim8or2c1h2bs)
---
| | The class describes the origins and history of citizenship in the West, reminding us that it is a rare phenomenon both in the past and the present--given the enormous responsibility placed on citizens to create and control their own government.

Citizenship then requires a large and self-reliant middle class--currently shrinking under enormous economic strains. Clearly defined and enforced borders are also essential to ensure a civic space in which citizens can nurture common customs, sustain traditions, and honor their own shared past.

Yet borders are now increasingly fluid as mere residence and citizenship seem often indistinguishable. Pre-civilizational tribalism--identifying by superficial appearance rather than through shared culture and values--is returning to America as so often the salad bowl replaces the melting pot.

These organic, bottom-up challenges are often matched by top-down stresses such as the growth of a huge, permanent, but unelected, government of bureaucrats and administrators who combine judicial, executive, and legislative powers that overwhelm the citizen.

In addition, revisionists in law, the media, and politics seek to change the Constitution, long-held customs of governance, and political traditions for short-term partisan agendas, on the theory that a new, changing, and fluid Constitution must match an always evolving human nature.

Globalism is an ancient challenge to the sovereignty of the nation-state. But in the age of instant communications and unprecedented concentrations of globalized wealth, so often elites seek to supplant American laws and independence with international organizations and often without the consent of the legislative branch or the assent of the governed.

The course ends, however, on an optimistic note that citizens still have it within their power to restore our traditions of empowered citizenship and return government to the control of citizens.

You can receive a DVD box set of "**American Citizenship and Its Decline** " with a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more toward Hillsdale College's Annual Fund. You can easily give and reserve your DVD box set using this secure link:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/citizenship-dvd](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z72vh79m5m2ql7dd3ejl01dfvt5km2sare6ejnso_rp22sh2s8i66or0spim8or2c1h2bs)**

Best wishes,

Kyle Murnen, '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College

clean_body: I invite you to view an eight-lecture course that we prepared. It is called “American Citizenship and Its Decline," | | | This sponsored message from American Action News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | Dear friend, I invite you to view an eight-lecture course that we prepared. It is called " ," and the online course is based on Victor Davis Hanson's latest book, the recently released The Dying Citizen. Like the book, the course describes the current crises in America as symptoms of a far larger problem: the steady decline of the autonomy and political influence of the citizen. | | | The class describes the origins and history of citizenship in the West, reminding us that it is a rare phenomenon both in the past and the present--given the enormous responsibility placed on citizens to create and control their own government. Citizenship then requires a large and self-reliant middle class--currently shrinking under enormous economic strains. Clearly defined and enforced borders are also essential to ensure a civic space in which citizens can nurture common customs, sustain traditions, and honor their own shared past. Yet borders are now increasingly fluid as mere residence and citizenship seem often indistinguishable. Pre-civilizational tribalism--identifying by superficial appearance rather than through shared culture and values--is returning to America as so often the salad bowl replaces the melting pot. These organic, bottom-up challenges are often matched by top-down stresses such as the growth of a huge, permanent, but unelected, government of bureaucrats and administrators who combine judicial, executive, and legislative powers that overwhelm the citizen. In addition, revisionists in law, the media, and politics seek to change the Constitution, long-held customs of governance, and political traditions for short-term partisan agendas, on the theory that a new, changing, and fluid Constitution must match an always evolving human nature. Globalism is an ancient challenge to the sovereignty of the nation-state. But in the age of instant communications and unprecedented concentrations of globalized wealth, so often elites seek to supplant American laws and independence with international organizations and often without the consent of the legislative branch or the assent of the governed. The course ends, however, on an optimistic note that citizens still have it within their power to restore our traditions of empowered citizenship and return government to the control of citizens. You can receive a DVD box set of "American Citizenship and Its Decline " with a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more toward Hillsdale College's Annual Fund. You can easily give and reserve your DVD box set using this secure link: Best wishes, Kyle Murnen, '09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College | | If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Action News, . 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

Friend,

_**Here we go again.**_

The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority.

_November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted._ **However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance.**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $3 or more right now? We entered the runoff with our bank account depleted, the Democrats are pledging $7 million for voter turnout efforts alone, and the attack ads from the far-Left are going to be nasty- and non-stop.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zifg5vchl8bmaomud3pvpfdadj2ra534k8jpc03g_rp22sh2s8i66or0spim8or2cph2bs) **

The Libertarian candidate in our race will not proceed to the December 6th runoff, **so the 80,000+ votes he received on Tuesday are up for grabs.** This number is important because Senator Warnock and I are separated by just a little more than 40,000 votes.

The entire political world is about to descend on Georgia. Democrats are about to spend hundreds of millions to take me down, which could make this the most expensive Senate race in history. **[Can we count on your support to defeat them in 23 days?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkmjsj84jk1aics2igvtb4r2u6pf6rcrc29doui8_rp22sh2s8i66or0spim8or2cph2bs)**

**With control of the U.S. Senate likely on the line, we need your help RIGHT NOW to launch our advertising immediately.**

**[Will you stand with me?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z08f5c1apt9hubo57vqqkblimie98b2vn89ptq0g_rp22sh2s8i66or0spim8or2cph2bs)**

Thank you,

subject: One more chance
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857636:6BIsKLGRN:m:1:3370555685:7C61EC49703F5A844A419101881C1E77:r)

---
Peter,

_**Here we go again.**_

The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority.

_November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted._ **However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance.**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $3 or more right now? We entered the runoff with our bank account depleted, the Democrats are pledging $7 million for voter turnout efforts alone, and the attack ads from the far-Left are going to be nasty- and non-stop.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857636:6BIsKLGRN:m:1:3370555685:7C61EC49703F5A844A419101881C1E77:r) **

[** Donate $25 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857637:6BIsKLGRN:m:1:3370555685:7C61EC49703F5A844A419101881C1E77:r)
[** Donate $35 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857638:6BIsKLGRN:m:1:3370555685:7C61EC49703F5A844A419101881C1E77:r)
[** Donate $50 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857639:6BIsKLGRN:m:1:3370555685:7C61EC49703F5A844A419101881C1E77:r)
The Libertarian candidate in our race will not proceed to the December 6th runoff, **so the 80,000+ votes he received on Tuesday are up for grabs.** This number is important because Senator Warnock and I are separated by just a little more than 40,000 votes.

The entire political world is about to descend on Georgia. Democrats are about to spend hundreds of millions to take me down, which could make this the most expensive Senate race in history. **[Can we count on your support to defeat them in 25 days?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857636:6BIsKLGRN:m:1:3370555685:7C61EC49703F5A844A419101881C1E77:r)**

**With control of the U.S. Senate likely on the line, we need your help RIGHT NOW to launch our advertising immediately.**

**[Will you stand with me?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857636:6BIsKLGRN:m:1:3370555685:7C61EC49703F5A844A419101881C1E77:r)**

Thank you,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857636:6BIsKLGRN:m:1:3370555685:7C61EC49703F5A844A419101881C1E77:r)

Herschel Walker

In his book, Ben Carson tackles the issue of race in America and uses his experiences growing up in the toughest parts of Detroit to help us chart a better course.

While the Radical Left continues to use race to divide and tear us apart, we know there's a better way forward that can unite our country and bring us together.

This debate is so critical to America's future, and that is why every Conservative should read his new book.

Elisa

name: Mike Pompeo
subject: Put God First
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
| |
---
| | | | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857913:6zHFKLGNY:m:1:3368395361:2CB1F3862012756C65BD7EA60EACE51E:r)
---

Despite the huge victories during the recent elections, we cannot just stop working on the things that really matter.

_**Our nation must renew its commitment to faith.**_

This nation was founded on Judeo-Christian principles and by God-fearing leaders. They knew that when we put God first, America prospers.

---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857913:6zHFKLGNY:m:1:3368395361:2CB1F3862012756C65BD7EA60EACE51E:r)
---

Today, our nation is at a crossroads. We can continue down the path of amoral materialism and transactional politics, or we can restore the faith-based leadership our founders championed.

**I want to be clear: faith -_and faith alone_ \- can bring America to salvation. **

---
| | [RESTORE FAITH-DRIVEN LEADERSHIP](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857913:6zHFKLGNY:m:1:3368395361:2CB1F3862012756C65BD7EA60EACE51E:r)
---

If you agree, _**[please consider making a donation today](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857913:6zHFKLGNY:m:1:3368395361:2CB1F3862012756C65BD7EA60EACE51E:r "please consider
making a donation today")**_ to help restore faith-driven leadership to our nation.

I believe that if our leaders at the local, state, and federal levels were motivated by their devotion to God and their love of country, that America will rise to new heights.

The vision of the founders can still be restored.

God Bless,

---
| [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857913:6zHFKLGNY:m:1:3368395361:2CB1F3862012756C65BD7EA60EACE51E:r)
---

Mike Pompeo
---
| |

Championing Our American Values")

The onslaught of dark money from the Democrats has destroyed Herschel Walker's chance of running away with this Senate race and _**forced him into a runoff with radical leftist Raphael Warnock.**_

name: Letitia James
subject: FWD: I’m still missing your response
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
[[Firstname]], I’m just making sure you saw my last message.
Peter, I’m just making sure you saw my last message.
---
When I first became your attorney general, I made it one of my top priorities to provide the people I represent with a platform where they can freely share their thoughts and concerns. I just earned a second term, and that goal remains the same.
I’m counting on you to update our record of your top priorities so I can keep your voice centered throughout my next term – but my survey closes at MIDNIGHT tonight, and I still need 525 responses before then. **So please, will you take a minute now to answer these quick questions so I can continue to fight for what matters most to you?**
Here’s the best link for the survey: **[https://surveys.signforgood.com/LJ4NY22-2022-post-elections-priorities](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54542314/378884532/1429965507?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&ask=5&code=jtk881-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MGUxYjlhNy03NDYzLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n_QyqxkmiLtZAlEj34wSZldKnbbT0QgQzSaIoFenOA4=&emci=cb378b43-4361-ed11-ade6-14cb651ee1db&emdi=70e1b9a7-7463-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=25369504)**
Thank you,
Letitia
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Letitia James**
Date: Thur, Nov 11, 2022
Subject: I need your input, Peter
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54542315/378884533/1429965507?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&ask=5&code=jtk881-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MGUxYjlhNy03NDYzLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n_QyqxkmiLtZAlEj34wSZldKnbbT0QgQzSaIoFenOA4=&emci=cb378b43-4361-ed11-ade6-14cb651ee1db&emdi=70e1b9a7-7463-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=25369504)

Peter, earlier this week, we made history.

**A little after 10 p.m. on Tuesday night, I became the first Black woman ever to win re-election as New York’s attorney general** – and it’s all because of fearless fighters like you.

Peter, together we showed the powerful and corrupt in every corner of our nation that New Yorkers will never bow, break, or be bullied. And now, as I look ahead to my next term as your attorney general, it’s time to take stock of where we are in this never-ending fight for justice and where we still have to go.

**That’s why I put together this quick priorities survey for you to fill out. As your attorney general, it’s my duty to fight for the things that matter most to the people I represent – but I don’t have your response on file yet.**
**[So please, will you take 60 seconds now to give me your input so I can continue to fight for your top priorities in my next term?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54542316/378884534/1429965507?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&ask=5&code=jtk881-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MGUxYjlhNy03NDYzLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n_QyqxkmiLtZAlEj34wSZldKnbbT0QgQzSaIoFenOA4=&emci=cb378b43-4361-ed11-ade6-14cb651ee1db&emdi=70e1b9a7-7463-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=25369504)**
| | [TAKE MY SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54542317/378884535/1429965507?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&ask=5&code=jtk881-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MGUxYjlhNy03NDYzLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n_QyqxkmiLtZAlEj34wSZldKnbbT0QgQzSaIoFenOA4=&emci=cb378b43-4361-ed11-ade6-14cb651ee1db&emdi=70e1b9a7-7463-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=25369504)
---
Here’s why your response to my priorities survey is so important: Growing up in Brooklyn in the 1960s, I didn't have much power or privilege. I received all of my education – from elementary school to college – through the New York City public school system. And, like so many New Yorkers before me, I had no real platform to speak up about the decisions that were directly affecting me and my family.

**What I’m saying is, I know what it is to feel powerless and voiceless.** And so, when I won my first term as attorney general in 2018, I vowed to fight for all New Yorkers, especially those who don’t usually feel represented – and I’m carrying that vow with me into my next term.
**So please, Peter, before my priorities survey closes at 11:59 p.m. tonight:[Will you take 60 seconds now to answer some quick questions about your top concerns and priorities? I want to ensure that I am fighting for the things that matter to you and your loved ones. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54542318/378884536/1429965507?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&amounts=5,25,50,100&ask=5&code=jtk881-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MGUxYjlhNy03NDYzLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=n_QyqxkmiLtZAlEj34wSZldKnbbT0QgQzSaIoFenOA4=&emci=cb378b43-4361-ed11-ade6-14cb651ee1db&emdi=70e1b9a7-7463-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=25369504)**

subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways.
| | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zugt8u7b7fbh8jpj2m087kn0q2go7he963ka2lj0_rp22sh2s8i66or0spim1o70c3h2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous soldiers, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled [“](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmqdqtu45tq5tceqmj0rn76a0rgepq4ck7aj0g50_rp22sh2s8i66or0spim1o70c3h2bs)**[The Second World Wars.”](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2znbiae30affcl3m27851ls87c3oktoau1jh9te9o_rp22sh2s8i66or0spim1o70c3h2bs) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
---
| [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zoegofir81mkr0cafbl9bm8l7ca0o5psuhjtjo7o_rp22sh2s8i66or0spim1o70c3h2bs)
---
| | Simply use this secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD today: _[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqf0lgadcfe1u5enmb5v9ph2qa0apdnvv1mvnjlg_rp22sh2s8i66or0spim1o70c3h2bs)_ Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---

body:

---
Peter - We always knew this Senate race would be a battle.

Being outspent by 300% had a significant impact on the Election Day outcome. Over the next 22 days of this runoff in Georgia, we cannot afford to be outraised and outspent like that again. We must redouble our efforts to win the final round of this race.

I need you to rush an emergency contribution to our campaign today so we can launch our ads immediately. **[Can I count on you to chip in $25, $30, or even $50 to help us?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858528:JegBdLGNO:m:1:3317145305:BB601916BF86A5D72F7CAF5886F58B16:r)**

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[**CHIP IN $25 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858529:JegBdLGNO:m:1:3317145305:BB601916BF86A5D72F7CAF5886F58B16:r)
[**CHIP IN $30 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858530:JegBdLGNO:m:1:3317145305:BB601916BF86A5D72F7CAF5886F58B16:r)
[**CHIP IN $50 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858531:JegBdLGNO:m:1:3317145305:BB601916BF86A5D72F7CAF5886F58B16:r)
_**If you donated in the General Election, thank you Peter.**_

Now that we're in OVERTIME, I need your help again. **[I'm humbly asking you to make another donation to help us flip this seat.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858528:JegBdLGNO:m:1:3317145305:BB601916BF86A5D72F7CAF5886F58B16:r)**

While the stakes are even higher now with control of the Senate possibly on the line, the fundamentals of this race have not changed.

1. I'm still running against the #1 fundraiser in the Senate, who is the most vulnerable Democrat incumbent.
2. We have millions of eligible voters who we need to get back to the polls in the middle of the holiday season next month.
3. The Democrats spent over $70 million in false and misleading attack ads in the general election, so the barrage is only going to get worse now that the stakes are higher.

I know you're tired of fundraising emails, but we've come too far to lose sight of the finish line. **[Please, can I count on your support?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858528:JegBdLGNO:m:1:3317145305:BB601916BF86A5D72F7CAF5886F58B16:r)**

Together we'll get this done. I need to know you're still with me.

In the fight,

Herschel Walker

body:
| | |

Hi, friend – we're officially heading to a runoff election here in Georgia!

We set a goal to raise another $100,000 by midnight – all to fight back against GOP attacks, keep our TV ads live, and mobilize voters across the state – but we're falling short. **[Will you split $5 now between me and Jacky Rosen to help close the gap and win this race?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54546646/378887965/-1910320442?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2231-bu-nd&recurring=0&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYjlmYjZkNC03ODYzLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jp9k3pTbclReTKZpT22vK3pTm-gabSRy5Pgp_tG0SDU=)**

Fellow American,

_**The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME.**_

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th.**

It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff.

**[I'm going to beat Senator Warnock in this runoff, but I can't do it without the help of my top supporters. Please donate $5, $10, $34, or any amount up to the limit of $2,900 to help us rebuild our campaign war chest so we can launch our advertising immediately!](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgin8172d2ojfde713tnd19nb807dhup3ao0obgg_rp22sh2s8i66or0spim1o70cjh2bs)**

name: ICYMI News
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our presi
[View this message in your browser](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5p9adpfea30v2jfmjev2l19gduod41u3bbcf350_rp22sh2s8i66or0spim1o74clh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq9dhkumqb7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65s74chon9cr1mjgjfcjk69g7edhiepg6dcpl6momedhnmhq76tr7ckq63chmmdoefkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj32dpl6oo74c36epib6p1nm2qmash5u)
This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zma9hdrioc7q2aeulpiianaqptvv1ff0qoq94kro_rp22sh2s8i66or0spim1o74clh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zfspen2e8c59pth6dglb2gjd771n041rihpt2jbg_rp22sh2s8i66or0spim1o74clh2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2rmbrj8bd0gif6db52geordjb5chtqmgel71fkg_rp22sh2s8i66or0spim1o74clh2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

subject: This thing is far from done
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858139:JoaQHLGNs:m:1:3346849603:936A8F05700BB68C77D01992DD118825:r)

---
Peter - _brace yourself._

**This Georgia Senate race is far from over.**

Raphael Warnock still has MILLIONS in the bank to reach voters in the runoff election, so he hit the ground running the morning after Election Day. **However, my campaign is running on empty.**

The only way we can WIN THIS RACE is by building up our advertising budget ASAP.

[** SEND IN REINFORCEMENTS ASAP -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858139:JoaQHLGNs:m:1:3346849603:936A8F05700BB68C77D01992DD118825:r)
This race is critical not only to Georgia but the ENTIRE COUNTRY. Every liberal in the nation - from Hollywood to the Big Apple - will be closely watching this race, so we must be prepared to fight off tens of millions of dollars of false and misleading attack ads. **[Simply put, I can't win without your immediate help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858139:JoaQHLGNs:m:1:3346849603:936A8F05700BB68C77D01992DD118825:r)**

I knew this was never going to be an easy fight, so I have always been IN IT to WIN IT. Please, rush in your support to help refill our ad budget so we can get back on the air ASAP. **[I can't win without your help, Peter.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858139:JoaQHLGNs:m:1:3346849603:936A8F05700BB68C77D01992DD118825:r)**

Control of the U.S. Senate likely comes down to the Georgia runoff on December 6th, so every hour is critical. Please stand with me.

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858139:JoaQHLGNs:m:1:3346849603:936A8F05700BB68C77D01992DD118825:r)

Herschel Walker

clean_body: | Peter - brace yourself. This Georgia Senate race is far from over. Raphael Warnock still has MILLIONS in the bank to reach voters in the runoff election, so he hit the ground running the morning after Election Day. However, my campaign is running on empty. The only way we can WIN THIS RACE is by building up our advertising budget ASAP. This race is critical not only to Georgia but the ENTIRE COUNTRY. Every liberal in the nation - from Hollywood to the Big Apple - will be closely watching this race, so we must be prepared to fight off tens of millions of dollars of false and misleading attack ads. I knew this was never going to be an easy fight, so I have always been IN IT to WIN IT. Please, rush in your support to help refill our ad budget so we can get back on the air ASAP. Peter — in case you looked away for a moment you may have missed the fact that 2022 is actually NOT over.Georgia’s Senate race went to a run-off which will be happening on December 6, 2022. That race will determine which party holds the Senate and who is in the minority.**If Republicans fail to take the Senate, Joe Biden will be able continue to operate essentially unchecked even with a GOP House.** The Senate controls confirmations of nominees and Supreme Court justices. Fellow conservatives know that we DESPERATELY need that Supreme Court to stay in our corner... so we DESPERATELY need Herschel Walker to win this runoff.****
| [HELP HERSCHEL WIN - DONATE $50.00 RIGHT NOW!](https://unitedconservativesamerica.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=22432bec7f541233c6007cfc2&id=343d848b51&e=fdefed58de)
---
Raphael Warnock, the radical Democrat running against Herschel, still has MILLIONS in the bank to reach voters in the runoff election, so he hit the ground running the morning after Election Day. **However, Hersche’s campaign spent almost EVERYTHING during the first round of voting.** That means that he’s going to need groups like the Fredrick Douglass PAC to pick up the slack and spend huge amounts of money to get him over the line.I’m planning to go to Georgia myself to campaign for Herschel and help him out - but what he really needs is cash. So, what we need to do is get our money up for Herschel so we can **TAKE BACK THE SENATE!**

---
Peter - We always knew this Senate race would be a battle.

Being outspent by 300% had a significant impact on the Election Day outcome. Over the next 22 days of this runoff in Georgia, we cannot afford to be outraised and outspent like that again. We must redouble our efforts to win the final round of this race.

I need you to rush an emergency contribution to our campaign today so we can launch our ads immediately. **[Can I count on you to chip in $25, $30, or even $50 to help us?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858769:6CQaHLGmN:m:1:3331421248:03C6B164BD8212D4AE4FD72ED44620B5:r)**

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[**CHIP IN $25 ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858770:6CQaHLGmN:m:1:3331421248:03C6B164BD8212D4AE4FD72ED44620B5:r)
[**CHIP IN $30 ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858771:6CQaHLGmN:m:1:3331421248:03C6B164BD8212D4AE4FD72ED44620B5:r)
[**CHIP IN $50 ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858772:6CQaHLGmN:m:1:3331421248:03C6B164BD8212D4AE4FD72ED44620B5:r)
_**If you donated in the General Election, thank you Peter.**_

Now that we're in OVERTIME, I need your help again. **[I'm humbly asking you to make another donation to help us flip this seat.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858769:6CQaHLGmN:m:1:3331421248:03C6B164BD8212D4AE4FD72ED44620B5:r)**

While the stakes are even higher now with control of the Senate possibly on the line, the fundamentals of this race have not changed.

1. I'm still running against the #1 fundraiser in the Senate, who is the most vulnerable Democrat incumbent.
2. We have millions of eligible voters who we need to get back to the polls in the middle of the holiday season next month.
3. The Democrats spent over $70 million in false and misleading attack ads in the general election, so the barrage is only going to get worse now that the stakes are higher.

I know you're tired of fundraising emails, but we've come too far to lose sight of the finish line. **[Please, can I count on your support?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858769:6CQaHLGmN:m:1:3331421248:03C6B164BD8212D4AE4FD72ED44620B5:r)**

Together we'll get this done. I need to know you're still with me.

In the fight,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858769:6CQaHLGmN:m:1:3331421248:03C6B164BD8212D4AE4FD72ED44620B5:r)

Herschel Walker

name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: The most personal email I’ve ever sent you
body:
This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0002%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=aEPkJrGAWPomUbAW20HFGA&sysid=1)
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c49448%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ZdPu6Jw99POSqGwUAuiXhQ&sysid=1)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America’s black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation’s mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c49449%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qQrPScKEtx3qNY%2fRaF2ctQ&sysid=1)

**_Now I’ll share my story_ ... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how “helpless” I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We’re taught to believe we’re victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I’ve dealt with racism... _**I’ve even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c49440%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iOukD0fO1nZDiAsoFEbfqg&sysid=1)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I’m not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don’t want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a “think tank”, but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting “DO-tank”. We’re doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation’s values, what we’re doing to reach Black communities, and what we’re fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly “fighting for minorities” are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT’s efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c49441%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8uQvfaDAgK1v93E5Olawsg&sysid=1)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c49442%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=rwHzMA5DDQnvR%2fyXy8Fbtw&sysid=1)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we’re actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c49443%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Yt%2bvZhNCUbs%2ff7twIDCxgA&sysid=1)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c49444%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Hvy1cGeJ67zGteIFvfiSsQ&sysid=1)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we’ve allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We’re hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We’re not just preaching to the choir, and these aren’t boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT’s events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40555%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zf0zToeu4pQOp9wxveUkcQ&sysid=1)

What does “BLEXIT” mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I’ve copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40556%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=whzUuSGAd%2bLr3VQncfDOuA&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40557%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bVKfwlDwnsYSEil%2bVwnMMg&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40558%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=3avf3TxjlUx5OUNUfW5Pig&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40559%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=sj3VaJpL6RK1JUjS82tZzQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40550%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mtXRjw%2fiw6C4zDhzBfApMw&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40551%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kDNWGi8ec47ERx0Vsz%2bU%2bg&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40552%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ESzTJD9bj0D6h7OdolaX4Q&sysid=1)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40553%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=EqV1OFZAj%2fDtYrY6IK8qmQ&sysid=1)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40554%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5W1MJiP8LKiChaKu7SS5aw&sysid=1)

This is my last message to you before you close this email.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment.

My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause.

[_**Please consider making the most generous donation you can today by clicking here.**_](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40565%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ALOyQOoEljaN%2bP4%2fLkKHnA&sysid=1)

Thank you, Friend.

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0002%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=aEPkJrGAWPomUbAW20HFGA&sysid=1)_
