And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking. We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals. This is WRONG. I've dealt with racism... I 've even received death threats. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable. But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up. I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters. I am breaking the rules. It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... I 'm not doing that. You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country. So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss). When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing. Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for: School Choice: Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools. The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. Criminal Justice Reform: The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities. Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message. Entrepreneurship: I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire. BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. Teaching History: Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore. The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor. This is personal to me. I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today: This is my last message to you before you close this email. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment. My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause. Thank you, Friend. Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for 1600 Daily, . 625 First St #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

body:

Peter,

_**The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME.**_

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th.**

It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff.

**[I'm going to beat Senator Warnock in this runoff, but I can't do it without the help of my top supporters. Please donate $25, $50, $100, or any amount up to the limit of $2,900 to help us rebuild our campaign war chest so we can launch our advertising immediately!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858829:J4hehLGuN:m:1:3317145305:C674EB7A36D62BAF0A819C11715FDCAB:r)**

body:
| |
---
Friend – with our runoff election underway, I had to make sure you didn't miss our previous message.
I still need 387 more members of this team to endorse our runoff campaign before 11:59 p.m. tonight. It's going to take perhaps the strongest, most unstoppable grassroots movement in the history of Georgia to win – so I need to know you're with me.

**[Click here to personally endorse our people-powered runoff campaign.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54529117/378834975/986882780?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=250,100,50,25,5&code=jtk5057-su-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fwarnock-2022-runoff-endorse%3Fcode%3Djtk5057-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OGZlNDIwNS01ODYzLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IzmhAGSD5-DTrAX7ogX-xMAru3uMpj5OU1n73Q0lBGw=&emci=32656254-3361-ed11-ade6-14cb651ee1db&emdi=88fe4205-5863-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=1586379)**

– Rev. Raphael Warnock
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Team Warnock**
Date: Sat, Nov 12, 2022
Subject: Will you personally endorse Rev. Warnock?
| | |
---
Friend,

We're officially in a runoff election – meaning Rev. Warnock and Herschel Walker are facing off once again in just a few weeks. With the future of Georgia and our Democratic agenda on the line, we need to make sure Rev. Warnock has the full support of this grassroots team behind him.

**That's why we're counting on 10,000 supporters like you to endorse our runoff campaign for Senate before midnight tonight. ****[If you're with Rev. Warnock in this fight to keep Georgia blue, will you add your name and personally endorse our people-powered movement?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54529118/378834976/986882780?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=250,100,50,25,5&code=jtk5057-su-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fwarnock-2022-runoff-endorse%3Fcode%3Djtk5057-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OGZlNDIwNS01ODYzLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IzmhAGSD5-DTrAX7ogX-xMAru3uMpj5OU1n73Q0lBGw=&emci=32656254-3361-ed11-ade6-14cb651ee1db&emdi=88fe4205-5863-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=1586379)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54529119/378834977/986882780?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=250,100,50,25,5&code=jtk5057-su-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fwarnock-2022-runoff-endorse%3Fcode%3Djtk5057-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4OGZlNDIwNS01ODYzLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IzmhAGSD5-DTrAX7ogX-xMAru3uMpj5OU1n73Q0lBGw=&emci=32656254-3361-ed11-ade6-14cb651ee1db&emdi=88fe4205-5863-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=1586379)
Here's why your signature today is so important: Right now, national Republicans and shady megadonors are spending MILLIONS to prop up our GOP opponent, Herschel Walker, and flip this seat. But unlike Walker, Rev. Warnock is running a 100% people-powered campaign that puts YOU first.

body:
| | | It's Chuck Schumer. I’m just writing to say THANK YOU!

Because of YOU and every single Democrat reading this email, we completely defied history and **_kept the Senate blue!_** There was _no red wave_ , and it’s all thanks to the tireless hard work and passion of this grassroots team.

But our job is not finished yet: Georgia is once again heading to a runoff, and this time, it will decide whether we EXPAND our 50-50 majority -- something the pundits were calling a pipe dream just a few short days ago.

It's not going to be easy, either -- Raphael Warnock is already facing an attack-ad BLITZ from Mitch McConnell's megadonors, and he's going to need ALL of our support again to fight back and defeat his ultra-MAGA GOP opponent.

**[So I’m personally asking you: With the polls showing a neck-and-neck race, will you pitch in $5 (quadrupled to become $20!) right now to help Rev. Warnock win this crucial runoff and fight for the future of our Senate majority?](https://go.dscc.org/go/10993?amount=5&t=4&amount=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20221113-ChuckSchumer-SchumerVictoryThankYou-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20221113-ChuckSchumer-SchumerVictoryThankYou-Pros-sl1&akid=8665%2E9716520%2EtgK56a)**

I know what this grassroots team is capable of when we all come together. Two years ago when we defied the odds and flipped the Senate, I saw firsthand how this team showed up and fought hard to win in Georgia and secure this Democratic majority.

And now I’m asking you to stay in this fight. Winning in Georgia is critical to expanding our majority and passing President Biden's bold agenda. Going from a 50-50 deadlocked Senate to a 51-49 majority will make a HUGE difference -- you better believe it.

[**So please, if you can, chip in $5 (becomes $20!) before midnight to help Rev. Warnock give us our 51st Democratic seat and defend our Senate majority:**](https://go.dscc.org/go/10993?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20221113-ChuckSchumer-SchumerVictoryThankYou-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20221113-ChuckSchumer-SchumerVictoryThankYou-Pros-sl1&akid=8665%2E9716520%2EtgK56a)

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Georgia outcome
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857231:JVvlDLG9N:m:1:3373497171:B490C792C48B7ADB680E127AF50FF8B8:r)

---
Peter - We always knew this Senate race would be a battle.

Being outspent by 300% had a significant impact on the Election Day outcome. Over the next 22 days of this runoff in Georgia, we cannot afford to be outraised and outspent like that again. We must redouble our efforts to win the final round of this race.

I need you to rush an emergency contribution to our campaign today so we can launch our ads immediately. **[Can I count on you to chip in $25, $30, or even $50 to help us?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857231:JVvlDLG9N:m:1:3373497171:B490C792C48B7ADB680E127AF50FF8B8:r)**

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[**CHIP IN $25 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857232:JVvlDLG9N:m:1:3373497171:B490C792C48B7ADB680E127AF50FF8B8:r)
[**CHIP IN $30 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857233:JVvlDLG9N:m:1:3373497171:B490C792C48B7ADB680E127AF50FF8B8:r)
[**CHIP IN $50 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857234:JVvlDLG9N:m:1:3373497171:B490C792C48B7ADB680E127AF50FF8B8:r)
_**If you donated in the General Election, thank you Peter.**_

Now that we're in OVERTIME, I need your help again. **[I'm humbly asking you to make another donation to help us flip this seat.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857231:JVvlDLG9N:m:1:3373497171:B490C792C48B7ADB680E127AF50FF8B8:r)**

While the stakes are even higher now with control of the Senate possibly on the line, the fundamentals of this race have not changed.

1. I'm still running against the #1 fundraiser in the Senate, who is the most vulnerable Democrat incumbent.

3. The Democrats spent over $70 million in false and misleading attack ads in the general election, so the barrage is only going to get worse now that the stakes are higher.

I know you're tired of fundraising emails, but we've come too far to lose sight of the finish line. **[Please, can I count on your support?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857231:JVvlDLG9N:m:1:3373497171:B490C792C48B7ADB680E127AF50FF8B8:r)**

subject: One more chance
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857980:6h-wDLGhN:m:1:3368395361:F7C36C454D3D6D022367C5B159EAA1BF:r)

---
Peter,

_**Here we go again.**_

The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority.

_November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted._ **However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance.**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $3 or more right now? We entered the runoff with our bank account depleted, the Democrats are pledging $7 million for voter turnout efforts alone, and the attack ads from the far-Left are going to be nasty- and non-stop.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857980:6h-wDLGhN:m:1:3368395361:F7C36C454D3D6D022367C5B159EAA1BF:r) **

[** Donate $25 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857981:6h-wDLGhN:m:1:3368395361:F7C36C454D3D6D022367C5B159EAA1BF:r)
[** Donate $35 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857982:6h-wDLGhN:m:1:3368395361:F7C36C454D3D6D022367C5B159EAA1BF:r)
[** Donate $50 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857983:6h-wDLGhN:m:1:3368395361:F7C36C454D3D6D022367C5B159EAA1BF:r)
The Libertarian candidate in our race will not proceed to the December 6th runoff, **so the 80,000+ votes he received on Tuesday are up for grabs.** This number is important because Senator Warnock and I are separated by just a little more than 40,000 votes.

The entire political world is about to descend on Georgia. Democrats are about to spend hundreds of millions to take me down, which could make this the most expensive Senate race in history. **[Can we count on your support to defeat them in 22 days?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857980:6h-wDLGhN:m:1:3368395361:F7C36C454D3D6D022367C5B159EAA1BF:r)**

**With control of the U.S. Senate likely on the line, we need your help RIGHT NOW to launch our advertising immediately.**

**[Will you stand with me?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857980:6h-wDLGhN:m:1:3368395361:F7C36C454D3D6D022367C5B159EAA1BF:r)**

Thank you,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857980:6h-wDLGhN:m:1:3368395361:F7C36C454D3D6D022367C5B159EAA1BF:r)

Herschel Walker

subject: please give us a chance to explain…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Here is the truth:
#
Derek -
In just a moment, we are going to ask you to make a $3 contribution to VoteVets. Please give us a chance to explain why this request — especially today — is so important.
Here is the truth:
In just a few weeks, there will be a runoff election for U.S. Senate in Georgia.
It’s a big race.
And VoteVets has a big role in it.
In the last election cycle, VoteVets was one of the largest outside spending organizations in the country. Period. And one of the only one where the bulk of our donations come from lots of people making individual contributions.
What’s more, our message and messengers are effective — especially in some of the swing races Democrats won in the election. We cut through the clutter. We move independents. We get results.
But we cannot do any of it without you. So as we finalize our plans for Georgia, we are asking:
[**Can you please make a $3 contribution to VoteVets today? We’ll put it right to work defeating Herschel Walker, because we cannot do it without you.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-nov22.YYvGrB&refcode=em221113-1-15&t=1&akid=7145%2E3013755%2EhBlboI)

The fundamentals of this race have not changed.

1. I'm still running against the #1 fundraiser in the Senate, who is the most vulnerable Democrat incumbent.
2. We have millions of eligible voters who we need to get back to the polls in the middle of the holiday season next month.
3. The Democrats spent over $70 million in false and misleading attack ads in the general election, so the barrage is only going to get worse now that the stakes are higher.

We hate to see you go, but [you can unsubscribe here](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=2514fe5419c6413497c1da9a5016fab9&_t=cu6L1gRuzVcpHUcYvuJutXHcG3MiA-B19Ao7DDhYprNQ1e7bM-YwHQ2OHnR4gFRBlH7lxkBrPNOSz2YfxQeW-cYghaxJuQR576fSumVIQ2U%3D)._
clean_body: Today is a new day, but the race continues. | Fellow American - We always knew this Senate race would be a battle. Being outspent by 300% had a significant impact on the Election Day outcome. Over the next 23 days of this runoff in Georgia, we cannot afford to be outraised and outspent like that again. We must redouble our efforts to win the final round of this race. I need you to rush an emergency contribution to our campaign today so we can launch our ads immediately. If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly: If you donated in the General Election, thank you Fellow American. Now that we're in OVERTIME, I need your help again. The fundamentals of this race have not changed. 1. I'm still running against the #1 fundraiser in the Senate, who is the most vulnerable Democrat incumbent. 2. We have millions of eligible voters who we need to get back to the polls in the middle of the holiday season next month. 3. The Democrats spent over $70 million in false and misleading attack ads in the general election, so the barrage is only going to get worse now that the stakes are higher. I know you're tired of fundraising emails, but we've come too far to lose sight of the finish line. Together we'll get this done. I need to know you're still with me. In the fight, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: What it looks like to "lose better"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elissa Slotkin for Congress
body:
Elissa Slotkin for Congresssecure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq42022?refcode=email20221113&amount=28 [secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq42022?refcode=email20221113&amount=28]
Team,
If you’ve followed any of our three campaigns, you've heard me say that a key objective for us is to “lose better”. That means doing just a little bit better in the heavier Republican-leaning areas of Michigan's 7th district.
The election results this week were a perfect example. We won our race by 5% -- our biggest-ever win margin -- and it was driven, in part, by our performance in the deepest red areas of the district.
A state cartographer, Jackson Franks, shared this map on social media of our results. It clearly shows that we were able to turn out Democratic voters in and around the City of Lansing. But it also shows that we flipped Eaton County (my opponent's home county), our wins in smaller towns across the district like Brighton, Howell, DeWitt, and Grand Ledge, and our work to keep margins closer in the more traditional Republican areas:
secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq42022?refcode=email20221113&amount=28 [secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq42022?refcode=email20221113&amount=28]
I credit our amazing team of volunteers for helping us "lose better" -- their hard work, dedication, and conversations with their neighbors are a big reason why we are able to keep winning in tough turf.
And here's one more graphic, from the New York Times, showing our overperformance across the district compared to President Biden in the 2020 presidential election:
secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq42022?refcode=email20221113&amount=28 [secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq42022?refcode=email20221113&amount=28]
Thank you all, again, for your continued support. We truly could not have done any of this without you.
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/slotkinq42022?refcode=email20221113&amount=28]
Elissa

# [#]

Elissa Slotkin proudly represents Michigan’s 8th district in Congress. In 2022, she is running to represent Michigan’s newly-drawn 7th district, which covers two-thirds of her existing district. Keep up with Elissa and the latest from the campaign trail on Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/elissaslotkin] and Twitter. [https://twitter.com/ElissaSlotkin]

# Weekly Newsletter
---
| November 13th, 2022 | Issue XL
---
| |
---
---
| | | A Note from Leader Ortt upon Reelection Dear Neighbors,
Please accept my deepest gratitude in your support of my reelection. I will continue to listen to your concerns, stand up for your constitutional rights, and serve as your voice in Albany. As we hit the ground running this next legislative session, know that I am here to serve YOU. Please do not hesitate to reach out to my office at ortt@nysenate.com or (518) 455-2024.
I look forward to these next two years as we seek to make our state a safer, stronger, and more affordable place to live.
Sincerely,
Rob
---
---
|
---
| |
---
May we never forget those who proudly served and protected our country.

Peter - _brace yourself._

**This Georgia Senate race is far from over.**

Raphael Warnock still has MILLIONS in the bank to reach voters in the runoff election, so he hit the ground running the morning after Election Day. **However, my campaign is running on empty.**

The only way we can WIN THIS RACE is by building up our advertising budget ASAP.

[** SEND IN REINFORCEMENTS ASAP -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858798:6x4NWLGRN:m:1:3331421248:4194BAF4C843D5893DD86FFEECE558A6:r)
This race is critical not only to Georgia but the ENTIRE COUNTRY. Every liberal in the nation - from Hollywood to the Big Apple - will be closely watching this race, so we must be prepared to fight off tens of millions of dollars of false and misleading attack ads. **[Simply put, I can't win without your immediate help.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858798:6x4NWLGRN:m:1:3331421248:4194BAF4C843D5893DD86FFEECE558A6:r)**

I knew this was never going to be an easy fight, so I have always been IN IT to WIN IT. Please, rush in your support to help refill our ad budget so we can get back on the air ASAP. **[I can't win without your help, Peter.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858798:6x4NWLGRN:m:1:3331421248:4194BAF4C843D5893DD86FFEECE558A6:r)**

Control of the U.S. Senate likely comes down to the Georgia runoff on December 6th, so every hour is critical. Please stand with me.

Thanks,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858798:6x4NWLGRN:m:1:3331421248:4194BAF4C843D5893DD86FFEECE558A6:r)

Herschel Walker

name: Mark Warner
subject: a 50-50 Senate is just not enough
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Make a difference in Georgia that will pay off big time over the next two years in the Senate.

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54562039/378904402/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTc1NGU2Zi04ZTYzLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cU138eS-DwZezSwSgRuch5rlrkhX-4iTKrRqVSSb44s=&emci=744a22d8-7e63-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=a1754e6f-8e63-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek, In the days since the election, I have been reflecting on what it means that Democrats held our majority in the Senate. I want to share a couple thoughts with you and hope you’ll take a moment to hear me out. First off, we need to recognize what an incredible achievement this represents. The grassroots of the Democratic Party came together, working together to defy the odds in a way not seen since the days of JFK. That’s how long it’s been since Democrats did so well in a midterm as tough as this, and it’s worth celebrating. Here’s what’s on my mind now. The truth is, a 50-50 Senate is just not enough. We need to expand our majority by helping Raphael Warnock win his crucial runoff next month. [**In a moment, I am going to ask you to help Rev. Warnock out, but first I want to give you a few reasons why it is so important.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54562040/378904403/745009611?refcode=mw_em_221113_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTc1NGU2Zi04ZTYzLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cU138eS-DwZezSwSgRuch5rlrkhX-4iTKrRqVSSb44s=) 1\. The first reason is time. Under Senate rules, a 50-vote majority requires a power-sharing agreement with Republicans that will slow the Senate down dramatically. A 51-vote majority means clear Democratic control, with the ability to fast-track legislation and nominees. It means more progress and less of a chance that a setback, whether a sick Senator or a cancelled flight, grinds our work to a halt. We need Rev. Warnock in the Senate for that to happen. 2\. We can still make progress, even under closely divided government. With a narrow Senate majority and the House on the knife’s edge of GOP control, I’ll acknowledge how tough things will be over the next two years. But I believe in Democrats’ ability to lead despite these challenges. Over the past few years, we have kept the government running and avoided disastrous shutdowns. And I’m proud to have passed important bills on infrastructure, COVID relief, climate change, inflation reduction, and more – largely through bipartisan efforts. We can and must try to solve our nation’s challenges, and a 51-vote majority gives us more leverage to lead on important legislation. 3\. Another reason we need 51 votes is the courts. The _Dobbs_ decision was a painful reminder of how critical it is that we appoint federal judges at every level who will put the rule of law over a partisan agenda. Without Rev. Warnock and a 51-vote majority, judicial nominations will take longer and be much harder to push through. 4\. Candidly, the 2024 Senate map is going to be even tougher. Winning the Georgia runoff is a down payment on our chances at holding the majority for years to come. 5\. Finally, there’s Raphael Warnock himself. We’ve been hearing pundits talk about how “candidate quality” mattered this cycle, and Rev. Warnock is case in point. In just his first two years, he has emerged as a champion for voting rights and democracy, while proving he can win tough elections in a conservative state. We need leaders of his caliber in the Senate now more than ever. [**This is what’s at stake, Derek. Rev. Warnock needs our help to win this runoff and expand our Democratic majority. If you haven’t donated yet this cycle, now is the time. It is truly that important. Can I count on you?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54562041/378904404/745009611?refcode=mw_em_221113_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMTc1NGU2Zi04ZTYzLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cU138eS-DwZezSwSgRuch5rlrkhX-4iTKrRqVSSb44s=) clean_body: Make a difference in Georgia that will pay off big time over the next two years in the Senate. | | | Derek, In the days since the election, I have been reflecting on what it means that Democrats held our majority in the Senate. I want to share a couple thoughts with you and hope you’ll take a moment to hear me out. First off, we need to recognize what an incredible achievement this represents. The grassroots of the Democratic Party came together, working together to defy the odds in a way not seen since the days of JFK. That’s how long it’s been since Democrats did so well in a midterm as tough as this, and it’s worth celebrating. Here’s what’s on my mind now. The truth is, a 50-50 Senate is just not enough. We need to expand our majority by helping Raphael Warnock win his crucial runoff next month. = 1\. The first reason is time. Under Senate rules, a 50-vote majority requires a power-sharing agreement with Republicans that will slow the Senate down dramatically. A 51-vote majority means clear Democratic control, with the ability to fast-track legislation and nominees. It means more progress and less of a chance that a setback, whether a sick Senator or a cancelled flight, grinds our work to a halt. We need Rev. Warnock in the Senate for that to happen. 2\. We can still make progress, even under closely divided government. With a narrow Senate majority and the House on the knife’s edge of GOP control, I’ll acknowledge how tough things will be over the next two years. But I believe in Democrats’ ability to lead despite these challenges. Over the past few years, we have kept the government running and avoided disastrous shutdowns. And I’m proud to have passed important bills on infrastructure, COVID relief, climate change, inflation reduction, and more – largely through bipartisan efforts. We can and must try to solve our nation’s challenges, and a 51-vote majority gives us more leverage to lead on important legislation. 3\. Another reason we need 51 votes is the courts. The Dobbs decision was a painful reminder of how critical it is that we appoint federal judges at every level who will put the rule of law over a partisan agenda. Without Rev. Warnock and a 51-vote majority, judicial nominations will take longer and be much harder to push through. 4\. Candidly, the 2024 Senate map is going to be even tougher. Winning the Georgia runoff is a down payment on our chances at holding the majority for years to come. 5\. Finally, there’s Raphael Warnock himself. We’ve been hearing pundits talk about how “candidate quality” mattered this cycle, and Rev. Warnock is case in point. In just his first two years, he has emerged as a champion for voting rights and democracy, while proving he can win tough elections in a conservative state. We need leaders of his caliber in the Senate now more than ever. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be automatically split between Raphael Warnock and Mark Warner: = = = = = = When I asked my supporters to chip in their hard-earned money during some tough economic times, it was because every vote mattered and every dollar made a difference. The contributions folks made to John Fetterman helped him hold rallies in parts of Pennsylvania that hadn’t seen a candidate, let alone a Democrat, in decades. They helped Catherine Cortez Masto turn out the Clark County, NV voters who made all the difference in deciding control of the Senate this weekend. Now you have the power to make a difference in Georgia that will pay off big time over the next two years in the Senate. Our country is counting on Georgians to send Rev. Warnock back to the Senate for the tough fights head. = Thanks, Mark Warner = * | | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 United States | Click here to . | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

name: American Update
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0003%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=AOygfK1EvuaEHg79TP8xfQ&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40575%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=fuMjFAROG5YEpvKSH32TZw&sysid=1) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives--but supported by many well-meaning Americans--to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue--views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40576%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mHCsh6qQ6rcdTfeSDUjI%2fw&sysid=1)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c40576%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mHCsh6qQ6rcdTfeSDUjI%2fw&sysid=1)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0003%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=AOygfK1EvuaEHg79TP8xfQ&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c0003%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=AOygfK1EvuaEHg79TP8xfQ&sysid=1)

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Before they’re gone
body:
World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zbcsuv9m7e4hi01k6o2dt0aa5mjv5m2335vjs5r0_rp22sh2s8i66or0sphm9or4chh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8or0c1gj8d5hmjpqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65srmm9qnadjlm9h3cd30eho6apliesq31chhedjr5cljm5hbathhc1hnattjcco6fkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3cup70pjge2qr9ptie5j31c5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
| | This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z52timirasvklesc2n0p7ponjdl1n7toacql36o0_rp22sh2s8i66or0sphm9or4chh2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous soldiers, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That’s why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled [“](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zp04dleb3tqou6j7na3ien73garsq7po5r14m6eg_rp22sh2s8i66or0sphm9or4chh2bs)**[The Second World Wars.”](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zpe7kmevnem28cuo9if76vrt5nblg9tusrkqvrao_rp22sh2s8i66or0sphm9or4chh2bs) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies’ victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z4i2ii0d64gqdrjjndv5hf87i7bg2g63aovv35eo_rp22sh2s8i66or0sphm9or4chh2bs)
---
| | Simply use this secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD today: _[**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zjmqol2vvcbnspctiu1l2tr5k1s5qsg464a1n9i8_rp22sh2s8i66or0sphm9or4chh2bs)_ Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ‘09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for 1600 Daily, [please use this preferences page](http://e.1600daily.com/prefs/9z2zj1qb8hglig41djvfhntqhngjqmi1ablsnofid90).
625 First St #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Team Sinema
subject: Kyrsten received the Medicare Advantage Champion Award
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sinema for Arizona
body:
|
#
---
Friend, An important part of our work is ensuring Arizona seniors get the affordable, high-quality health care they deserve. That includes expanding access to timely health care services, lowering costs of prescriptions, and protecting coverage options. **We’re proud to share that Kyrsten recently received the Medicare Advantage Champion Award for her work reaching across the aisle to strengthen Medicare Advantage and advancing legislation that supports seniors in Arizona and across the country.** Kyrsten negotiated a historic, transformative Medicare drug plan in the recently enacted _Inflation Reduction_ law that reduces out-of-pocket costs for seniors, saves taxpayer money, and ensures Americans continue to have access to life-saving health care. Thanks to Kysten’s work, seniors in Arizona and across the country will have access to the quality health care they’ve earned through lifetimes of hard work. Your support makes this work possible. Thanks to this team, Kyrsten can do even more to develop and advance commonsense legislation that provides much-needed relief to seniors and everyday families. **Our mid-November fundraising deadline is just a few days away. To keep our fundraising and campaign on track, we’ve set a goal to raise $7,500 by Tuesday. name: Herschel Walker
subject: I know you’re tired
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858576:6ZdgWLGrN:m:1:3317145305:EF04EE4179CFAA8C6ACBF52238DD791F:r)

---
Peter - We always knew this Senate race would be a battle.

Being outspent by 300% had a significant impact on the Election Day outcome. Over the next 22 days of this runoff in Georgia, we cannot afford to be outraised and outspent like that again. We must redouble our efforts to win the final round of this race.

I need you to rush an emergency contribution to our campaign today so we can launch our ads immediately. **[Can I count on you to chip in $25, $30, or even $50 to help us?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858576:6ZdgWLGrN:m:1:3317145305:EF04EE4179CFAA8C6ACBF52238DD791F:r)**

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[**CHIP IN $25 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858577:6ZdgWLGrN:m:1:3317145305:EF04EE4179CFAA8C6ACBF52238DD791F:r)
[**CHIP IN $30 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858578:6ZdgWLGrN:m:1:3317145305:EF04EE4179CFAA8C6ACBF52238DD791F:r)
[**CHIP IN $50 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858579:6ZdgWLGrN:m:1:3317145305:EF04EE4179CFAA8C6ACBF52238DD791F:r)
_**If you donated in the General Election, thank you Peter.**_

Now that we're in OVERTIME, I need your help again. **[I'm humbly asking you to make another donation to help us flip this seat.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858576:6ZdgWLGrN:m:1:3317145305:EF04EE4179CFAA8C6ACBF52238DD791F:r)**

While the stakes are even higher now with control of the Senate possibly on the line, the fundamentals of this race have not changed.

1. I'm still running against the #1 fundraiser in the Senate, who is the most vulnerable Democrat incumbent.
2. We have millions of eligible voters who we need to get back to the polls in the middle of the holiday season next month.
3. The Democrats spent over $70 million in false and misleading attack ads in the general election, so the barrage is only going to get worse now that the stakes are higher.

I know you're tired of fundraising emails, but we've come too far to lose sight of the finish line. **[Please, can I count on your support?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858576:6ZdgWLGrN:m:1:3317145305:EF04EE4179CFAA8C6ACBF52238DD791F:r)**

Together we'll get this done. I need to know you're still with me.

In the fight,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858576:6ZdgWLGrN:m:1:3317145305:EF04EE4179CFAA8C6ACBF52238DD791F:r)

Peter - We always knew this Senate race would be a battle.

Being outspent by 300% had a significant impact on the Election Day outcome. Over the next 22 days of this runoff in Georgia, we cannot afford to be outraised and outspent like that again. We must redouble our efforts to win the final round of this race.

I need you to rush an emergency contribution to our campaign today so we can launch our ads immediately. **[Can I count on you to chip in $25, $30, or even $50 to help us?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858722:6RH87LGlN:m:1:3331703221:8C249DE0CA096035683345FFA3B98367:r)**

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[**CHIP IN $25 ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858723:6RH87LGlN:m:1:3331703221:8C249DE0CA096035683345FFA3B98367:r)
[**CHIP IN $30 ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858724:6RH87LGlN:m:1:3331703221:8C249DE0CA096035683345FFA3B98367:r)
[**CHIP IN $50 ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858725:6RH87LGlN:m:1:3331703221:8C249DE0CA096035683345FFA3B98367:r)
_**If you donated in the General Election, thank you Peter.**_

Now that we're in OVERTIME, I need your help again. **[I'm humbly asking you to make another donation to help us flip this seat.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858722:6RH87LGlN:m:1:3331703221:8C249DE0CA096035683345FFA3B98367:r)**

While the stakes are even higher now with control of the Senate possibly on the line, the fundamentals of this race have not changed.

1. I'm still running against the #1 fundraiser in the Senate, who is the most vulnerable Democrat incumbent.
2. We have millions of eligible voters who we need to get back to the polls in the middle of the holiday season next month.
3. The Democrats spent over $70 million in false and misleading attack ads in the general election, so the barrage is only going to get worse now that the stakes are higher.

I know you're tired of fundraising emails, but we've come too far to lose sight of the finish line. **[Please, can I count on your support?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858722:6RH87LGlN:m:1:3331703221:8C249DE0CA096035683345FFA3B98367:r)**

Together we'll get this done. I need to know you're still with me.

In the fight,

Peter - We always knew this Senate race would be a battle.

Being outspent by 300% had a significant impact on the Election Day outcome. Over the next 22 days of this runoff in Georgia, we cannot afford to be outraised and outspent like that again. We must redouble our efforts to win the final round of this race.

I need you to rush an emergency contribution to our campaign today so we can launch our ads immediately. **[Can I count on you to chip in $25, $30, or even $50 to help us?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858076:JMaE7LGNy:m:1:3346849603:3AB029BDEA435DB57F15213B60D92EDE:r)**

_**If you donated in the General Election, thank you Peter.**_

Now that we're in OVERTIME, I need your help again. **[I'm humbly asking you to make another donation to help us flip this seat.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858076:JMaE7LGNy:m:1:3346849603:3AB029BDEA435DB57F15213B60D92EDE:r)**

While the stakes are even higher now with control of the Senate possibly on the line, the fundamentals of this race have not changed.

1. I'm still running against the #1 fundraiser in the Senate, who is the most vulnerable Democrat incumbent.
2. We have millions of eligible voters who we need to get back to the polls in the middle of the holiday season next month.
3. The Democrats spent over $70 million in false and misleading attack ads in the general election, so the barrage is only going to get worse now that the stakes are higher.

I know you're tired of fundraising emails, but we've come too far to lose sight of the finish line. **[Please, can I count on your support?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858076:JMaE7LGNy:m:1:3346849603:3AB029BDEA435DB57F15213B60D92EDE:r)**

body:
|

---
Peter - _brace yourself._

**This Georgia Senate race is far from over.**

Raphael Warnock still has MILLIONS in the bank to reach voters in the runoff election, so he hit the ground running the morning after Election Day. **However, my campaign is running on empty.**

The only way we can WIN THIS RACE is by building up our advertising budget ASAP.

[** SEND IN REINFORCEMENTS ASAP -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857114:6yHz7LGNT:m:1:3369487795:1CF842C34332D021A63A73B8B335937B:r)
This race is critical not only to Georgia but the ENTIRE COUNTRY. Every liberal in the nation - from Hollywood to the Big Apple - will be closely watching this race, so we must be prepared to fight off tens of millions of dollars of false and misleading attack ads. **[Simply put, I can't win without your immediate help.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857114:6yHz7LGNT:m:1:3369487795:1CF842C34332D021A63A73B8B335937B:r)**

I knew this was never going to be an easy fight, so I have always been IN IT to WIN IT. Please, rush in your support to help refill our ad budget so we can get back on the air ASAP. **[I can't win without your help, Peter.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857114:6yHz7LGNT:m:1:3369487795:1CF842C34332D021A63A73B8B335937B:r)**

Control of the U.S. Senate likely comes down to the Georgia runoff on December 6th, so every hour is critical. Please stand with me.

Thanks,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857114:6yHz7LGNT:m:1:3369487795:1CF842C34332D021A63A73B8B335937B:r)

Herschel Walker

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Already, Republicans have spent $52 million to help Herschel Walker defeat Sen. Raphael Warnock in the runoff election for Georgia’s Senate seat. It worked to defeat Tim Ryan in Ohio, and this seat is the difference between a tie in the Senate and Democrats having a working majority.
body:
A tie in the Senate or a working majority
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2ac99bf8-4e6f-452a-8ca9-84ac7e0b715f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

|
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| | | ** Peter,** **They're dumping $52 million into Georgia to rob another election from the people.** **Senator Raphael Warnock is in a battle for reelection to be decided in a December 6th runoff.** In one fell swoop we can gain a seat in the Senate--further demoralizing MAGA Republicans--ensure we have larger majorities on committees so Republicans can't obstruct legislation there, and keep one of our best Senators in the Senate, while preventing violent lunatic, Herschel Walker, from setting up camp there. We were set to win the Ohio Senate seat in the midterms, and then **Republicans dumped $50 million on Tim Ryan, allowing the execrable J.D. Vance to buy himself a seat**. Ryan's amazing campaign did stop them from spending that money in Nevada, Arizona, Georgia and New Hampshire though, for which we should be thankful. **NOW THEY'RE TRYING IT AGAIN. Unlike Ryan, Warnock will get help from Washington, but he will need every dollar possible to fight off this onslaught from billionaire Republican oligarchs.** **[Can you join Blue Amp Action in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can afford to win another Senate seat in Georgia and strike another blow for democracy against the authoritarian Republican Party?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3117520e-f90a-4773-bcb1-ad7e3e15e259/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** **Thank you Blue Amp Action community for all you've done.** **Cliff Schecter**

We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. body:
Next year, we have even MORE local races on the ballot. Can we count on you?

|
---
Derek, Thanks to supporters like you, Congresswomen Wexton and Spanberger will be heading back to Congress. But your contributions to Team DPVA did a lot more than just win two of the most competitive races in the entire country. **In local races across the Commonwealth – from Roanoke to Fairfax to Virginia Beach – Democrats defied expectations and won big.** Grassroots contributions from Democrats like you helped to fund our local candidates program, which provided training, data, and resources to Democrats running for local offices. When Roe v. Wade fell, anti-choice extremists jumped at the opportunity to reinstate 100-year-old trigger bans on the books from before the landmark ruling. But voters fought back and WON. | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54539439/378876396/765663662?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzU2Mjk2MC02ZTYzLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aGuYyRgqN49gs8M2xgxXj47XFswg8LD3HcOL92JWjUw=&emci=a990996a-6763-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=e7562960-6e63-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=561582) | Friend — If Tuesday night proved one thing, **it’s that abortion bans are deeply unpopular. ** When _Roe v. Wade_ fell, anti-choice extremists jumped at the opportunity to reinstate 100-year-old trigger bans on the books from before the landmark ruling. **But voters fought back. ** In California, in Kentucky, in Michigan, and Vermont. Voters stepped up and showed extremists we will NOT back down in the fight to maintain our fundamental rights. Now, we’re sending a message to any anti-abortion officials who still think they can get away with ignoring voters and rolling back out these bans: **We’re coming for your state. ** [_**Will you stand alongside us and let anti-choice officials know we’re ready to fight to defend our rights?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54539440/378876397/916506333?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzU2Mjk2MC02ZTYzLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aGuYyRgqN49gs8M2xgxXj47XFswg8LD3HcOL92JWjUw=&emci=a990996a-6763-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=e7562960-6e63-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=561582) [SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54539441/378876398/916506333?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzU2Mjk2MC02ZTYzLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aGuYyRgqN49gs8M2xgxXj47XFswg8LD3HcOL92JWjUw=&emci=a990996a-6763-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=e7562960-6e63-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=561582) These four states span the political spectrum — their voters, residents, and working people couldn’t be more different. But when it comes to our most private medical decisions, _that doesn’t matter._ Voters stood together and fought back against politicians' attempts to control our bodies. **These victories were HUGE, but we’re not done yet.** We’re actively working to identify more states where we can run reproductive ballot campaigns AND WIN. **But in the meantime, let extremist officials know: their trigger bans and attempts to control us are no match for the power of voters. ** [_**Sign our petition now so that anti-choice officials know we’re ready to fight to defend our rights! →**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54539442/378876399/916506333?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzU2Mjk2MC02ZTYzLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aGuYyRgqN49gs8M2xgxXj47XFswg8LD3HcOL92JWjUw=&emci=a990996a-6763-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=e7562960-6e63-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=561582) [SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.everyaction.com/k/54539443/378876400/916506333?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRlAvMS84NTQ3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNzU2Mjk2MC02ZTYzLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aGuYyRgqN49gs8M2xgxXj47XFswg8LD3HcOL92JWjUw=&emci=a990996a-6763-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=e7562960-6e63-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=561582) Thanks for your support, friend. — FP Team

name: Team AOC
subject: We’ve been busy. Take a look 📸
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
See what your actions have supported just this month.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20221113-3613-header&t=1&akid=3613%2E2526796%2ELDQcV5)
Thank you to all the campaign organizers, volunteers, staff, small dollar donors, grassroots candidates, and voters who worked so hard for a better future last week.
Campaigning is relentless, all-encompassing work. None of this happens without you. You are so appreciated.
We wanted to share some highlights from this month to show you all the hard work that our team pulled off – all powered by grassroots donations:
### Meeting new neighbors in Co-op City, The Bronx, which is now part of NY-14 after redistricting.
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20221113.WzyFDT&refcode=em20221113-3613-P_FND_CTR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3613%2E2526796%2ELDQcV5)
### Hunts Point listening forum at The Point CDC in The Bronx.
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20221113.WzyFDT&refcode=em20221113-3613-P_FND_CTR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3613%2E2526796%2ELDQcV5)
### Green New Deal for Public Housing Teach-in at Throggs Neck Houses in The Bronx.
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20221113.WzyFDT&refcode=em20221113-3613-P_FND_CTR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=3613%2E2526796%2ELDQcV5)
### Team AOC and staff from Stand Up to Violence at Jacobi Hospital meet neighbors at Bronx River Houses Community Day.
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20221113.WzyFDT&refcode=em20221113-3613-P_FND_CTR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=3613%2E2526796%2ELDQcV5)
### Community Day at Bronx Rivers Houses.
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20221113.WzyFDT&refcode=em20221113-3613-P_FND_CTR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=3613%2E2526796%2ELDQcV5)
### Alexandria and Team AOC at a listening forum in Co-op City, The Bronx.
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20221113.WzyFDT&refcode=em20221113-3613-P_FND_CTR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=7&akid=3613%2E2526796%2ELDQcV5)
### Alexandria answering constituent questions at a listening forum in Astoria, Queens.

clean_body: See what your actions have supported just this month. Thank you to all the campaign organizers, volunteers, staff, small dollar donors, grassroots candidates, and voters who worked so hard for a better future last week. Campaigning is relentless, all-encompassing work. None of this happens without you. You are so appreciated. We wanted to share some highlights from this month to show you all the hard work that our team pulled off – all powered by grassroots donations: Meeting new neighbors in Co-op City, The Bronx, which is now part of NY-14 after redistricting. Hunts Point listening forum at The Point CDC in The Bronx. Green New Deal for Public Housing Teach-in at Throggs Neck Houses in The Bronx. Team AOC and staff from Stand Up to Violence at Jacobi Hospital meet neighbors at Bronx River Houses Community Day. Community Day at Bronx Rivers Houses. Alexandria and Team AOC at a listening forum in Co-op City, The Bronx. Alexandria answering constituent questions at a listening forum in Astoria, Queens. Halloween Parade at Co-op City in The Bronx. Photo credits: Corey Torpie, Fiorella Bini, and Carlos Alonso With your help, we will continue to push for progress and help working families however we can. Thank you for standing with us. ---
Peter,

_**Here we go again.**_

The outcome of the Senate runoff in Georgia could - just like last election cycle - have critical national implications. While there are still a few key Senate races that have yet to be called, it's likely Georgia could once again decide the Senate majority.

_November 8th was not the 'Red Wave' many had predicted._ **However, if you still want to turn this country around, we've got one more chance.**

**[Can I count on you to chip in $3 or more right now? We entered the runoff with our bank account depleted, the Democrats are pledging $7 million for voter turnout efforts alone, and the attack ads from the far-Left are going to be nasty- and non-stop.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858878:640XcLGZN:m:1:3317145305:282C8C2186F3386C9E35BB156728FC66:r) **

[** Donate $25 -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858879:640XcLGZN:m:1:3317145305:282C8C2186F3386C9E35BB156728FC66:r)

The Libertarian candidate in our race will not proceed to the December 6th runoff, **so the 80,000+ votes he received on Tuesday are up for grabs.** This number is important because Senator Warnock and I are separated by just a little more than 40,000 votes.

The entire political world is about to descend on Georgia. Democrats are about to spend hundreds of millions to take me down, which could make this the most expensive Senate race in history. **[Can we count on your support to defeat them in 22 days?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858878:640XcLGZN:m:1:3317145305:282C8C2186F3386C9E35BB156728FC66:r)**

**With control of the U.S. Senate likely on the line, we need your help RIGHT NOW to launch our advertising immediately.**

**[Will you stand with me?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858878:640XcLGZN:m:1:3317145305:282C8C2186F3386C9E35BB156728FC66:r)**

Thank you,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858878:640XcLGZN:m:1:3317145305:282C8C2186F3386C9E35BB156728FC66:r)

Herschel Walker

name: Joe Biden
subject: We wouldn’t be here without the support of this grassroots team.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
No matter what happens in the coming days and weeks, know this: I have never been more optimistic about America’s future than I am today. | |
---
Derek, last Tuesday was a good day for democracy -- and _a good day for America._ While we don’t know all of the results yet, here’s what we do know: We lost fewer seats in the House than in any Democratic president’s first midterm election in at least 40 years. **This victory is yours -- so let me start out by saying:_Thank you._ We wouldn’t be here without the support of this grassroots team.** When I came to office, we inherited a nation with a pandemic raging and an economy reeling. We acted quickly and boldly. With you by our side, we’ve vaccinated millions of people, created stable and sustained growth in our economy, and made long-term investments to rebuild America itself. Our economic policies created a record 10 million new jobs since I came into office. Unemployment rate is down from 6.4 percent when I was sworn in to 3.7 percent. **And we’re just getting started, Derek.** No matter what happens in the coming days and weeks, know this: I have never been more optimistic about America’s future than I am today. After a long campaign season, I still believe what I always have. This is a great nation and we are a great people. There is nothing we can’t do if we do it together. **It goes without saying, our party is relying on you to continue building on our progress, and donations of $7 help keep our party running each and every day.** [**If you’re with me, please consider making a $7 donation to the DNC today to continue the critical work to build a better America.**](https://click.act.democrats.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x_Axe9OmaJo0FwLB4twDFs1khOy1ef30zSiKcf1G0E3l-lYFcZ9llNnox4cg7e7ceY12btTYE-JsAuZLpGdMxZ5qpEFsoi9C-sryRCPw5v_E2Pzcxlx1zGbNBmNpaf2x180akwNqIg_yFB3klAR6ia2zkD6YztECsgdI26h3LIXkqUuTVgdtxnFwXOCMNx1zR8yqNK8TSQafU_wcUFeSNvBBbC28UeWWQjATXvO9rq_zrZSo2bpbZBw4-38E5M0hxfw0fuWJy-o3oo36nEnyE_vCB4jO-A2R196r6q3FpHw-Yrvz6Tt2yqGKOwhK__VClfzhdeEAoGmBlGZ6va5p8O1-Fj1uBWhVZZ54uyLIZTjhneVEcw4CvJ2xCLRbFklUpIF0vuJivv0Tv6TEqo6gvrDOZqwhEzP0r7HaXsCtq3svSm73M4Y0UNgjKxWaR5gZdfqzoXLgeDyCx_DQIgpDYfOVz-7dD77icMJUAvoKfrcb_P1j-AELjWLQG6dk_fHRSSilFhOx8Yg7TOQedIxJuVBS8B91DggNlCmkIWk5qFmq9KbklRTXEm7IHZ-RvwGytgvtMJRq275fmUQ3_EHb6ABys6DkFSuwbGOSLrwNhlK3KpA_7LpmZM-iHcOhRInpxrUQxX_s59VUSFU2HtZGLV6nWaaZ-aQMWyX1QGqmqCjA/3r4/d40MoH4ASGyhulyUArLGew/h0/utmgLWRw1EZPRJwFHByXqm5uSl5YyW0asHnXPqWTGNA) Thank you for all that you do, and all that you’ll continue doing. name: Raphael Warnock
subject: please, friend, don't scroll away
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
| | |
---
Friend – I’ll keep this short:

Our Senate race in Georgia is officially going to a runoff election. **With less than 30 days to defend my seat, Republicans are doing everything in their power to defeat me.**
That's why Donald Trump has visited our state multiple times to rally the GOP base for my opponent, Herschel Walker – and why Mitch McConnell's super PAC has spent millions smearing me with attack ads.
**I'm fully counting on your grassroots support to power our movement to victory. We’ve done this once before, and I know we can do it again.**
**[So please, friend, will you split $5 between me and Jacky Rosen – or as much as you can spare today – to help me defeat Herschel Walker and win in Georgia?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54562782/378909038/-1910320442?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2230-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTVkMDI1Yi05YTYzLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=alS2ygO3dwRbwLJMT8uJHuE6dO1zhn60rzKTBblRPAU=)**
Thank you for all that you do. None of this would be possible without you.

– Rev. Raphael Warnock

clean_body: | | | Friend – I’ll keep this short: Our Senate race in Georgia is officially going to a runoff election. With less than 30 days to defend my seat, Republicans are doing everything in their power to defeat me. That's why Donald Trump has visited our state multiple times to rally the GOP base for my opponent, Herschel Walker – and why Mitch McConnell's super PAC has spent millions smearing me with attack ads. I'm fully counting on your grassroots support to power our movement to victory. We’ve done this once before, and I know we can do it again. = Thank you for all that you do. body:
World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. | | | This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5ce1aadd84084e31badc78ec86eb88d8&_e=z90pS4CXDF_zZn815w7dSdncTX4vB8Bz9Gr59vus9xbqIvU8Nu_RTRhMf_UCNxF_rA-R9KqG0csesRMWRme0P5aCwiWtZ5tN6x9X6dv8HrDgBPARaNV_PLZzWffKW6cQ8wS255X_yvme5iRAFI4Zb-AU4tDEoIHEXiiafRdqS5zAP2v-scT-1sK0jGPmVDYf749MLFGgN3wtjQCbCXMiLwHHOAwFHMeP3dJYhNwfXwd5nR9nP2Q0lmQBgHttJIMm9FaiTmLFxLnJATKbh2w_QgXjEgygrLN24GonLhhZhWe6KOzH7WHkGZ5hosMGxSrwlUY3kWObTvm7LklIQYV0awOFAnwaO4_LeKNfr9BjxundmK2vxrYLsSd8BXXyzmcq7sgLEnNitTUZIPPtVx4lHQ%3D%3D)

| | Dear Fellow American, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. But today, only around one percent of the 16 million brave Americans who fought in the war are still alive. As we lose more and more of these courageous soldiers, we also lose the living memories they carry. But we must preserve the lessons learned from this world war.
---
| | That's why Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled ["](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5ce1aadd84084e31badc78ec86eb88d8&_e=z90pS4CXDF_zZn815w7dSdncTX4vB8Bz9Gr59vus9xbqIvU8Nu_RTRhMf_UCNxF_rA-R9KqG0csesRMWRme0P5aCwiWtZ5tN6x9X6dv8HrDgBPARaNV_PLZzWffKW6cQ8wS255X_yvme5iRAFI4Zb-AU4tDEoIHEXiiafRdqS5zAP2v-scT-1sK0jGPmVDYf749MLFGgN3wtjQCbCXMiLwHHOAwFHMeP3dJYhNwfXwd5nR9nP2Q0lmQBgHttJIMmaQZRPiG8zP4SqZbMTNy3aW20ruROChB9-PC_-dfw92MxGxgCOhEKd4Y1dDfB-wR4UwS_XRx_c5-i6Wo9ErbsMjqi8TCkJkyJ3GZchYeGhIVnw4h_M6Nj7OaLSoVsvw8tFRhscxootgMiwUw1cEmRjA%3D%3D)**[The Second World Wars."](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=5ce1aadd84084e31badc78ec86eb88d8&_e=z90pS4CXDF_zZn815w7dSdncTX4vB8Bz9Gr59vus9xbqIvU8Nu_RTRhMf_UCNxF_rA-R9KqG0csesRMWRme0P5aCwiWtZ5tN6x9X6dv8HrDgBPARaNV_PLZzWffKW6cQ8wS255X_yvme5iRAFI4Zb-AU4tDEoIHEXiiafRdqS5zAP2v-scT-1sK0jGPmVDYf749MLFGgN3wtjQCbCXMiLwHHOAwFHMeP3dJYhNwfXwd5nR9nP2Q0lmQBgHttJIMmiccwwnq56jn5Tb90NLqDQnQzhJtG_CDvEnTHlJR59X5-MUqlkyiArf5NG6LuIUjA1j4wYzk1V0u3elZrKfunwtx-ZSFG9NfFNvo4mn2UhCNtlFzf_aeAZBZTU34WFDzGcjR8jvYPslKhmkBuwuXC5w%3D%3D) **And right now, you can receive your very own DVD box set of this course when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. This limited-edition DVD set provides an analysis from military historian **Victor Davis Hanson** of Allied and Axis investments and strategies in the air, by water, and on land that led to the Allies' victory. This is one of the most popular Hillsdale courses of all time. And there are only a limited number of DVDs available. If you'd like to secure a DVD set before they're all gone, you can have one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.

clean_body: It’s going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks of this runoff campaign, so I need your help once again. It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks of this runoff campaign, so I need your help once again. | Fellow American, The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME. Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th. It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again. We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff. Despite my opponent spending over $101 MILLION in the general election, Raphael Warnock could not win the support of a majority of Georgians as an incumbent senator. It is time for a change! Everything is at stake in this runoff election, and we don't have a moment to waste. Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Sent to Freedom Nation Today subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Raphael
subject: my roots
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54547514/378888558/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5089-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OWQ4NGE4Ny03OTYzLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mISdClRK3lCHYYpHX4McnzocvVIB7J_GyLIv1liefZA=)
Friend – **my roots are planted deeply in Georgia soil.**

I grew up in public housing on the west side of Savannah – and I attended Morehouse College, a historically Black university in Atlanta. I went on what I called a "full faith" scholarship, meaning I didn't know how I would pay for my first full semester.
But through hard work and the support of my community, I was the first in my family to graduate from college – and then became the senior pastor at Ebenezer Baptist Church, the spiritual home of Martin Luther King Jr.

I know firsthand how attending an HBCU prepared me for a life of service – and I'm fighting tooth and nail in the Senate to make sure every kid has the opportunity to achieve their American dream.
**But this runoff is going to be an uphill battle: Experts are predicting an incredibly close race, and there are only 23 days left to make a difference. I urgently need your grassroots support to pull ahead and win:[_Please, will you pitch in $5 or more now, ahead of tonight's midnight deadline, to protect this seat and keep Georgia blue – so I can keep giving all folks a voice in our government?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54547515/378888559/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk5089-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3OWQ4NGE4Ny03OTYzLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=mISdClRK3lCHYYpHX4McnzocvVIB7J_GyLIv1liefZA=)**
Thank you, friend. With your help, I know we can win.
– Rev. Raphael Warnock
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
