name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: Why I created the BLEXIT Foundation
body:
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d3be2ed9fef645bb98d33e46464767ee&_e=z3JiS9P6KnzTgblBdUQYQ8LwiZDDqCqFgjPalqidIq2nwpX5vvLA6OG_rS6CH70VknDkS4SM9uP2ln-kmRWXYD8e2_HL7kG_10MC_w8bwQpQl70xaF1jYVO-x0lKPQ11rXKDF6ygUM4CqJvEnw_dNVmB0ZzDKtbyxZsJB5zcS6Is_H-mHGcHCCXBTfxyx2pOIttcYf2akmRV7FVIkWygk0_RRFZw88M7ZaskBlG82MgBr5lPhEdNd-mGNmnbbU8_GBk9g979wEy-p6EVKJwkMEv5FVbAcjXdptO05iTNT9A%3D)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America’s black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation’s mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d3be2ed9fef645bb98d33e46464767ee&_e=z3JiS9P6KnzTgblBdUQYQ8LwiZDDqCqFgjPalqidIq2nwpX5vvLA6OG_rS6CH70VknDkS4SM9uP2ln-kmRWXYD8e2_HL7kG_10MC_w8bwQpQl70xaF1jYVO-x0lKPQ11rXKDF6ygUM4CqJvEnw_dNWe5JHueL5aAtEgdZdaTlMQ_qaKX0bLwiYOVx9lWJqElirshPu38t4NDLhjolYNplW8tM3S9W6hMiizGRNGi7EUxuib0t_Vfv2bxqPlRnBgmcbi4StqZ5-70v-m_9gILzGoBffXl6lwtEYxYPuE4XO4%3D)

**_Now I’ll share my story_ ... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how “helpless” I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We’re taught to believe we’re victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I’ve dealt with racism... _**I’ve even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d3be2ed9fef645bb98d33e46464767ee&_e=z3JiS9P6KnzTgblBdUQYQ8LwiZDDqCqFgjPalqidIq2nwpX5vvLA6OG_rS6CH70VknDkS4SM9uP2ln-kmRWXYD8e2_HL7kG_10MC_w8bwQpQl70xaF1jYVO-x0lKPQ11rXKDF6ygUM4CqJvEnw_dNd65Vkdhlz8mZQ96_WQWr6xdtLXHtElKRa4U9QPPXwSh9NR_bVp-U1JgtFS_d1hiQhQ7eYVp2LMqe4_G_tv6cqSFVwYbQIJFV1ygDLjo9QPIgRa_c-ffPmHH-_RNSsRaSCP9ry_7tyiAKzWfbGsAdUs%3D)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I’m not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don’t want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a “think tank”, but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting “DO-tank”. We’re doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation’s values, what we’re doing to reach Black communities, and what we’re fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly “fighting for minorities” are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT’s efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d3be2ed9fef645bb98d33e46464767ee&_e=z3JiS9P6KnzTgblBdUQYQ8LwiZDDqCqFgjPalqidIq2nwpX5vvLA6OG_rS6CH70VknDkS4SM9uP2ln-kmRWXYD8e2_HL7kG_10MC_w8bwQpQl70xaF1jYVO-x0lKPQ11rXKDF6ygUM4CqJvEnw_dNceU91UwF-I9TTfV3oelLWricEkZh1pc-FXKZePtlNOOh4nUpJVbaFPmeqYIR0GozscuE6ZHsncGTUb4_pUYlkfoQB9fYRAN_dpwlftipoCP35ox3IrvjJNUwu2uyzxDVwyDP_3xO2p1kDrD5abdxuk%3D)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d3be2ed9fef645bb98d33e46464767ee&_e=z3JiS9P6KnzTgblBdUQYQ8LwiZDDqCqFgjPalqidIq2nwpX5vvLA6OG_rS6CH70VknDkS4SM9uP2ln-kmRWXYD8e2_HL7kG_10MC_w8bwQpQl70xaF1jYVO-x0lKPQ11rXKDF6ygUM4CqJvEnw_dNcRX06n9I4f-dLz6eVeszm4pr4MxEol_OBR2-ZsC1awnuOM7sksnvn8Dddj9Rxkz_Plj9RUrvPvr4IGx3bS2f5f3_MuBTwYGMBT7dZMoHWhfgDMNtjaQS0rLXAuuOZ50coqtmfnB_Dx0dq-q6CTl81Q%3D)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we’re actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d3be2ed9fef645bb98d33e46464767ee&_e=z3JiS9P6KnzTgblBdUQYQ8LwiZDDqCqFgjPalqidIq2nwpX5vvLA6OG_rS6CH70VknDkS4SM9uP2ln-kmRWXYD8e2_HL7kG_10MC_w8bwQpQl70xaF1jYVO-x0lKPQ11rXKDF6ygUM4CqJvEnw_dNVWgIO9Ju31AZ7_KgJlLuJ7Fm-4yNLbKW6vezdRXjlSCy0ceYJG3QwC5fwpqR7Tqy6hC0D6Yz5Dj1dPpGStl3QcOTFx-xXlEB0zz9WroYQ4AIipDrK3EW3CWeaZe5vth6mPHVfLEMQO3uTAH7Dv6ZQs%3D)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d3be2ed9fef645bb98d33e46464767ee&_e=z3JiS9P6KnzTgblBdUQYQ8LwiZDDqCqFgjPalqidIq2nwpX5vvLA6OG_rS6CH70VknDkS4SM9uP2ln-kmRWXYD8e2_HL7kG_10MC_w8bwQpQl70xaF1jYVO-x0lKPQ11rXKDF6ygUM4CqJvEnw_dNT5Ec8ByHrVJotgAL2Iv9Tqgql566QxFjzgW42sc5nbrAvE39JhvdgS0OXv1K5D1Z7AP3rBl5Y0MocHEu0ROsQJ0o1Oik7SL4pHFvUEv3pdLbEpRzG1tBe5-a6rixyefnSCJnfYzIwLv5CgIQJbIYy8%3D)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we’ve allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We’re hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We’re not just preaching to the choir, and these aren’t boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT’s events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=d3be2ed9fef645bb98d33e46464767ee&_e=z3JiS9P6KnzTgblBdUQYQ8LwiZDDqCqFgjPalqidIq2nwpX5vvLA6OG_rS6CH70VknDkS4SM9uP2ln-kmRWXYD8e2_HL7kG_10MC_w8bwQpQl70xaF1jYVO-x0lKPQ11rXKDF6ygUM4CqJvEnw_dNQi-ndFtaTpEYw0LuoenW6tSmHGVhufygO2jpXoLHsrn6cgyg8P32opno80UtCFJq6a5fhKpm1SFzgJYsrkl42tG_zOgAdf5tBOoHDEsF5KEovTbaCu4HFsOAGJZLD8-PM20yY9fzsLOFXdgY9-2IRQ%3D)

What does “BLEXIT” mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

clean_body: Friend, This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation. For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop. In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities. Our message to America’s black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture. Now I’ll share my story ... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities. Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how “helpless” I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking. We’re taught to believe we’re victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals. This is WRONG. I’ve dealt with racism... I’ve even received death threats. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable. But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up. I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters. I am breaking the rules. It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities. Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message. Entrepreneurship: I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire. Teaching History: Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we’ve allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore. The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We’re hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause. Thank you, Friend. But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. name: Raphael Warnock
subject: We've got an incredibly tough fight ahead
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
We know we can win this – we have done it before! But I've always been honest with you, so I’ll do so again: We've got an incredibly tough fight ahead.
| | |
---
Peter, I just want to say _thank you_.

Because of the strength of our grassroots movement, we've come one step closer to making history yet again here in Georgia. And we've shown the country that our fight for progress isn't over.

**We know we can win this – we have done it before! But I've always been honest with you, so I’ll do so again: We've got an incredibly tough fight ahead. We poured every cent we had into getting this far – which means we're now back to square one. **With all eyes on Georgia, the GOP is gearing up to flood us with millions in attack ads, and we need to refill our campaign.
That's why I'm asking directly: **[Will you split $15 between me and Letitia James right now to kickstart this critical next phase and power our reelection campaign to victory?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54563407/378912323/-819377630?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=15&refcode=jtk914-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYWEwMzVmMy1hNjYzLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qICKdAbdaIpofcI3UQUTVAcgwOqXce19jTnjFoX6kx0=)**

subject: I’m humbly asking

Friend, it’s official: our critical Georgia Senate race is heading to a runoff.
With the entire GOP establishment behind my opponent, Herschel Walker, I can't keep up this momentum and defend my critical seat without your immediate support. **That's why I'm humbly asking:[Will you split $5 or more right now between me and Kirsten Gillibrand to keep Georgia blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54563842/378914117/1384586616?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk3794-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZWZkZmRkNC1hYjYzLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XgajAWXyg9W8hKD0-nD2yasibBRBOpXwoDcZjlrRg5g=)**
GOP donors are flooding our race with over $37 million – and Mitch McConnell's super PAC has launched attack ad after attack ad against me. Republicans are determined to flip Georgia red.

| | Here’s what a runoff means for all of us:

We have another opportunity to not just hold our Senate majority but to EXPAND it. We have another opportunity to continue building on our progress, to appoint more federal and Supreme Court justices, and to make history. This is our last chance.

And here’s what else it means:

**_It means we need to work hard._**

The GOP is throwing everything they have at Georgia to flip it red, and we’re up against a lot. That’s not to say that we can’t win. We showed in 2020 and 2021 that Democrats can win in Georgia. We showed on Tuesday that Rev. Warnock can beat Herschel Walker. **_But it’ll come down to our voter outreach team._**

Fellow American - We always knew this Senate race would be a battle.

Being outspent by 300% had a significant impact on the Election Day outcome. Over the next 23 days of this runoff in Georgia, we cannot afford to be outraised and outspent like that again. We must redouble our efforts to win the final round of this race.

I need you to rush an emergency contribution to our campaign today so we can launch our ads immediately. **[Can I count on you to chip in $5, $10, or even $34 to help us?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=920a1a4e2ede4a7b885f4bd2e5339292&_e=awzJzBNCH6R-pOZb_dz0cUxSkmw3cJ2tdJSQ9jqMvghKL0xB9YAGHZcSPWbmVfHJChRaeGGYIPlv4L0uPUhhNEF-i_0sqzed5jm7CuCmHvYr3M5EfeeembCA60pHmVVOkBq4gmkFOOm4FADUb3SPCPlDXbHaIBtRh5ZdGEHOLW9olubRWMHD23qnfiMXWq0WHloIXJEXOBIMhph8MJ827Cs-fnz7WCSrJB1AnQkn4MyolkoshxqeutlnKc41unt7bmIMDZ0jHb-tAfz1j1-kv7YK3w2EVX0abAQ94xu7lY07xQZASqsLSqM_3oJIkR69Ogz7ZFvdNTpgt4UoC-AQu4v44MeTUnqwqJN3CUFnwXfNKqmrXpE_2MzRQ1m3hsx2KxvigU-Q3-0US_tygMrTN0gr2Fw48YV0n0aMN05P2HoxcLMPOz_9VMsUeDP5_I9f)**

_**If you donated in the General Election, thank you Fellow American.**_

Now that we're in OVERTIME, I need your help again. **[I'm humbly asking you to make another donation to help us flip this seat.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=920a1a4e2ede4a7b885f4bd2e5339292&_e=awzJzBNCH6R-pOZb_dz0cUxSkmw3cJ2tdJSQ9jqMvghKL0xB9YAGHZcSPWbmVfHJChRaeGGYIPlv4L0uPUhhNEF-i_0sqzed5jm7CuCmHvYr3M5EfeeembCA60pHmVVOkBq4gmkFOOm4FADUb3SPCPlDXbHaIBtRh5ZdGEHOLW9olubRWMHD23qnfiMXWq0WHloIXJEXOBIMhph8MJ827Cs-fnz7WCSrJB1AnQkn4MyolkoshxqeutlnKc41unt7bmIMDZ0jHb-tAfz1j1-kv7YK3w2EVX0abAQ94xu7lY0NdkdGPIULbK3Xio8p6cN41w-DJ3Uo-SMr5a9vu6f2t3nOIZNhPxTLEj1yGGVjkXSaSqL_TM_TMew01sP2AYXYOVe9KrzdwqUD-IWDwJM_XcHhF70WcglwYRqkL71731rf2ikYAt1nhkmQFL3LJwyl)**

The fundamentals of this race have not changed.

1. I'm still running against the #1 fundraiser in the Senate, who is the most vulnerable Democrat incumbent.
2. We have millions of eligible voters who we need to get back to the polls in the middle of the holiday season next month.
3. The Democrats spent over $70 million in false and misleading attack ads in the general election, so the barrage is only going to get worse now that the stakes are higher.

I know you're tired of fundraising emails, but we've come too far to lose sight of the finish line. **[Please, can I count on your support?](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=920a1a4e2ede4a7b885f4bd2e5339292&_e=awzJzBNCH6R-pOZb_dz0cUxSkmw3cJ2tdJSQ9jqMvghKL0xB9YAGHZcSPWbmVfHJChRaeGGYIPlv4L0uPUhhNEF-i_0sqzed5jm7CuCmHvYr3M5EfeeembCA60pHmVVOkBq4gmkFOOm4FADUb3SPCPlDXbHaIBtRh5ZdGEHOLW9olubRWMHD23qnfiMXWq0WHloIXJEXOBIMhph8MJ827Cs-fnz7WCSrJB1AnQkn4MyolkoshxqeutlnKc41unt7bmIMDZ0jHb-tAfz1j1-kv7YK3w2EVX0abAQ94xu7lY22MjSHUsFvW8QK3OYr-pxpJpH2Cbtym4Tw1T4fP3OgetbW7uwXMs9mI18o9E08opr3khjm1V63N3FQfJ2CVzvB7-t343XCOS7EamCZwE24OMN3djxfyg4g2RiWmw81gvCynaZmQSJF0ajLGVWhk7xA)**

clean_body: Today is a new day, but the race continues. | Fellow American - We always knew this Senate race would be a battle. Being outspent by 300% had a significant impact on the Election Day outcome. Over the next 23 days of this runoff in Georgia, we cannot afford to be outraised and outspent like that again. We must redouble our efforts to win the final round of this race. I need you to rush an emergency contribution to our campaign today so we can launch our ads immediately. If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly: If you donated in the General Election, thank you Fellow American. Now that we're in OVERTIME, I need your help again. The fundamentals of this race have not changed. 1. I'm still running against the #1 fundraiser in the Senate, who is the most vulnerable Democrat incumbent. 2. We have millions of eligible voters who we need to get back to the polls in the middle of the holiday season next month. 3. The Democrats spent over $70 million in false and misleading attack ads in the general election, so the barrage is only going to get worse now that the stakes are higher. I know you're tired of fundraising emails, but we've come too far to lose sight of the finish line. Together we'll get this done. I need to know you're still with me. In the fight, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

**Attorney General Miyares visited Alexandria City High School this week to discuss safety concerns and solutions with school and city leaders. ** _“As the proud product of public schools, I’m particularly passionate about making sure that every public school student not only has access to a quality education, but a safe environment to learn. I’d like to thank Alexandria Mayor Wilson, School Board Chair Alderton and the ACPS officials who invited and welcomed me today.” _ – Attorney General Miyares **In addition to the productive meeting with officials, AG Miyares enjoyed a student-led tour of the facility and meeting some of Virginia’s hard-working students and teachers. **
---
**_Education is a path to opportunity – let’s pave it. _**

**AG Miyares announced that Virginia will receive a total of $346,085.82 from two multistate settlements with Experian Information Solutions, Inc. and T-Mobile USA, Inc. concerning a 2015 data breach.** _“The 2015 data breach affected hundreds of thousands of Virginians, putting their personal information at risk. Companies like T-Mobile and Experian have a responsibility to ensure the safety of consumers’ information, and when they fail, they have to be held accountable.”_ – Attorney General Miyares **Learn more about this settlement** _[**HERE**](http://links.jasonforvirginia.com/u/click?_t=b7c680598d5648c3aaffcf8cea32abf4&_m=d6cf0ae0011445d09d4dfb73257761fb&_e=BIAvgBGdzExzvPMlFFaZYl0q7UW32nKCZGdFXluDayBY_geZ3Cqe-Q5lR41qpN-1I2EkECpmb0AFwJAzwbi19GVnKJBK8h5EWMv2LCWb_jTdKYdGXAzUxdxt6xWrgJLEIbq8ZXw9VOSLqJhMwx6LFVOxP6GFsids4uT3edGR3MFEBQSy9_0Aw-ixwWqvOWKBvNZP4AWUBG8Cy15ekAI3VL7EkRbxXuQiprIVxFJFToUkd2a0q1Irkhd-plM3Kg250hJdbndB5QDk1Yb5V85s782Hn42vytxm0AviR_3nagWi4vY3VOusYrkx4kcaQcwR-PFqXWGAeqVURgoUw5i_SspAa-sRB_xS6SXT7ksMBpaENsfZrJ3Kj0muPdh1e9jsboVKXTn9m7T8v1eejXY0pg%3D%3D)_**. **

clean_body: | | | Welcome to the Miyares Roundup! Attorney General Miyares was hard at work this week fighting for Virginians. Virginia – What a Week! | | Attorney General Jason Miyares extends his congratulations to all of the candidates who worked restlessly to bring about change across the Commonwealth. Virginia’s ready to lead in Washington. | | Thank you to all the hard-working men and women who helped our elections run smoothly. We couldn’t do it without your dedication to democracy! Thank you for ensuring that the American Miracle remains a reality. Attorney General Miyares visited Alexandria City High School this week to discuss safety concerns and solutions with school and city leaders. “As the proud product of public schools, I’m particularly passionate about making sure that every public school student not only has access to a quality education, but a safe environment to learn. I’d like to thank Alexandria Mayor Wilson, School Board Chair Alderton and the ACPS officials who invited and welcomed me today.” – Attorney General Miyares In addition to the productive meeting with officials, AG Miyares enjoyed a student-led tour of the facility and meeting some of Virginia’s hard-working students and teachers. Education is a path to opportunity – let’s pave it. | | | | | Read the City of Alexandria and Alexandria Public Schools joint statement on AG Miyares’ visit . “Today’s meeting was productive and I was able to share some concerns, as well as offer the resources of the Office of Attorney General to support them. Alexandria City High School has amazing students, and I was honored to meet some of them today. I look forward to working together with the Alexandria City officials to make sure parents feel confident that their children will be safe at school. As Attorney General, every Virginia family’s safety is my number one priority.” – Attorney General Miyares American Heritage Girls | | AG Miyares spoke with members of the American Heritage Girls organization on Thursday. American Heritage Girls empowers young women to play an active role in their communities by helping them develop and strengthen confidence levels and leadership skills through service to Faith, family, and country. AG Miyares announced that Virginia will receive a total of $346,085.82 from two multistate settlements with Experian Information Solutions, Inc. and T-Mobile USA, Inc. concerning a 2015 data breach. “The 2015 data breach affected hundreds of thousands of Virginians, putting their personal information at risk. Companies like T-Mobile and Experian have a responsibility to ensure the safety of consumers’ information, and when they fail, they have to be held accountable.” – Attorney General Miyares Learn more about this settlement . Until next time, Team Miyares | | ---|--- | | | | | | | Paid for and Authorized by Miyares for Virginia | | PO Box 3193, Virginia Beach, VA 23451 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: The most personal email I’ve ever sent you
body:
[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e737f18db9134eafaddae8d2c549fb30&_e=Hb-h8XLdYfpkuiT-lYjoJq7-C9KbYgjSzhJc_PtoGEbJZNof9catyD0pOZAClXE4vBQR6UNUHjaxyV62d6stLNUEYVlN0AAMQJx3e7UeJpBr_ec6iNR-dWzODH2dezXKB6ZWQNYlq5FkWECY1kbHtOnJKI6DxN0sIE6yv19mXCo7Nk6qUJvXSwEOtw1MT_Oak88sTufv0csbcq-8H7Ja6cJ1mVTpAjOOthRu4tOP2g-1-sV4q3ViExinewOftGF2aY9shUaN3wzBoNuoiqKH4jF6IzocIfGMiup6M1MMaCk%3D)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation 's mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e737f18db9134eafaddae8d2c549fb30&_e=Hb-h8XLdYfpkuiT-lYjoJq7-C9KbYgjSzhJc_PtoGEbJZNof9catyD0pOZAClXE4vBQR6UNUHjaxyV62d6stLNUEYVlN0AAMQJx3e7UeJpBr_ec6iNR-dWzODH2dezXKB6ZWQNYlq5FkWECY1kbHtFffw0kHkP9cHQBbjXDZRV9PQE4-pcvKTu_dcrRIkHziEeOKKV58FYT__fGcZs8LNSuSZkEqVYXAu5mDgrZ39RLIBP6pNBoH1568XBajHaRBs4XmWhOHG-MtTtCOa2-ceDHalL3Nu-KPphZ8TmHhVdg%3D)

**_Now I 'll share my story_... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I've dealt with racism... _**I 've even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e737f18db9134eafaddae8d2c549fb30&_e=Hb-h8XLdYfpkuiT-lYjoJq7-C9KbYgjSzhJc_PtoGEbJZNof9catyD0pOZAClXE4vBQR6UNUHjaxyV62d6stLNUEYVlN0AAMQJx3e7UeJpBr_ec6iNR-dWzODH2dezXKB6ZWQNYlq5FkWECY1kbHtIoynRle5WUssNRaai1eEp4nwo0Hwug9mDE2Nb6C4g_Z9m-qKx4e2Tvq7oV--v926NNycdpK-QzEs4AUaIB9v9vPHB57_agUxDKJ9FhjTwmanS2laAYWuA9hD5lP4CPL46-9Lxyu7Kw4vGVcsDrkkgY%3D)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I 'm not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT 's efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e737f18db9134eafaddae8d2c549fb30&_e=Hb-h8XLdYfpkuiT-lYjoJq7-C9KbYgjSzhJc_PtoGEbJZNof9catyD0pOZAClXE4vBQR6UNUHjaxyV62d6stLNUEYVlN0AAMQJx3e7UeJpBr_ec6iNR-dWzODH2dezXKB6ZWQNYlq5FkWECY1kbHtBitnenBR8vYagRHdAQ1_K0MbBeDYLfKiDBYeIwA_-T0YJdIekQ4QDzg3VqLpSHHbYgZZW6tNV_0W8Cftd-obgHj5xtLIan4g9QKDTrHsVkRdGg07YAwCs2nxZjuWS-9QUpIX_Kxd1iBIoWvxhwrh6g%3D)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e737f18db9134eafaddae8d2c549fb30&_e=Hb-h8XLdYfpkuiT-lYjoJq7-C9KbYgjSzhJc_PtoGEbJZNof9catyD0pOZAClXE4vBQR6UNUHjaxyV62d6stLNUEYVlN0AAMQJx3e7UeJpBr_ec6iNR-dWzODH2dezXKB6ZWQNYlq5FkWECY1kbHtDKwjLOyw-uF-m73AqCFFCh5W1p0Ebnv9Dq89WDNWchPv2a8W-WJNR3W_47qkRh4WBNLuIVEgDLcsdLUppYDRwZRVDwnuvVid5nNvepITJH0_9GIbL7Ld01qFlWF0lgk8mSvLubAvPn38Qzj_NOIUP4%3D)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e737f18db9134eafaddae8d2c549fb30&_e=Hb-h8XLdYfpkuiT-lYjoJq7-C9KbYgjSzhJc_PtoGEbJZNof9catyD0pOZAClXE4vBQR6UNUHjaxyV62d6stLNUEYVlN0AAMQJx3e7UeJpBr_ec6iNR-dWzODH2dezXKB6ZWQNYlq5FkWECY1kbHtIC6D6Jf1tfSj2Q0TP1S_LYfPRI44q_dbyG3eBd_GMTE4LgUaKi57URqca93WpUsc2yFJbmwB_s_9mYUF2fiAbc_1tRD-KpTIE048JngQ67UjTlLaNvAPwsG85GJLWZfQHg2fmh18a3nz8UOo5V7_c0%3D)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e737f18db9134eafaddae8d2c549fb30&_e=Hb-h8XLdYfpkuiT-lYjoJq7-C9KbYgjSzhJc_PtoGEbJZNof9catyD0pOZAClXE4vBQR6UNUHjaxyV62d6stLNUEYVlN0AAMQJx3e7UeJpBr_ec6iNR-dWzODH2dezXKB6ZWQNYlq5FkWECY1kbHtDVjHhGpne6gJP8lG4NXCCvDF2EKVNT3ud_R_EkDyFr1BgnwqVBBj8-NUjP0cxbI-4mKObLOty1jbNoVFYYDpVp2-pqOnqCpDLvLQOsx7CX51DTpmLoh4hw0i6gONdT2TZHjICn6DQTRBWXjPezt7AQ%3D)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT 's events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e737f18db9134eafaddae8d2c549fb30&_e=Hb-h8XLdYfpkuiT-lYjoJq7-C9KbYgjSzhJc_PtoGEbJZNof9catyD0pOZAClXE4vBQR6UNUHjaxyV62d6stLNUEYVlN0AAMQJx3e7UeJpBr_ec6iNR-dWzODH2dezXKB6ZWQNYlq5FkWECY1kbHtCz4Q7vA4LVKK7ZfTf5-wttAurYHcFmW4Rulqul9n0FHCaDaDLV9LflIjcWyHUQqna1nqWBkEH3e5XyN9NONP8MwNcwDCi_ULkSmYk_5nnjtsvEDr8OjSQTD0ybCytojd4zAhZlEF8ZY_cqWp8SDAOg%3D)

What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=e737f18db9134eafaddae8d2c549fb30&_e=Hb-h8XLdYfpkuiT-lYjoJq7-C9KbYgjSzhJc_PtoGEbJZNof9catyD0pOZAClXE4vBQR6UNUHjaxyV62d6stLNUEYVlN0AAMQJx3e7UeJpBr_ec6iNR-dWzODH2dezXKhflgBQIWRLY5cG4_nWYaoGL_BHPmA85iWdTYGeM9JV87X_wGJG-MTKmBGMAalCL6xFi4rnNsq7A7e4ntWCX0KzZaMymuc0kOsxqCEPbPF4FQHrEz0aoeYk0e_L5zRrrcCGvMgbp9BGPfM_C6CM4JunzpWxgEyBM35Bw66WIZ9uM%3D)

clean_body: Friend, This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation. For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop. In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities. Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture. Now I 'll share my story... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities. Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking. We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals. This is WRONG. I've dealt with racism... I 've even received death threats. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable. But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up. I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters. I am breaking the rules. It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... I 'm not doing that. You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country. So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss). When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing. Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for: School Choice: Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools. The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. Criminal Justice Reform: The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities. Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message. Entrepreneurship: I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire. BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. Teaching History: Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore. The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor. This is personal to me. I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today: This is my last message to you before you close this email. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment. My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause. Thank you, Friend. Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation Sent to Conservative Liberty Wire subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

clean_body: Friend, This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation. For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop. In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities. Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture. Now I 'll share my story... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities. Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking. We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals. This is WRONG. I've dealt with racism... I 've even received death threats. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable. But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up. I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters. I am breaking the rules. It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... I 'm not doing that. You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country. So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss). When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing. Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for: School Choice: Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools. The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. Criminal Justice Reform: The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities. Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message. Entrepreneurship: I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire. BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. Teaching History: Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore. The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor. This is personal to me. I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today: This is my last message to you before you close this email. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment. My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause. Thank you, Friend. Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation Sent to Conservatives Give subscribers. 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: We've got an incredibly tough fight ahead:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | I just want to say _thank you._

Because of the strength of our grassroots movement, we've come one step closer to making history yet again here in Georgia. And we've shown the country that our fight for progress isn't over.

**We know we can win this – we have done it before! But I've always been honest with you, so I’ll do so again: we've got an incredibly tough fight ahead. We poured every cent we had into getting this far – which means we're now back to square one.** With all eyes on Georgia, the GOP is gearing up to flood us with millions in attack ads, and we need to refill our campaign.

That's why I'm asking directly: [**Will you split $5 between me and the DSCC right now to kickstart this critical next phase of the fight for a Democratic Senate and power our reelection campaign to victory?**](https://go.dscc.org/go/5319?amount=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20221113-RaphaelWarnock-WarnockRunoffTandemV2-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20221113-RaphaelWarnock-WarnockRunoffTandemV2-Pros-sl1&akid=8610%2E9716520%2E5w-6JP)

When we launched this campaign, we knew it wouldn't be easy. The Republicans have been coming after me with everything they've got since the beginning, and they haven't let up since.

Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire Republican establishment have spent millions to prop up my opponent, Herschel Walker, and defeat me. And they're about to spend a whole lot more to definitively turn Georgia red.

That's why taking our foot off the gas is simply not an option. **We're in a position to win this race – but not without grassroots support.**

**With time running out before our crucial midnight deadline, we're falling short of the $50,000 we need to raise, so I'm personally asking:[Will you split $5 or more right now between me and the DSCC to help me defeat Herschel Walker and fight for a Democratic Senate?](https://go.dscc.org/go/5319?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20221113-RaphaelWarnock-WarnockRunoffTandemV2-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20221113-RaphaelWarnock-WarnockRunoffTandemV2-Pros-sl1&akid=8610%2E9716520%2E5w-6JP)**

Thank you for your support.

– Rev. Raphael Warnock

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/5319?amount=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-FM-20221113-RaphaelWarnock-WarnockRunoffTandemV2-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FM-20221113-RaphaelWarnock-WarnockRunoffTandemV2-Pros-sl1&akid=8610%2E9716520%2E5w-6JP)

clean_body: | | | I just want to say thank you. Because of the strength of our grassroots movement, we've come one step closer to making history yet again here in Georgia. And we've shown the country that our fight for progress isn't over. We know we can win this – we have done it before! But I've always been honest with you, so I’ll do so again: we've got an incredibly tough fight ahead. We poured every cent we had into getting this far – which means we're now back to square one. With all eyes on Georgia, the GOP is gearing up to flood us with millions in attack ads, and we need to refill our campaign. That's why I'm asking directly: When we launched this campaign, we knew it wouldn't be easy. The Republicans have been coming after me with everything they've got since the beginning, and they haven't let up since. Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire Republican establishment have spent millions to prop up my opponent, Herschel Walker, and defeat me. And they're about to spend a whole lot more to definitively turn Georgia red. That's why taking our foot off the gas is simply not an option. We're in a position to win this race – but not without grassroots support. With time running out before our crucial midnight deadline, we're falling short of the $50,000 we need to raise, so I'm personally asking: Thank you for your support. – Rev. Raphael Warnock Rev. Warnock’s title and affiliation are provided for identification purposes only. | | The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. I'm about to ask you to donate $5, friend – **but first, give me a second to explain why your contribution will make all the difference in this runoff.**
Experts are saying that this election will be incredibly close – and our chances of winning will come down to whether we have enough critical resources to take on the GOP.
While corporate PACs and shady dark-money groups are spending millions to smear me with attack ads and prop up my GOP opponent, Herschel Walker, I'm running a people-powered campaign that fully relies on support from everyday folks like you.

**Your donation of $5 will go directly toward our on-the-ground organizing efforts, print and TV ads, and voter mobilization programs – helping me reach every corner of Georgia before the runoff election on Dec. 6._Simply put: Your donation will help us win this runoff._**
**These next few weeks of the campaign are crucial, and with our midnight fundraising deadline just hours away, we don't have a second to spare – so please****:[Friend, will you chip in $5 right now so we can defeat Herschel Walker and win in Georgia? name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Supporting young voter registration efforts paid off in a big way on Nov. 8th, and we still have important races coming up where they need all the new voters they can get!
body:
The Blue Crush
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8f1be8b8-1ded-4dd4-b319-bd1eff79e2ba/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Dear Peter, **Thank you for being a part of the Blue Amp Action community and[believing in the younger generation of voters!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc5f09073-1c23-448a-8328-ab3371051041/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) ** We're proud of the fact [we never bought into the doom and gloom narrative media and polling industrial complex (video)](https://default.salsalabs.org/T561199fe-a0d0-40e4-abf6-5989a17dece3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) narrative this year. [We used good numbers, our experience on national campaigns and relationships with those who knew what was taking place on the ground to predict the Senate outcome and most likely House outcome at this time (video)](https://default.salsalabs.org/T02d73140-a431-46a6-9021-86e426f18700/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), as well as gubernatorial pickups and flipping state legislative chambers. We aim to be a lifeboat of information to which you can swim as we're surrounded by a sea of disinformation. With that in mind, here's a bit more of what's going on: *** _How did we know there'd be no red wave,_ _that we'd likely pick up seats in the Senate, governorships and state legislatures around the country_? ** **We followed the Gen Z vote **[**ignored by the polls and the media (video)**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8b9f7a74-9696-45bf-ae48-ea219d8e3822/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**, and have relationships with groups like **[**Voters of Tomorrow--one of the heroes of this campaign that turned out younger voters and will continue to register and educate them as key races**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2e7a67db-671e-4909-a501-cab24611d09e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** approach this year--such as Chicago Mayor (February) Wisconsin Supreme Court (April) and Virginia's state legislature (November), where we trail in each body by only 2 votes.** **[Would you like to help in this effort? ](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc498070c-70f4-40e3-a9e8-e91f7ebbd56e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)[Please give $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can afford to Voters of Tomorrow.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5659ee04-0fe4-4ab4-9e6e-5e3c6ac2def3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**
---
|
---
| | | | | | [**Support young voter registration with Voters of Tomorrow**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T42de747c-d1d9-4ad1-9945-bffebd4fc6f0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| * Did you know that at this time [Democrats still have a shot at holding the House? An election expert explains more here (video)](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8d39da2b-208c-444f-8e84-c93968d68afa/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). And even if we do lose it, projections now say we'll lose the House by only one to three seats. Just incredible work, everyone. * Will Bunch, a columnist for the Philadelphia Inquirer and top-notch political thinker, makes the argument that the "Biden coalition" won this election, and that this is why Joe Biden should run for re-election in 2024. Do you agree? Disagree? [Either way you should check his piece](https://default.salsalabs.org/T338f3577-7919-4443-931a-cda318fda743/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). * [_Donald Trump is having a really bad one._](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8924a987-6f22-4c8d-9200-9a9862472297/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)_ Schadenfreude? Sure. But also good to analyze his behavior, how it may affect coming elections and which inevitably awful Republicans those ditching The Donald might embrace. _[_We have an a_ nalysis.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T64f6e758-d87a-43ce-8158-0944740ecabe/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) *** _Don't forget the Blue Amp Action messaging tip of the week: This was no Red Wave. It was a Blue Crush._** **Thanks again, everyone. We really stood up to a dangerous future staring us in the face and, at least this time, said "NO. NO WAY." I'm so proud of what we all did.** **Cliff**
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | |
---

Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! name: Reclaiming American Freedom
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=0dc055d8da8345a7af1efe390d9def42&_e=Jwf6_YQEkwZtUqdueDO1v9C7rus3kch0FyNeduImrwcJuWgKXT8uMEqfE6TVlz8i4fuhQZL6zEs-vubn2qkRY5FRrpgZUj8wIKZYIVpR0jJ_MyyyvYRfj4kcCX0F9PAiQtR94FVXtCZ4PHCorK7c38XO7nfAn_MMEYQIlcTJQg8kxnBiKp_ns5MK1sAVKgJmGwhOG-SndS6DFFSvpWMoO0ADTKGZVN9R_tV1KTTR0ohgJviGKIduUqtxqKiUrLYO3-sCFMU5Lowrqs_Gs_Xw7PemzL3uFbFWH3UUTFHusnqRx5WQgkDGK9OVfvcq1OebOAgfWTA30db1_YJOS6OJG1cOzBncDNQf_Drf9VKaMwYsHNwI6k9FgqvieOLlQJBdZmt06DJssG5GMe0Po4K0yg%3D%3D) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=0dc055d8da8345a7af1efe390d9def42&_e=Jwf6_YQEkwZtUqdueDO1v9C7rus3kch0FyNeduImrwcJuWgKXT8uMEqfE6TVlz8i4fuhQZL6zEs-vubn2qkRY5FRrpgZUj8wIKZYIVpR0jJ_MyyyvYRfj4kcCX0F9PAiQtR94FVXtCZ4PHCorK7c38XO7nfAn_MMEYQIlcTJQg8kxnBiKp_ns5MK1sAVKgJmGwhOG-SndS6DFFSvpWMoO0ADTKGZVN9R_tV1KTTR0ogMLvNCnH93IBLucBbpDQgX63chWrdujA-PjxRjg7TYYta9WX8K3cVjLzbNov7vfmy2ueTLZJlohzqKzHmq8gwmGT6o_0Wql9fxsmIswXmKKZ9Yj8kGdn3Ua6eOzAUHkPyyCredR4QcoqWSe6EychpyUORcqZfQLjEB4P9CUxYSOw%3D%3D)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=0dc055d8da8345a7af1efe390d9def42&_e=Jwf6_YQEkwZtUqdueDO1v9C7rus3kch0FyNeduImrwcJuWgKXT8uMEqfE6TVlz8i4fuhQZL6zEs-vubn2qkRY5FRrpgZUj8wIKZYIVpR0jJ_MyyyvYRfj4kcCX0F9PAiQtR94FVXtCZ4PHCorK7c38XO7nfAn_MMEYQIlcTJQg8kxnBiKp_ns5MK1sAVKgJmGwhOG-SndS6DFFSvpWMoO0ADTKGZVN9R_tV1KTTR0ogBOfBy-umGCFZyLaQFvOtIsKMNXRQE_SZllVIZrRkOZ7QLp3i3PvX1Tc2czU_UYkIZNjSSte2TbDC5ECPi2-kWWqWEJ8qTV1P-kY3ojfnKlVUXGnsJGaStR3wM9A1X2Icu-lRRYTJdQGqgopij7dAuZmnHn7BJx-IhxNklfclaMA%3D%3D)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a89cc73ce781435fa6514ca3ced3b47b&_e=mypuUaNDQOYnTk_cQWfpOt-DETaZEXGYQsgOYlfhH9aDErjFSjn4AMUUfANDnTlSGjoz1UDDUH6BfQmJuJJxrJw7WPZA_1zCGkfXRNPf9vmDZCraX4YHt9H8mcv1a-kzCtI-yI-XBmOmIBL5jQY-xulTQyBFOBqxFGCFLOEQOkjDy7lkwpZIJaWXwYsxHCmzFWSc4a0LVQ_mc_TvVsCUAZOWwEInFTfAQsbfiMcWVER9zdRekWVIJRJKjdaXvThKPlbcLUuBkRRYXK48VPDOvM1mKNNd6shX3uti7yagl3EaEjRY8kvqGry1pIZ5mAP4hzMsvmci1ZS2-jcW3I_KULbHYDsi4VsYkrnpdtq12slC0ocOGP6Pmntls_SYe2gmllM_K5NDktIRFTUPvqfo0g%3D%3D)** For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics--too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale's Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America 's future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a89cc73ce781435fa6514ca3ced3b47b&_e=mypuUaNDQOYnTk_cQWfpOt-DETaZEXGYQsgOYlfhH9aDErjFSjn4AMUUfANDnTlSGjoz1UDDUH6BfQmJuJJxrJw7WPZA_1zCGkfXRNPf9vmDZCraX4YHt9H8mcv1a-kzCtI-yI-XBmOmIBL5jQY-xulTQyBFOBqxFGCFLOEQOkjDy7lkwpZIJaWXwYsxHCmzFWSc4a0LVQ_mc_TvVsCUAZOWwEInFTfAQsbfiMcWVEQAOtOs8tSUwby_bDHQPTO8sMzeee09XEs9cy7K_zCHVxLaFUkLXcb1KmDnJLkfbYAnOd4y8hCiqHBx5TQaLswTFckIxdmaoBWwvWj2BWlRYa1V35rSaigdI6ucxR_heVnkhArq0lpN8ae9vvStp3RWUjBiJtzi8pZFeoyBGiR9pw%3D%3D)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

Peter - We always knew this Senate race would be a battle.

Being outspent by 300% had a significant impact on the Election Day outcome. Over the next 22 days of this runoff in Georgia, we cannot afford to be outraised and outspent like that again. We must redouble our efforts to win the final round of this race.

I need you to rush an emergency contribution to our campaign today so we can launch our ads immediately. **[Can I count on you to chip in $25, $30, or even $50 to help us?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858902:69-cMLGNq:m:1:3331421248:E1288AD7DF974ECC387AD29E33C38BFC:r)**

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[**CHIP IN $25 ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858903:69-cMLGNq:m:1:3331421248:E1288AD7DF974ECC387AD29E33C38BFC:r)
[**CHIP IN $30 ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858904:69-cMLGNq:m:1:3331421248:E1288AD7DF974ECC387AD29E33C38BFC:r)

_**If you donated in the General Election, thank you Peter.**_

Now that we're in OVERTIME, I need your help again. **[I'm humbly asking you to make another donation to help us flip this seat.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858902:69-cMLGNq:m:1:3331421248:E1288AD7DF974ECC387AD29E33C38BFC:r)**

While the stakes are even higher now with control of the Senate possibly on the line, the fundamentals of this race have not changed.

1. I'm still running against the #1 fundraiser in the Senate, who is the most vulnerable Democrat incumbent.
2. We have millions of eligible voters who we need to get back to the polls in the middle of the holiday season next month.
3. The Democrats spent over $70 million in false and misleading attack ads in the general election, so the barrage is only going to get worse now that the stakes are higher.

I know you're tired of fundraising emails, but we've come too far to lose sight of the finish line. **[Please, can I count on your support?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61858902:69-cMLGNq:m:1:3331421248:E1288AD7DF974ECC387AD29E33C38BFC:r)**

Together we'll get this done. I need to know you're still with me.

In the fight,

Herschel Walker

body:
I know we can keep Georgia blue.
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54564631/378943878/-1910320442?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2229-bu-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjZjNjFlNi1iYjYzLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6jdWawatsu5HeSZKjs-tNoUyrUh6B6EKPvy928wTtJI=)
Hi, friend, Rev. Warnock here – I'm feeling good, and I hope you are, too.
Thousands of folks have stepped up to fuel our grassroots campaign – and now, we’re officially heading to a runoff election.
Our powerful, pro-democracy message is spreading across the Peach State – and thanks to this team, I know we can keep Georgia blue.
**But right now, we’re falling about $15,000 short of our daily fundraising goal – and it’s important we close this gap before midnight.** The GOP has already poured more than $52 million into Georgia to try to buy this seat, so to fight back, we need to reach critical goals like this.

clean_body: I know this grassroots team has what it takes to win -- but with national Republicans going all-in to flip this seat, we can't let up for even a second. I need your help. | | Derek, it’s official: our critical Georgia Senate race is heading to a runoff. With the entire GOP establishment behind my opponent, Herschel Walker, I can't keep up this momentum and defend my critical seat without your immediate support.That's why I'm humbly asking: Will you split $10 or more right now between my campaign and the Democratic National Committee to keep Georgia blue and elect Democrats nationwide? GOP donors are flooding our race with millions of dollars -- and Mitch McConnell's super PAC has launched attack ad after attack ad against me. Republicans are determined to flip Georgia’s Senate seat. I know this grassroots team has what it takes to win -- but with national Republicans going all-in to flip this seat, we can't let up for even a second. I need your help. ** Thank you for all that you do. Raphael Sen. Raphael Warnock U.S. Senator, Georgia When you make a split donation to the DNC, your donation will not only benefit Democratic Senator Raphael Warnock -- it will also help create the lasting Democratic infrastructure Democrats need to win up and down the ballot in years to come. subject: Thank you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Emilia Sykes for Congress
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/emiliasykesforcongress/emilia-sykes-announces-campaign-for-us-congress-16658547-rofflx9kf8-16702923?e=7730fa895a)
---
| |
---
| Thank you, thank you, thank you! I am so honored to have been elected to serve our community in the United States Congress. I entered this race because I believe that Ohioans deserve good-paying union jobs, affordable and quality health care, and safe communities.

I could not have won this race without _**you**_. Everything you did made a difference: the phone calls, knocked doors, donations, postcards, yard signs, letters to the editor, parades walked, text messages, and conversations with your friends and family.
---
| [ ](https://emiliasykesforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=83820386dcff6cbe03ccbaec8&id=78e0a63e41&e=7730fa895a)
---
| New member orientation activities begin this week and I could not be more excited to get working for the people of Ohio's 13th Congressional District. As your representative, know that I will carry you to DC. I will carry your concerns, your interests and your voice to the halls of Congress.

As I said on the campaign trail, it may have been my name on the ballot, but when I win we are all going to Congress. So, stay tuned for updates. I can't wait to get started.
---
|
Paid for by Emilia Sykes for Congress

clean_body: We’re calling for grassroots supporters to activate their Official 2023 DLCC Membership right now: | | | | | State Democrats just claimed massive victories across the country – we held onto some critical majorities, flipped chambers in Michigan and Minnesota, and protected pro-choice governors’ veto power in Wisconsin and North Carolina. These results are thanks in large part to you. But state Democrats face multiple recounts, runoffs, and special elections every year – unlike the House or Senate where they’re few and far between. Investing in our movement right now will have even more impact in planning for special elections, boosting caucus support, and looking ahead to 2024. Every dollar from our members will go towards building the infrastructure needed to propel state Democrats to victory now, in 2023, and beyond – which means there’s not a second to waste. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Thanks for being a part of this team, DLCC Team | Democratic Legislative Campaign Committee 1225 Eye Street NW Suite 1250, Washington, DC 20005 Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
