name: Rev. Raphael Warnock
subject: The fight continues
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54562945/378909998/227139380?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MmFkMzAyNi05ZTYzLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8LXf8s8-xlbygmagJuUPXO7J4R1CpWriZtI6jRfQUIo=&emci=7c50a480-e062-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&emdi=62ad3026-9e63-ed11-ade6-14cb65342cd2&ceid=43566853)

| | Peter, I just want to say _thank you._

Because of the strength of our grassroots movement, we've come one step closer to making history yet again here in Georgia. And we've shown the country that our fight for progress isn't over.

**We know we can win this – we have done it before! But I've always been honest with you, so I’ll do so again: we've got an incredibly tough fight ahead. We poured every cent we had into getting this far – which means we're now back to square one.** With all eyes on Georgia, the GOP is gearing up to flood us with millions in attack ads, and we need to refill our campaign.

That's why I'm asking directly: **_[Will you split $25 between my team and the Democratic Party of Georgia right now to kickstart this critical next phase and power our reelection campaign to victory?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54562946/378909999/1583625711?refcode=20221113.4_RW_A26&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MmFkMzAyNi05ZTYzLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8LXf8s8-xlbygmagJuUPXO7J4R1CpWriZtI6jRfQUIo=)_**

When we launched this campaign, we knew it wouldn't be easy. The GOP has been coming after me with everything its got since the beginning, and they haven't let up since.

Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and the entire Republican establishment have spent millions to prop up my opponent, Herschel Walker, and defeat me. And they're about to spend a whole lot more to definitively turn Georgia red.

That's why taking our foot off the gas is simply not an option. **We're in a position to win this race – but not without grassroots support.**

**With time running out before our crucial midnight deadline, we're falling short of the $50,000 we need to raise by midnight tonight, so I'm personally asking:_[Will you split $25 or more right now between me and the Democratic Party of Georgia to help me defeat Herschel Walker and keep Georgia blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54562947/378910000/1583625711?refcode=20221113.4_RW_A26&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MmFkMzAyNi05ZTYzLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8LXf8s8-xlbygmagJuUPXO7J4R1CpWriZtI6jRfQUIo=)_**

Thank you for your support.

– Rev. Raphael Warnock

| | | Dear Friend --

My election is currently TOO CLOSE TO CALL. **We are in the lead, but the margins are so _razor_ _thin_ it's very likely there will be a RECOUNT.**

[This is where I need your help, Friend.](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxdUU1PhDAQ_TXlBqFTdmEPHNSNnjx40HhrSjuwVWixlKy7v94B0USTpum8Nx9vXrHm-30lygpEmZi6AMVbndgacgDOuQB6CJ4JXoiqyXe5Rs2rsmBFjoOyfdYGxHiy7h2DofiSaT8kp1pwc6jyQ8N3pRBN27SigarcaQFYGMh10tenGMeJiRsG93Qm1HPA7GxdQLM0IaxXBLm08dhgiGnrQ6q96wJOE7EeIJ3mcfREfWcycT_HQQ5o7DwwcVwVMtgv4OTnoJFAp3uphrG37WWjNIXKdlR-XHfmW7ttrjTeqWi9kyb4ztJ8P4_y_96y9Z8Oz1NQVxJEhGyCJ1J1KH-8_JnnXUQXv7Wk8PT2eZiH68cr0dL11iw6_oIna8ipY1cUeuigSEJtxrPtezvtS_qJbv2JxfhtsZqVtwxgLQNYPYY5ihf1_PwYLunH9Zo-7F6gW0i4ozteRvzN3Jpkm33AyuMXk2O1ag)

It’s going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks of this runoff campaign, so I need your help once again. It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks of this runoff campaign, so I need your help once again. |

Fellow American,

_**The fight for Georgia's Senate seat is going into OVERTIME.**_

**Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th.**

It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again.

We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff.

**[I'm going to beat Senator Warnock in this runoff, but I can't do it without the help of my top supporters. Please donate $5, $10, $34, or any amount up to the limit of $2,900 to help us rebuild our campaign war chest so we can launch our advertising immediately!](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=6a7de330dc8a45eca5d3a99b162317fa&_e=TkxahSRXQbuCnarUeGz_IxCpB2Smlx3ZdE7-3pTHuohjaGcI5irErtuvfkDbAySA97sm-9wgyRljRZ5ZM0vjAhj7rIr1ObyratkYXw0tPTkXECpKjAL3Hcb-XorWE5HPhvifKRaDqkgEkWxpTIZNBR_jMkk9ExOCjv3U73cs6vUCU3bWTyoy-vnstTzSmx1HzAb6Bo4o_xgMGPckTPJc_RNY4WothCGNLmVKsIi4BIN18LUYf9XGAHencEFBX7gEKKpo9qdPWdkM6ysBP0DMBPRSCtkgB7yEKW2MxD7ZY1vkrZh_chrMgHj3J9a1homU-aaCju28lXW0nNOAi5CXP6t1yneTb8GaxhNziVO-op3BxTviFo0OIqtmuonFmJFfR62FjvAPcyPf6E-CSWILgmudQw7QWVg34ji1saNOUh0%3D)**

name: Herschel Walker
subject: Mark your calendar
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC
body:
|
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857574:6a6ZBLGN5:m:1:3370555685:9CF01532DC352446A7AC6AC6CC5D4224:r)

---
Peter - We always knew this Senate race would be a battle.

Being outspent by 300% had a significant impact on the Election Day outcome. Over the next 22 days of this runoff in Georgia, we cannot afford to be outraised and outspent like that again. We must redouble our efforts to win the final round of this race.

I need you to rush an emergency contribution to our campaign today so we can launch our ads immediately. **[Can I count on you to chip in $25, $30, or even $50 to help us?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857574:6a6ZBLGN5:m:1:3370555685:9CF01532DC352446A7AC6AC6CC5D4224:r)**

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[**CHIP IN $25 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857575:6a6ZBLGN5:m:1:3370555685:9CF01532DC352446A7AC6AC6CC5D4224:r)
[**CHIP IN $30 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857576:6a6ZBLGN5:m:1:3370555685:9CF01532DC352446A7AC6AC6CC5D4224:r)
[**CHIP IN $50 ->**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857577:6a6ZBLGN5:m:1:3370555685:9CF01532DC352446A7AC6AC6CC5D4224:r)
_**If you donated in the General Election, thank you Peter.**_

Now that we're in OVERTIME, I need your help again. **[I'm humbly asking you to make another donation to help us flip this seat.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857574:6a6ZBLGN5:m:1:3370555685:9CF01532DC352446A7AC6AC6CC5D4224:r)**

While the stakes are even higher now with control of the Senate possibly on the line, the fundamentals of this race have not changed.

1. I'm still running against the #1 fundraiser in the Senate, who is the most vulnerable Democrat incumbent.
2. We have millions of eligible voters who we need to get back to the polls in the middle of the holiday season next month.
3. The Democrats spent over $70 million in false and misleading attack ads in the general election, so the barrage is only going to get worse now that the stakes are higher.

I know you're tired of fundraising emails, but we've come too far to lose sight of the finish line. **[Please, can I count on your support?](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857574:6a6ZBLGN5:m:1:3370555685:9CF01532DC352446A7AC6AC6CC5D4224:r)**

Together we'll get this done. I need to know you're still with me.

In the fight,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857574:6a6ZBLGN5:m:1:3370555685:9CF01532DC352446A7AC6AC6CC5D4224:r)

Herschel Walker

[** Donate Today -> **](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857574:6a6ZBLGN5:m:1:3370555685:9CF01532DC352446A7AC6AC6CC5D4224:r)

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857578:6a6ZBLGN5:m:1:3370555685:9CF01532DC352446A7AC6AC6CC5D4224:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857579:6a6ZBLGN5:m:1:3370555685:9CF01532DC352446A7AC6AC6CC5D4224:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857580:6a6ZBLGN5:m:1:3370555685:9CF01532DC352446A7AC6AC6CC5D4224:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/61857581:6a6ZBLGN5:m:1:3370555685:9CF01532DC352446A7AC6AC6CC5D4224:r)

body:

Friend,

My race against far-Left Democrat Senator Raphael Warnock is going to a RUNOFF.

Peter - We always knew this Senate race would be a battle.

Being outspent by 300% had a significant impact on the Election Day outcome. Over the next 22 days of this runoff in Georgia, we cannot afford to be outraised and outspent like that again. We must redouble our efforts to win the final round of this race.

I need you to rush an emergency contribution to our campaign today so we can launch our ads immediately. **[Can I count on you to chip in $25, $30, or even $50 to help us?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61859063:63JoZLGNj:m:1:3253819041:3FC2ECF5F988E61E788F2E9501B33358:r)**

_If you've stored your payment information, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
[**CHIP IN $25 ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61859064:63JoZLGNj:m:1:3253819041:3FC2ECF5F988E61E788F2E9501B33358:r)
[**CHIP IN $30 ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61859065:63JoZLGNj:m:1:3253819041:3FC2ECF5F988E61E788F2E9501B33358:r)
[**CHIP IN $50 ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61859066:63JoZLGNj:m:1:3253819041:3FC2ECF5F988E61E788F2E9501B33358:r)
_**If you donated in the General Election, thank you Peter.**_

Now that we're in OVERTIME, I need your help again. **[I'm humbly asking you to make another donation to help us flip this seat.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61859063:63JoZLGNj:m:1:3253819041:3FC2ECF5F988E61E788F2E9501B33358:r)**

While the stakes are even higher now with control of the Senate possibly on the line, the fundamentals of this race have not changed.

1. I'm still running against the #1 fundraiser in the Senate, who is the most vulnerable Democrat incumbent.
2. We have millions of eligible voters who we need to get back to the polls in the middle of the holiday season next month.
3. The Democrats spent over $70 million in false and misleading attack ads in the general election, so the barrage is only going to get worse now that the stakes are higher.

I know you're tired of fundraising emails, but we've come too far to lose sight of the finish line. **[Please, can I count on your support?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61859063:63JoZLGNj:m:1:3253819041:3FC2ECF5F988E61E788F2E9501B33358:r)**

Together we'll get this done. I need to know you're still with me.

In the fight,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61859063:63JoZLGNj:m:1:3253819041:3FC2ECF5F988E61E788F2E9501B33358:r)

Herschel Walker

[** Donate Today -> **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/61859063:63JoZLGNj:m:1:3253819041:3FC2ECF5F988E61E788F2E9501B33358:r)

name: Roger Stone
subject: The StoneZONE, by Roger Stone
body:
| [](https://102671.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=r23wvehyq3wvehp160&linkid=0&link=5178f7a0fdf643f4b57868a6907162fb)
---
| **ROGER STONE: 'I Seriously Feel Like We Are Watching the First Wholly Manufactured Election in Our History'** **[](https://102671.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=r23wvehyq3wvehp160&linkid=1&link=ef4a6f3efb7243b58a7dfefdfe160f1b)****I seriously feel like we are watching the first wholly manufactured election in our history, in which all of the key competitive races have had the results directly programmed by the cabal. The most crushing economic conditions, rampant crime, reckless foreign/nuclear war flirtations, and the most aggressive perverse assaults on family and parental rights in history, all topped off by an embarrassing unpopular disaster in the White House leading a shrill, tin-eared bellicose fascist junta that appears indifferent to the ordeal they are inflicting on working people...and yet the Democrat monolith is barely dented.** Either the country has large states filled with brainwashed zealots who are too stupid and mindless to comprehend the reality of the collective damage they are ratifying with their votes for at best lackluster at worst appallingly deficient if not retarded candidates....or we are seeing direct black box voting manipulation at the level of final tabulations being perpetrated on a scale that renders typical ballot and voter fraud schemes unnecessary anachronisms as the decisive votes that have now kept the ruling junta largely intact, or at most just a hair from having an operating majority, are literal fabrications piled onto Democrat vote totals by a few keystrokes entered in some master election hacking operation run by IC criminals in league with and part of the Democrat Crime Syndicate. The experts Mike Lindell brought together have been quite explicit and factually well-supported in laying out how the fraud goes far deeper and is far more comprehensive than any sort of ham-handed ballot harvesting, ballot box stuffing or illegal voting schemes on the ground. I mean, Festerman's supposed win is beyond any rational explanation and defies every known political and electoral principle and truism that we have seen hold firm throughout our entire history... [READ MORE](https://102671.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=r23wvehyq3wvehp160&linkid=2&link=44c12d96c23c4305807618af2179526e). **ROGER STONE: I Attended My First Trump Rally Since 2016 - And It's Clear We Will 'Make America Great Again' Again!** This rally, in deep blue Miami, was unlike anything I've seen in politics. **[](https://102671.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=r23wvehyq3wvehp160&linkid=3&link=5b71d562c73a4aba97759a3094a08d1e)****The moment I arrived at President Donald J. Trump 's rally in Miami, I felt an energy I haven't felt since 2016. Walking along the massive sea of red hats waiting for the gates to the outdoor rally site to open, I got an Elvis-like welcome from thousands of patriots braving the blistering heat to hear President Trump speak.** At the rally, Trump gave effusive support for Sen. Marco Rubio, along with a slate of Republican candidates in the state of Florida. While Governor Ron DeSantis was not in attendance, Trump did endorse him in his re-election bid, despite referring to him as 'Ron DeSanctimonious' just a day earlier due to his repeated failure to rule out a Trump challenge for President in 2024. The last Trump rally I attended was in 2016. As anybody reading this knows, Trump had a level of support unheard of in politics at that time. He was treated more like a rockstar than a politician, despite everybody in establishment politics dismissing him as nothing more than a joke. [READ MORE](https://102671.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=r23wvehyq3wvehp160&linkid=4&link=b4a247246feb4fe894f1f0bd862147fc). **WITCHHUNT 4.0: NY Times Makes Baseless Claims Saying Biden DOJ "Investigating" 2018 Recount Protests In Florida** More fake news from the smear merchants at the New York Times. [](https://102671.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=r23wvehyq3wvehp160&linkid=5&link=bb55f887e8d144dabe52d316535d4d00) **Earlier this week, 'reporters' Alan Feurer and Michael Schmidt claimed that federal prosecutors were now investigating protests during the 2018 recount in the state of Florida where Governor Ron DeSantis won by just over 30,000 votes, in an article titled "January 6th Prosecutors Look At Proud Boys Links To 2018 Florida Protest". This entirely bogus story alleges that Central Florida Post Publisher Jacob Engels, a frequent Gateway Pundit contributor, and I are 'under investigation. The claim is, as they said in the movie Goodfellas, "a fugazi".** Brenda Snipes, the Broward County Supervisor of Elections at the time, had a long history of breaking election laws, including illegally destroying ballots. Progressive Democrat Tim Canova, who ran against Congresswoman Debbie Wasserman-Schultz in the Democrat primary exposed the illegalities of Snipes and a Florida judge agreed she had broken the law. While Snipes was ultimately removed from office by then-Governor Rick Scott for violating state election laws, the 2018 recount in mid-November showcased her continued pattern of breaking the law. When it was announced that a recount was triggered because of the close margins in the Governor's race, US Senate race, and the Commissioner of Agriculture race, hundreds of Floridians began peacefully protesting outside the Broward County Supervisor of Elections, beginning on November 9th (the day after the election) and continuing for several days. [READ MORE](https://102671.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=r23wvehyq3wvehp160&linkid=6&link=b210c0124e2647f68157a7ccad4800ed). [](https://102671.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=r23wvehyq3wvehp160&linkid=7&link=9c468937930a4619a4a8d29fd4ab4466) **Roger Stone** is a political strategist and pundit and a long-time political advisor and friend of President Donald Trump. Stone was a [victim](https://102671.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=r23wvehyq3wvehp160&linkid=8&link=2e4cdddd057d4c2e9533160fc4610182) of the Mueller witch-hunt and was charged with lying to Congress in order to pressure him into testifying against the President. Stone refused. After Stone's trial was corrupted by a biased Judge, a corrupt Jury Forewoman and a stacked jury and prosecutors sought to incarcerate Stone in a Covid 19 infested prison in violation of all current legal precedents and DOJ policy, President Donald Trump pardoned Roger Stone on December 23, 2020. On November 3, 2020, at midnight, the US Justice Department by court order released the long-hidden sections of the Mueller Report in which the Special Counsel admitted that his office with its unlimited legal authority and unlimited budget had found "no factual evidence" to tie Roger Stone to Russian Collusion, Wikileaks collaboration or the alleged theft of John Podesta's e-mail. Stone is a New York Times Bestselling author and has returned to political commentary at [StoneZone.com](https://102671.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=r23wvehyq3wvehp160&linkid=9&link=b35a52021569402683b350732ea56ab3). Follow Roger Stone on social media **@TruthSocial**** -******[ https://Truthsocial.com/@RealRogerStone](https://102671.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=r23wvehyq3wvehp160&linkid=10&link=337f6baa801c45ed9fd545750b80d83a) / @ **GAB -** [https://gab.com/RogerJStoneJr](https://102671.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=r23wvehyq3wvehp160&linkid=11&link=0bdfad3c22bf44479c01cca40a570edd) / **Telegram:** [https://t.me/RogerStoneJr](https://102671.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=r23wvehyq3wvehp160&linkid=12&link=af5308ddacf344e794d54e49868556bb) / **BitChute:** [https://bitchute.com/rogerstone](https://102671.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=r23wvehyq3wvehp160&linkid=13&link=2efbf69edf5d4db6870c8be75e098678) / **Rumble:** [https://rumble.com/user/realrogerstone](https://102671.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=r23wvehyq3wvehp160&linkid=14&link=69a2c2cacf6f4a34b586d6f09ef0213f) / **Cameo: **[https://cameo.com/rogerstone](https://102671.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=r23wvehyq3wvehp160&linkid=15&link=37abda5c18f14624aa73a2b56c43ed27) Watch Roger Stone's show, The StoneZONE live every weekday at 5pm EST at [https://frankspeech.com](https://102671.io.directiq14.com/hit?sid=r23wvehyq3wvehp160&linkid=16&link=1d49d8c62d9d4685a957e2c539d34bff).

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Raphael Warnock is the kind of man we simply must keep in the Senate--he understands how most Americans live, as he's lived an American story. Warnock grew up in public housing in Savannah, GA, with 11 brothers and sisters. He was the first in his family to graduate from a four-year college, and went on to earn a Ph.D. He’s always remembered where he came from, and has dedicated his life to helping others.
body:
keep a good man in the Senate
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T949853dc-2796-4b4e-bb80-79f4afab3d40/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

|
---
| |

| | | | | Peter, | **[With a few weeks til the runoff election in Georgia, we ask you to please make a contribution of any amount to the Warnock campaign to keep Georgia blue.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0346f03c-1e93-4389-9584-d1a524f89b5e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)**
---
Raphael Warnock is the kind of man we simply must keep in the Senate--he understands how most Americans live, as he's lived an American story. Warnock grew up in public housing in Savannah, GA, with 11 brothers and sisters. He was the first in his family to graduate from a four-year college, and went on to earn a Ph.D. _When an historic opportunity presented itself, and Warnock was given the honor of serving as senior pastor at Ebenezer Baptist Church in Atlanta--preaching from the very pulpit where Martin Luther King Jr. once stood--he proved the perfect choice._

|
---
| | | | | | [**Donate: Keep a good man in the Senate**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1b72b66d-5418-4ffa-96f9-a132432ec395/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | A lifelong advocate for affordable health care, fair wages, and voting rights, a fighter for a woman's right to control their body and keeping our schools, malls and other public spaces safe from gun violence, he next proved himself the ideal choice to take on these crucial fights in Washington.
---
**As Warnock doesn't court corporate donors, he needs grassroots support from communities like Blue Amp Action, as Mitch McConnell has dumped $52 million into Georgia to attack Warnock with dishonest smears.** **[Can you join us in supporting him with a donation of $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can afford? They don't make many like Senator Warnock. We need his empathy, morality and work ethic in Washington.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T108a065b-d34c-457a-a081-5ab71fbfb564/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** Thank you all for making this community a powerful supporter of progressive values across the country.
Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te5ddb8cb-d167-41ec-b537-0ad40782495c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Because no candidate received 50% of the vote on Tuesday, our Senate race is now heading to a RUNOFF on Tuesday, December 6th. It's going to be ALL-HANDS-ON-DECK for the next four weeks, so I need your help once again. We spent all our campaign funds on the general election, so we need to refuel RIGHT NOW for this runoff. Despite my opponent spending over $101 MILLION in the general election, Raphael Warnock could not win the support of a majority of Georgians as an incumbent senator. It is time for a change! name: Sen. Warnock
subject: It's an honor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
| | |
---
Friend, as we head into a runoff election, I've been reflecting on this people-powered movement and everything we've accomplished – and I am filled with immense gratitude.
Together, we defied all odds when we flipped Georgia blue last year – not only delivering Democrats a critical Senate majority, but also making history by electing me as the first Black senator to represent Georgia.
In the year since, it has been the honor of my life to build a better, brighter future for our children. **But these critical fights for justice aren't over, and I'm once again counting on grassroots folks like you to power this movement to victory:[So please, with less than four weeks until the runoff election, will you rush an urgent donation now to help us keep Georgia blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54563827/378913988/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk4618-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Zjc3MjAyNC1hYjYzLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_2O9pB26d_uLLoyQtoiQ_YwrI3RGxCqF7-HQr3bG7j0=)**
With experts saying that this race is locked in a dead heat, we have zero room for error. This race is neck and neck – and GOP donors are pouring over $50 MILLION into Herschel Walker's campaign to defeat us.
**While that surge in GOP spending this close to the runoff election is concerning, I know we can overcome it and win this race. We've done it before, and we can do it again – but only if grassroots folks like you step up in this critical final stretch. So please, I'm personally asking, friend:**
**[Will you give $5 or more right now – as much as you can spare before midnight – to help me reach more voters and win in Georgia?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54563828/378913989/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk4618-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Zjc3MjAyNC1hYjYzLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_2O9pB26d_uLLoyQtoiQ_YwrI3RGxCqF7-HQr3bG7j0=)**
It's an honor to fight for you and beside you. Thank you so much for your support.

– Sen. Raphael Warnock
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/54563829/378913990/-598064402?amounts=250,100,50,25,5&refcode=jtk4618-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3Zjc3MjAyNC1hYjYzLWVkMTEtYWRlNi0xNGNiNjUzNDJjZDIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_2O9pB26d_uLLoyQtoiQ_YwrI3RGxCqF7-HQr3bG7j0=)
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://action.warnockforgeorgia.com/p/UBjz5MzSPkqVKiEwLzz2KA2?unsubscribedata=9b%2B5j2c%2FQTic8jhQXqGR2BIeKkJQ24mZUyzj%2B5yUUcMaH44DrZqhJDvhss69zxOhle0luPV5XXnFGxwwX8uQ4h5XnU3p2C7TYiF2qDGHFpJEjzaT17ZgXCffUyEtr3PvuMY1ihti%2Bnm33l5hJAyxwYkoMOBx%2B8j%2By%2FcHlVRaOTpueF2f5TAg1Bp%2FZwEtES6EfbE9pTbjiX5PXdlsZ2VLilsPHr%2B6C%2BkPDvQzVX3ekrURPgE2hLu8kuzTvLv9rmvrqhca8sq3MeXZkBzAA66Zsv6%2FJaiXDXnRO4LyrAcE25jRYp%2FX%2BP1zKQxviZij9jm3dHX6YO4b3685MPS4xDOjmnwWPiON%2BrURYK5FmWKVK0RyuIDz1TIYcJw8KQOCwu9XCc822u3OYQHrK5i8qwwWAbVok5pyCvD7WMun6rAyrfs%3D) For your reference, any donor history or identification in this message reflects what we have on file for the email address [dpwillis67@gmail.com] to which this message was sent.
